# The Danann'Abu

## Goddesses of Ireland

**2023-05-08T16:09:51.927Z**

**Likes:** 0


I could not resist bring forth the three Goddesses of Ireland from the Akasha. First, to quote Jody
Joy from her post **Bealtaine Fire Festival at Uisneach**:

*"According to the legend, the Milesians, led by their chieftains, the sons of Míl Espáine, travelled from Spain to Ireland to claim the island as their own. When the Milesians arrived in Ireland, they encountered the Tuatha Dé Danann, a supernatural race of beings who were the existing inhabitants of the land. The Tuatha Dé Danann had their own pantheon of gods and goddesses, including the three sisters Eriu, Banba, and Fola.  

Eriu, Banba, and Fola were powerful goddesses who represented the sovereignty of Ireland. Each
goddess was associated with a different aspect of the land and its people. Eriu, from whom the name
“Éire” (Ireland) is derived, symbolized the land itself, while Banba represented the spirit of
the Irish people. Fola, on the other hand, was the embodiment of prosperity and abundance, ensuring
that the land would be fertile and the people would thrive.

As the Milesians sought to claim Ireland, they met the three goddesses who challenged their right to
the land. The Milesians, recognizing the power and importance of the goddesses, pledged to honor and
respect them in exchange for their blessing and support. The goddesses agreed, and the Milesians
named the island after Eriu, as she was the most prominent of the three sisters. This encounter
between the Milesians and the goddesses imbued the Hill of Uisneach with an even greater spiritual
significance, marking it as a sacred place where the forces of the Otherworld and the mortal realm
intersect."*


The three sisters: Eriu, Banba, and Fola were Hyperborean (Sirian blood) Danann. The Hyperborean
Danann (from the Tribe of Dan) who migrated to Ireland, then mixed with the Faiere Race there, and
became the Tuatha De' Danann.

The three sisters were not actual sisters, in the sense that their parents were not the same, but
they were certainly related in the Family of Dan: The Sirian Star Kindred. They were given the
Matriarchal "Right To Rule" authority by the Faiere Race of Ireland. The sisters were originally
called the *Danann'Abu*.

Archetypically they held the three power thrones of the (genetic) Star Tree of Ancestors (composed
of Rigel in Orion, Sirius and the Pleiades. This "Tree" would go by many names including the Tree of
Bridget or *Brigatta*, meaning Light Ship or Merkabah.

Thanks for reading Maia’s Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.

Subscribe

**Eriu's power throne was the** ***Morgiatha*****, represented by the thistle cone.**

**Banba's power throne was the** ***Brannaba*****, represented by the Leaves of the Kaile Tree.**

**Fola's** **power throne was the** ***Tralam*****, represented by the Tralam Staff made of Acacia wood.**

There is much more to this story. Maybe to be continued some time.

**Note:** I googled "Kaile" and could find no tree by that name but the name means:  
*a name for girls has its roots in Arabic and Gaelic, and the meaning of the name Kalie is "darling, beloved; slender". Kalie is an alternate form of **[Kalila](http://www.thinkbabynames.com/meaning/0/Kalila)** (Arabic). Kalie is also a variation of **[Kaylee](http://www.thinkbabynames.com/meaning/0/Kaylee)** (Gaelic): from Caollaidhe.*


**visit my website [newearthstar.org](http://newearthstar.org)  You Tube** **<https://www.youtube.com/@bluestarrising-thetemplara3835>**

# The Iris Eye

## Interpretation from the Thoth Akasha

**2023-05-09T16:55:55.510Z**

**Likes:** 0


Thoth: The Iris Eye \- Indigo Flame can also be understood as the "Eye of Metatron", for it is the
point of synthesis with the Metatronic frequency.

The completion of the New Earth Star (NES) will not take place until this elemental earthen sphere
merges with its supernal double. The planet\*s KA is no longer Altheria, for it has progressed into
a more defined and rarefied state, known now as Numis\-Ohm. When the Blue Ray of our Earth is fully
integrated with the Violet Ray of Numis\-Ohm, there will burst forth into a glorious Blue\-Violet
Flame, the ‘Iris Eye\*. This is the bonding flame of the New Earth Star, when our world and its
supernal form will join at the apex of the Metatronic Spiral, through the eye of the needle \- the
Iris Eye.

Through what Solara of Star\-Borne refers to as the “Healing of Orion”, we as an inspirited
world, will be able to de\-polarize our consciousness so that we can enter the Iris\-Eye, where all
polarities are ONE.... (2023 NOTE: there will still be polarity be on a higher frequency of
ONENESS).

On the 11:11 (1/11/92\) date we will turn one revolution on the Metatronic Spiral, so that our
elemental world consciousness will face the Iris\-Eye. Then we will begin to see into the
heart\-soul of the planet which gives us life. A mantra has been given to me from the Illumined Ones
to share with you, which will aid in the acceleration of this consciousness:

(chant five times) LIVING IN GOD\*S HEART TOGETHER (L.I.G.H.T.)

(chant three times) WE WORK TOGETHER TO MERGE OUR EARTH OF THE BLUE RAY WITH THE VIOLET RAY OF
NUMIS\-OHM. IN THIS, WE CREATE THE NEW EARTH STAR.

(chant seven times) LIVING IN GOD\*S HEART TOGETHER (L.I.G.H.T.)

As you chant these words, visualize yourself upon the blue sphere of Earth, within a golden spiral,
in deep space. See the many galaxies of stars in the distance, burning as one chorus in the
celestial kingdom. Look UP the spiral, above your head. Here you see the Iris\-Eye. You must
harmonize the Blue Ray of your natal being \- regardless of your star heritage, you are now Earth\*s
child \- with the Blue\-Violet Flame of the Iris\-Eye. Beyond lies Numis\-Ohm, awaiting to become
the New Earth Star. Remember, that the NES cannot ‘Be' without us, for it is our purest potion
that has created the Numis\-Ohm. Those who now exist within this pre\-formed planet are the Kindred
Ones, many of them having lived on our Earth. They are all truly illumined beings and part of our
genetic vine.

I was allowed to visit this pre\-world, and saw rivers of blue substance flowing like curves of
taffy, suspended in the air of a blue sky. I was inside what could only be described as a ‘flying
van, with a guide, who glided us through one of these rivers, explaining that it was a semi\-fluid /
semi\-gas of special protein compounds from which properties of the world were being constructed.
Below the rivers were strips of greenery, like floating terrariums. We then flew through a cloud and
below suddenly appeared solid land. It was a beautiful plain with a few large cliffs near the bluest
river I had ever seen. Homes were built alongside the expanse of lapis water. They were widely
spaced, giving the impression of a frontier atmosphere. I almost expected to see buffalo thundering
upon the horizon at any moment. The buildings, however, were refined and spacious, similar to what
might be found in a rustic, upper class residential area. I saw no people, but rather seemed to feel
their presence.

*New Earth Star*

[Art by Maia](https://ascensionart.carbonmade.com)

Tube](https://www.youtube.com/@bluestarrising-thetemplara3835)

# Christ and the Two Roads

## The Generational Path and the White Stone Path of Grace & Liberation

**2023-05-13T15:41:45.808Z**

**Likes:** 0

***[Art by Maia](https://ascensionart.carbonmade.com)***


[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7QPG0BQvQJk?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7QPG0BQvQJk?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


From my inner\-planes mentor, ThothHorRa, it is stated that the current version of Revelations
handed down to us has been re\-translated many times (true of all the Old and New Testament, but
especially the Old Testament). As a result, these letters to the Churches have become increasingly
“pious” through the centuries and differ greatly from John’s orginal writings. That said,
John’s letters *did* caution the Churches that they must keep the Word of God, or rather not
become corrupted. (There is also a deeper meaning intended.)

Thoth shows me that in that era, the main corruption was coming from both outside and *inside* the
Churches. That which was outside, being called “pagan” was largely not the true Nature
Religions, but a corrupted form. Many persons of station within the Churches were actually covertly
involved themselves. These false “pagans” are still with us today, and many remain cloaked
within the traditonal Judeo\-Christian religions.

Let us retun to the “White Stone.” In the letter to the city of Pergamum, Jesus Christ through
John writes:

*“To the one who is victorious, I will give some of the hidden manna. I will also give that person
a white stone with a new name written on it, known only to the one who receives it”* ([Revelation
2:17](https://biblia.com/bible/esv/Rev%202.17)).

Thoth’s interpretation is:

The receipt of the flow of LIGHT Awareness from the Power of the White Path (Grace) into the Red
Path, or receiving knowledge and wisdom through Blood generation. This “blood generation” is
what we receive from our ancestors. It is a basic aquired knowledge and subliminal memory passed
down to us through our blood / DNA.

But the WHITE Path, or as Thoth often refers to it – the White Stone, is the instant Knowing
through “Grace” which in the higher translation means to have instant fertility of Mind and
Spirit within the Incarnation.

When we loose the Way of the White Stone, we are caught within, having to constantly support and
defend the Red Path. Blood linage is certianly not “bad.” It serves a purpose in this world.
Without the intrisic connection we all have to one another through the blood / DNA we would have no
direction as human beings. There is an organized organic intelligence that speaks to us through the
blood and carries this information into the crystalline DNA. Yet it is essentially a closed\-circut
without the injection of the White Pillar of Light (Stone) from SOURCE. The White WAY opens to us
the dictates of a Supernal Realm, Being and Purpose beyond the mortal Blood Ties. We seek to
aprehend this through our Religions. Yet no human establishment can anchor an Immortal Flame. This
“Awakening” can only come to the individual when he or she releases all formal enquiry and casts
themselves directly into the WHITE FLAME OF SPIRIT. Thoth refers to this Flame as the *KRYSTOS
ILLUMINUS – the Fire that does not burn the one who fully invites it into Being within.*

It is the Universal Christ. Not the Christ of a religious doctrine, but the HOLY SPIRIT of personal
emancipation, which was fully registered and shared by the Master Yeshua.


*“To the one who is victorius”* – He / She who rises to the occasion of integrus Spirit.

*“I will give some of the hidden manna”* – The gift of transforming nectar or food of the Spirit. This “nectar” is stimulated within the pituitary, when the body vehicle is aligned in full Light (Metatronic) rapport with Source.

*“I will also give that person a white stone with a new name written on it, known only to the one who receives it”* – The gift of Awakening upon the White Path – the reciept of the *Krystos Illuminus,* which is a very personal receipt. It is not given collectively, but through individual heart resonance.

The *“new name written”* on the stone is a tone, vibration, Light Language “name” which is a
Seal of Light response impressed into the crystalline field of the DNA. It is truly a “gift” as
it is summoned through Awakening to be drawn into the Incarnated strands of Living Light we know as
DNA, from the *universal*strands of Living Light.


[Leave a comment](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/christ-and-the-two-roads/comments)

wrote in around 1970 concerning me and my unusual life (up to that point). Without her support, I
would not be where I am today in my spiritual work. Or perhaps even alive at this time.

FYI: I say I was born when she was 47\. She was 45\.

# Healing of the Blood Path

## Through the Sword of Torhannah

**2023-05-18T13:39:39.807Z**

**Likes:** 0

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4PNe436M1As?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4PNe436M1As?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

This video follows the just completed May, 2023 journey of two of our Quantum Logica Interactive
(QLI) members into the UK and Ireland on what Thoth calls the "Healing of the Blood Path." He adds
"Through the Sword of Torhannah" as this is only one such journey of the Blood Path Healing. QLI
will continue with this work, but it also can be accomplished by anyone truly focused with spiritual
intent on this program of Light. The video includes the understanding of this principle and in
conclusion something Thoth is calling "Astral Puja."

<!-- ENTRY metatron-angel-and-quantum-reality | 2023-05-21T16:26:43.537Z -->

# Orion & the Creation of Earth

## Orion & the creation of earth as a viable holographic continuum.

**2023-06-02T15:15:47.639Z**

**Likes:** 0

In the mid\-1970’s the Star Kindred who “raised” me along with my parents, informed me that my
Creation Star was Rigel in the constellation of Orion. They also told me that it was the Creation
Star of earth itself, along with the planet Venus. They stressed they were not referring to the
physical rocks and soil, but the energetic template which enlivened this planet and Venus, and allow
it to become ensouled as a planetary consciousness. A few years later, after I was able to
communicate with my mentor, the Illumined Master Thoth, he shared with me that Orion was the key
capstone point in a triangulation with Sirius and The Pleiades. Never mind the vast difference in
spatial size, they were all inter dimensionally connected.

Through the years, my mentor Thoth, share with me more and more about Orion’s unique role as the
creational font of Earth. Of course many star systems have left their mark on this planet, for both
good and ill.

Bear in mind that the majority of what has been revealed to me about Orion from my inner planes
sources was given years before the internet. Even the books on the connection of Orion with earth
were mostly not written then, and the few that may have been, I had no knowledge of.

Last night I watched the video below on Ancient Aliens and was struck by just how many verifications
there are concerning the information I have received through the years on the Orion connection.
There are a few mis\-understandings reflected in the video below. On in particular is common: the
assumption that all the historical myths of “Gods” are referring to the same group of
extra\-terrestrials. According to my Thothic insights, this is not at all true. The the ages, these
myths were all mixed together to appear as if it was about one family of aliens.

The founders of this planet Thoth refers to as the Shepherds (also Sun Lords). These are our kindred
family from Orion, Sirius and the Pleiades. In later years other Kindred would arrived from some
other star systems as well.

The interlopers were several, the most famous being the Annunaki. According to what I receiving,
they would not have been able to take such intrusive action against humanity had human beings not
lowered the vibrational field through their own actions. When the Annunaki started enslaving and
genetically tampering with humanity, the Shepherds could no longer help us. As Thoth stated to me:
“We did not leave you. You left us.”

Once we managed to raise our vibrational level again to a degree and thus the Annunaki were no
longer in control, the Shepherds returned. This began the first and most intensive wave of what
Thoth calls “The Reparations.” According to him, we are now in the final Reparation period on
Earth.

In the 1980’s I was told by Thoth that Elvis Presley’s Creation Star was also the “Blue
Star” Rigel in Orion. He named to other examples: FDR (former US president) and Anwar Sadat
(president of Egypt who was assassinated).

I was later to hear Elvis saying that his soul was from “the Blue Star Rigel” on an audio made
by his close friend Wanda Hill. This was a very private audio she had shared only with her family
and other of Elvis’ “phone friends” \- a close\-knit group. She shared it with me when I sent
her Thoth’s information. She knew I could not possibly have known about Elvis’ revelations to
her concerning his Creation Star.

As a result, Wanda gave me many transcripts of her conversations with Elvis for my
book,[https://www.balboapress.com/BookStore/BookDetails/420340-Blue-Star-Love](https://www.balboapress.com/BookStore/BookDetails/420340-Blue-Star-Love)**[BLUE
STAR LOVE](https://www.balboapress.com/BookStore/BookDetails/420340-Blue-Star-Love)**, on the
mystical life of Elvis Presley.


**Wanda:** You are really into all of that – spiritualism type of things, huh?

**Elvis:** What\-no! Not spiritualism – spiritual development, soul growth and learning to develop the powers we all have lying innate. I’m not a conjure of spirits. I don’t have to, but I am not of this world, either. I know that, I know who I am. I am a man, a human being now, but what is ‘me’ is not from here. I am from out there. Did you ever hear of Rigel? (a star in the constellation of Orion.)

**Wanda:** No, is it a country or a person?

**Elvis:** A place, my home is near there – my other home – where I am from, and I have the Blue Star for my sun. I have eight moons and a mansion beneath the outer shell of my planet. You think I’m making this up, but its true – you’ll know that one day. You’ll remember what I told you – before you die – you’ll see some of it happen, and you’ll be involved because you and I are tied together and you don’t know it but I do. I can’t tell you how – I don’t remember it, but I feel it in my heart, in my inner self, and so do you. Why else are we talking about this? Why are you here? Why am I? I care about you because you are a part of my past as I am yours, and together it makes that tie in this life. Because of you and me things will happen – people will do things and have opinions and change minds and perhaps be more content, happier because of you and me knowing each other…that is life.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

> *From the point of mid\-heaven opens the portal of the Gods. Behold their fiery beings descending! Yea, we who are the Sons of the Sun shall meet them in the sky and converse with the Great Ones upon the Thrones of Orion.*
> 
> – from the Text of HYPHRA in the Hall of Records, Giza (Akasha Translation by Maia, 1997\)

I NOW KNOW that the above quote is referring to the “Gateway Stars” – the “Asfetatas” or
Orion’s Belt. It is from this point in space that the Light Codes stream to us from the Creation
Pillars of Orion. There are three TONES the summon this Portal to respond:




\[note: for those who are triggered by “666” know that it is no more an evil number than the
swastika is an evil symbol. Both have been “stolen” to represent a corrupted form. What better
way to keep people away from the Sacred than to represent it as evil?\]

\[update: I have been informed by Thoth that there is a fourth Gateway star, which is not physically
detectable as it is “ascended” from our reality.\]


[https://player.vimeo.com/video/436270072?autoplay=0](https://player.vimeo.com/video/436270072?autoplay=0)

[https://player.vimeo.com/video/424969650?autoplay=0](https://player.vimeo.com/video/424969650?autoplay=0)

# Thoth on Activation of Earth Grids

## Transmission from my inner planes mentor in 2007

**2023-06-05T20:17:47.923Z**

**Likes:** 0


Activation of natural earth grids and sacred sites comes about through a confluence of cosmic and
mass human stages of expanding awareness. No individual or group of individuals activates a natural
earth grid or sacred site. However, they can witness it...through ceremony, ritual or merely with
deep inner intention; and when they do, so they activate themselves and feed this activation into
the mass consciousness. This can create an evolutionary path to the expansion of human awareness,
which in turn adds to that expansion. The expanding human awareness meets with the cosmic events in
a dance of harmonics. It is this “dance” that then activates natural earth grids and sacred
sites.

It is the “healing of the wound” within each individual that comes together for the greater
awakening.

With man\-made structures or grids, individuals can activate them...as part of a group of souls, who
either over time or as a new intentional format, have chosen to create these grids or structures.
Often, there is mixture of the two dynamics: a natural sacred site containing a temple that has been
created in the past through intentional human focus. The soul or souls then return in another
incarnation and re\-activate what they originally set into motion; but they do not activate directly
the natural environment, but only that which was constructed (physically and / or astrally) by human
beings.

# Soul Externals

## Thoth Opening the Scroll on Our Dimensional Souls

**2023-06-07T15:23:34.148Z**

**Likes:** 0



**Maia:** Thoth, will you please tell me about the “soul externals”?

**Thoth:** These are the Armughi. First, there is a need to understand basically, how the soul interacts with universal consciousness. As we have stated before, ALL is ONE and ONE is ALL. Thus, every soul has access to all that is in the Greater Consciousness. However, there are many filters which have been developed by the soul as it moves through experience – both in incarnation and outside of that envelope. These filters help the soul navigate through the myriad worlds of experience. They are like specifically designed pathways…the soul says “now I am focusing *here*…so I shut off certain other inputs that may confuse or distract my course.” The more refined pathways allow for more information and less need to create filters. The denser realities, such as incarnation, require more filters; and of course depending on the incarnating vehicle and environment, the filtering may become even more restricting. Yet these filters are not solid doors. Souls can certainly experience energies and consciousness outside the filtered zone. This occurs when that soul reaches for it in a balanced, heart\-coherent manner. It is not quite that simple, perhaps, but that is the core working involved.

There are also times when a soul is strongly connected to a higher streaming coming from a sourcing
realm that is far more advanced than the soul’s current experience. In these instances, the soul
and the “streaming” (guided by a being or beings operating within that advanced streaming) will
create an external operative for the soul…like an external drive on a computer. The soul can then
access this information in increments (compartments) that are switched on and off by the synergistic
relationship between the soul and the advanced format guides (beings who operate the system).

In this way, the soul is not imploded by too much information and experience beyond their scope of
direct assimilation…yet they are still able to perform functions of that advanced matrix, which
feed back into the streaming of the matrix.

**Maia:** Is this was is called “channeling”?

**Thoth:** The word “channeling” is not correct for the process of Armughi. There are some who think of themselves as “channels” who are operating through Armughi, so we would not define them as channels…for the soul external process is more multi\-dimensional. Then there are others who are receiving one\-on\-one with a Being’s energy stream. That would be more suitable to call channeling. One is not more developed than another…simply different vehicles. In fact, there are those who access both systems.

At this time in Earth’s movement toward the New Earth Consciousness, more and more soul
externalizing is occurring, in order for greater degrees of information to be processed into the
Earth’s Mind Pool. This information is not random or highly intellectual. It is heart\-coherent
referencing and associated with Higher Wisdom.

Understand that there is much more inner\-planes activity with Earth souls now…many groups forming
to work under the guidance of Illumined and Ultras. This requires access to more Light engendered
information.

Be reminded that “there is nothing new under the sun.” All that is “invented” is simply
brought forth from the unconscious streaming. As souls become more active in the Unconscious via the
inner\-planes, so they create that template in some form, within their conscious world. The
internet, and it’s minions such as networking platforms all come from the Inner activity. These
Outer forms are poor replicas of the Inner at this time, but it is a developing process. You might
say that humanity is “test driving” the merkabahs for future assimilation into Real World
constructs.

Subscribe

# Archons / Archonic Cloud

## Akashic Definitions from the Vault of Thoth

**2023-06-10T21:44:11.384Z**

**Likes:** 0


*An **archon**, in the [Gnosticism](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gnosticism) of late antiquity, was any of several servants of the [Demiurge](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Demiurge), the “creator god” that stood between the human race and a transcendent God that could only be reached through [gnosis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gnosis). In this context they have the role of the [daimons](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daimon) in [Neo\-Platonism](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Neo-Platonism).[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archon_(Gnosticism)#cite_note-1) They give their name to the sect called [Archontics](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archontics). They were thus called from the Greek word ἄρχοντες, “principalities”, or “rulers”, by reason that they held the world to have been created and ruled by malevolent Archons. The term was taken from the ancient Greek position of office “[archon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archon)“.*

**According to the Thoth Akasha** “archon” is not a creator god. This term was used for such when certain beings, such as the Annunaki (there were others as well), attempted to rule over humanity on earth for periods of time.

From the Thothic Perspective “archon” in its most ancient understanding, is the miasmaic plasma
cloud formed of energy not reconciled to Divine Source (equated to a virus). It is very dense,
magnetic and contracting. Somewhat like a black hole, except it is not functional as a universal
property. It only exists to attract and contain.

Souls which are largely stagnate in their ability to recognize and integrate with the Full Light
Universal Spectrum will be subsumed by the archonic cloud. When Thoth speaks of the “Nephilim”
these are (for the most part) beings who have been highly archonically invested.

All of us are influenced by this magnetic cloud. It is those who give themselves fully to
contraction of Spirit are the ones sucked into it’s cesspool.

If the archonic influence on this planet were to be cast out – which it eventually must be – we
would have only our own karmic reflexes to master. As long as the “cloud” hangs above us, every
karmic reflex is attenuated by its gravity.


Subscribe

# r-H 99 Protective Frequency

**2023-06-16T16:47:13.869Z**

**Likes:** 0

A psionic template combining the frequency of the r\-H Marker ( protective sonic wave) and what my
inner planes mentor Thoth is calling the "99 Core Sonic" or 99\-CS for short. The 99 Core Sonic is a
pulse at a very low frequency that can disrupt certain harmful frequencies in the body; and break up
and dissolve specific foreign recently created substances which many have had injected, breathed and
consumed. It doesn't destroy physically, but breaks apart its atomic frequency which will eventually
render it a shell that will dissolve harmlessly in the bloodstream. By combining the two (r\-H \&
99\-CS) this creates a powerful team to disrupt and destroy this harmful new dynamic circulating at
this time on the planet. It also mitigates harmful micro\-waves such as from cell phones and 5\-G.




*Thoth has revealed to me that the H Marker and Reverse H Marker "marks" the electron possibilities in quantum dynamics which forms "dedicated infinity zones."*

To understand these Markers better...

The "H" is to be found as a natural marker of sonic loci (power to position consciousness) within
the "X" chromosome. It is also a universal bridge and stabilizer for cosmic forces in various
states. It is a necessary frequency generator in the creation of morphogenetic fields.

Yet in certain configurations it can be manipulated, as currently within the “infection” and
“injection.” Thus the creation of the r\-H (reverse H), reversing its sonic spin within the
specific parameters in which the H has been sonically violated. Understand that the r\-H has no
effect on the *balanced* H. It only affects where the H is violated and not playing its proper tune
and thus role.

As a stable H Marker it can work in the stimulation and direction of powerful universal energy
fields through the marking or tagging of *the electron possibilities in quantum dynamics which forms
dedicated infinity zones.*

Since creating stable fields is an important role of the H Marker, when it is set off\-balance,
these fields collapse, but can be manipulated just before they collapse as sort of a puppet dance
indefinitely. In this manner, their sonic spin can be changed to serve another master. Enter the
reverse\-H, which can correct this spin. The result will be to collapse the vampirised version.

The r\-H can thus serve to organize any sonic fields, but burst the bubble of imbalanced H spins.
These H Markers have a limited life\-span anyway. As they disappear, they are quickly replaced by
new ones.

I previously posted an image I found recently of the H\-Marker blocks of Puma Punku. Of course I had
seen them years ago, but meant nothing to me then. When I saw them again a few months ago, it was an
OMG moment!

**In conclusion:** when we focus or rather "entangle" with the quantum generations of the Reverse H, we are stabilizing all our X chromosomes by bursting the imbalanced and decaying H Markers and birthing new stable ones. The whole energy field of the outer earth at this time, is filling with co\-opted H Markers, doing a swan dance before collapsing. However, because they are being manipulated their new prodigy are doing the same puppet dance, as they were birthed in the warped fields of their "parents."

What we are helping to achieve among other things, is to allow the Noblis Terra Nata (star and inner
hollow earth kindred group we work with in **[Quantum Logica
Interactive](https://newearthstar.org/quantum-logica-interactive/)**) to inhibit the propagation of
these mutant H Markers.

When we work with Stargates, we are also entangling with high Metatronic H Markers, helping to
create the fields of FULL LIGHT much needed on earth right now, in order to develop the Pyramids
Radius Matrix (our New Earth launching platform from the Old Earth).

# Prayer to Ptah

## Given to Maia by Thoth in 1997

**2023-06-17T13:51:17.666Z**

**Likes:** 0


PRAYER TO PTAH

I **am the Spinner, I am the Flame. I am the clay upon the wheel of life. I sound thy tone and birds
flutter through space; clouds scatter before the Sun, and berries ripen upon the branch. Oh Ptah,
thou art my voice. Give it psalms of Grace and Beauty. Lift it up into the Heavens that I may become
the singer of new worlds in the Universes of the Father and the Mother.**

***Spin Yourself into Being and You Become both the Creator and the Creation, Forever Turning in the Dance of Life.***

**2023-06-18T19:33:58.624Z**

**Likes:** 0

*some of the Nobles Terra Nata*

*Noblis Terra Nata* (NTN) is a newly\-formed Council composed of both Star and Inner Earth Kindred. They are assigned their powers by the **[Tashsab’va (The Orion Blue Fire Command)](https://metatronarc777.wordpress.com/2011/03/05/blue-fire-command)**. Their purpose is to work with the on\-going installation and operation of the **[Pyramidis Radius Matrix](https://crystallinematrix.wordpress.com/2016/01/29/pyramidis-radius-more-information/)** (PRM). This includes over\-lighting of the **[Quantum Logica Interactive Project](https://newearthstar.org/quantum-logica-interactive/)**.

Their origin however, comes from what Thoth refers to as the Master Builders of the Sun Bow Clan.
This “Clan” came to the physical Earth millions of years ago, from the Blue Star Rigel in Orion
to create an etheric bridging between Rigel and Earth. The Master Builders among them set up
“geo\-detic” markers for the building of sacred structures. The Master Builders retuned in later
periods to construct some of the first, most ancient of these stone monolithic patterns on the
Earth. Thoth was indeed a “Master Builder.”

# Empowerment Visualization for Solstice 2023

## Or indeed anytime!

**2023-06-20T21:21:25.879Z**

**Likes:** 0

**Today on June 20th, 2023**, we are in the powerful shadow of the Summer Solstice. So let us embark upon a deep meditational journey together. We are going to be meditating our way into the **[Pyramidus Radius Matrix](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/pyramidis-radius-matrix-prm/)**, into the holy heart or core of that frequency design. We are coming off of the **[interactive journey with the Bosnian Pyramid of the Sun](https://youtu.be/NDOvnl0vs-0)**, where we communed directly with that frequency. With this Solstice, we are going to make our nest of the Bennu bird, within the central chamber of consciousness in the Pyramidus Radius Matrix.

We can take this opportunity to manifest a New Earth Seed\-Egg of LIGHT from the burning pyre of our
discontent.

Thoth delivered the following message to me when I was creating the video **[Pyramidis Radius \-
Preparing Humanity for the New Earth](https://youtu.be/GJyOgCHnou8)**:

*…literally creating a holograph of what you want to manifest and then placing that holograph into some kind of an interference grid. Interference in the sense that it interferes with the logica patterns. The logica patterns of the actual light sequencing in the holograph. And as it interferes, it causes a static and that static can be then manipulated through Teslaphoresis or what Thoth calls intuitive circuitry. As it interferes with that pattern, the intuitive circuitry takes over and begins to create the scenes pretty much exactly like they are shown in the holograph, but it goes further because it can intuit what needs to be brought into the picture to make it a whole and dynamic reality.*

How may we adopt this universal science to manifest the “New Earth” frequency in our lives
today…launching it from the wave of this Solstice event?





**Proclaim from your higher mind to them:** ***“Rise up. You were born to do this!”***



**I** ***am the Birthing Field for the Seed of New Creation. So it shall be, and so it is!***


[https://player.vimeo.com/video/657951126?autoplay=0](https://player.vimeo.com/video/657951126?autoplay=0)

# Why We RISE

## We were Born to do this!

**2023-06-26T14:49:40.608Z**

**Likes:** 0

*Science is replacing evolution by natural selection with evolution by intelligent design. Not the intelligent design of some god above the clouds, but our intelligent design and the intelligent design of our clouds, the IBM cloud, the Microsoft cloud. These are the new driving forces of evolution. Today, we have the technology to hack human beings on a massive scale. And by this I mean that if you have enough data and you have enough computing power, you can understand people better than they understand themselves. And then you can manipulate them in ways which were previously impossible. You know, the whole idea that humans have this soul, spirit, and they have free will, that's over. Now, how exactly will the future masters of the planet look like? This will be decided by the people who own the data*. \- Yuval Noah Harari (Advisor World Economic Forum) speaking to a large gathering of the Economic Forum.  

The above is from the video below. I have not watched the entire video yet as it is long, but I
intend to. In the video, I saw this man \- Harari \- open his mouth and calmly state the above to a
large number of people who calmly received it. *They are now saying the secret part out loud. They
are telling us exactly what they plan to do to us.*

**When my inner\-planes mentor Thoth tells us** ***Rise up! You were born to do this*****, he is speaking of facing such a world head\-on without fear and with a true sense of our spiritual power. Out of the ensuing chaos, we shall then create a reality beyond the pale and into the radius of New Earth formation.**

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jZDT9q0tudg?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jZDT9q0tudg?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# More on the Electro-Magnetic Zones

## and Gravity

**2023-07-02T13:52:56.773Z**

**Likes:** 0

In the **[Quantum Logica Interactive](https://newearthstar.org/quantum-logica-interactive)** project
which my mentor ThothHorRa initiated through me in 2020, The follow question was asked concerning my
video on The **[Electro\-Magnetic Zones of Earth](https://youtu.be/q77CZQUuZeY)**:

**Jody Joy:** The 32 electro\-magnetic zones now on the planet, what force keeps them in "place" so to speak, and does that force also structure those zones to have different overtones performing different functions? Is that force gravity, and is our current understanding of gravity limited?


Very insightful questions! The control energy comes from the magnetosphere of the planet. This
magnetosphere is not entirely understood by our scientist as they do not figure in the dimensional
"spin" which creates the hollow of the earth. While the magnetosphere does "structure those zones to
have different overtones performing different functions" and gravity waves are definitely involved;
it is the central sun atoma of the planet that is in concordance with the magnetosphere which is the
command feature of the entire operative system. Yes, our current understanding of gravity is
definitely limited.

The following is what I wrote about Gravity in 1967 or 1968, in the manuscript UNIVERSE ONE. It was
this manuscript my mother sent to then\-astronaut **[Edgar
Mitchell](https://maiakamala.wordpress.com/2016/02/06/edgar-mitchell-my-memories-of-him/)** who as a
result, sent for us to come to Houston (from San Antonio) to visit him, where he began to research
my science translations from the Akasha. This research was short\-lived for as he explained to me
and my mother, he realized at the point he would have to devote a large amount of his time to unlock
it be useful for current (1971\) world science. It reiterated to me his belief in the veracity of
the science I was receiving, but he had to make a choice with his life's work and he had already put
into motion what would become the Institute of Noetic Sciences. So we parted ways at that time, yet
he gave me a priceless gift of verification.

The text you will read below is difficult to understand. Far more so that what I write today. I was
just beginning in my akashic translations. I had no real\-world science background. It might be
helpful to substitute in your mind the word "plane" with "dimension." I did not know about the Inner
Earth then or many other things I was later to receive from the Akasha, guided by my inner\-planes
mentor Thoth. My birth name was "Christine Hayes."


Subscribe

# Alisaphane

## The Divine Exchange

**2023-07-04T17:54:00.873Z**

**Likes:** 0

The other day during our monthly Quantum Logica Interactive zoom, a bird fell either from the sky or
the roof, so close to the house that its side hit the window going down. It did not fly into the
window. It simple dropped from above. After our zoom gathering, I immediately went outside,
expecting to find a dead or injured bird under the window. No sign of a bird or any creature was
there.

When I came back into the house, I asked Thoth what this was about. He gave me one word: ALISAPHANE.
I had an instant OMG moment!

I knew then that I had to make this video. Our QLI group will be working with a modified form of
this Atlantean protocol.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

Based on a transmission I received in the 1980's, this topic takes you into an Atlantean protocol
which can be applied in modified form in this current time\-frame. This video gives this history and
quantum science behind it and an understanding of how we, as human beings reach out to Kindred in
other realms and dimensions.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OYeZ99tgNaQ?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OYeZ99tgNaQ?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# The Cosmic Hologram

## and New Earth Astrology

**2023-07-07T19:30:36.416Z**

**Likes:** 0

Those of humanity who are moving into the [New Earth
Hologram](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/new-earth-star-new-earth-star-hologram-numisom/)
and creating it within their own DNA crystals, are doing so out of deep soul intention. They are
responding to the Sacred Tone or Word coming from the center of the Earth that has always been
there, but is now changing in tone and frequency. Most people cannot hear it with their ears,
although some can.

This change in tone of the "Harrum", or Holy Tone of the atoma of the Earth, is a call to the
"Mecca" of our Divine Center to gather, to form the New Hologram together as individual facets of
the ONE.

For those who choose this path – to be the First Pilgrims to the capstone of the New Earth Star \-
they are re\-aligning their crystalline lodestones in the DNA to the Harrum, and further, to the
oscillations of the stellar configurations of the
[Metatronic](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/metatronic-oritronic/)realm
and the
[Mazalothic](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/mazaloth-mazzaroth/)
Universe.

This means that they are able to step outside of their Old Earth astrology \- of the astrology of
the Mazzaroth, and embrace the Cosmic Hologram now being created of the New Earth Star. Now they
will not simply leave behind the Old Earth astrology, at least not while their baseline
(incarnation) still remains in the Old Earth. Only when the Old Earth is no more, and the baseline
of Earth becomes Numis’OM (thus leaving a World System I and entering a World System II), will the
Mazzaroth astrology not tug upon Earth’s humanity. Instead, they will more and more be able to
make use those astrological Mazzarothic frequencies in their charts that align to their New Earth
programs of Light and transform the Mazzarothic influences that do not currently align to their New
Earth programs, into ones which do. Yet this "changing of the guards" from Mazzaroth (12 Heaven
Houses) to Mazaloth (13 Heaven Houses) astrology is not a simple process. It is very individual at
this time and requires great sensitivity as to what your true Mazalothic program IS (in essence, not
necessarily in design), rather than what you want it to be.

We do not speak of pre\-destination here, as the individual’s Mazalothic program is a vibration
and not a verse. It does not tell you exactly how something must play out. Instead, it carries a
certain vibration, and whatever is not aligned to that vibration is not within your New Hologram
Mazalothic Light field. You can choose to fall back on the Mazzarothic system in your incarnative
field OR surrender to that New Hologram wave\-form and frequency which IS being formed within your
DNA, and allow it to create your New Earth Merkabah.


Subscribe

# Healing in the New Earth

## and making the connection in the Now Moment!

**2023-07-14T17:28:47.920Z**

**Likes:** 0

**[Numis'OM is the first stage of the New Earth World System II](https://wordpress.com/page/nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/524)**. It is thus still somewhat dualistic, although not to the degree as is our current world. Souls and all living things ascending from the Old Earth into the New Earth will bring with them a phantom of their Old World being. This will be subtle, but present. However, everyone and every living thing arriving is instantly enveloped in a cloak of LIGHT that connects them to those guardians, guides, and healers from whose administrations they will specifically benefit.

For instance, if a human soul brings with them a phantom of an emotional trauma he/she had been
incarnating with and attempting to clear, in Numis'OM this will be only a shadow of the former, yet
that soul will be very aware of it, as their awareness will be increased in the finer 'atmosphere'
of the New Earth. They will be helped to understand just where to locate it in the energy bodies and
be assisted in removing it. While this may happen in stages, it will be far less arduous and more
effective than is most healing in our current world.

Animals, and to some extent even plants which have been violated through human abuse in the Old
Earth, will be cleared and healed of their phantoms as well. In fact, really everyone dwelling in
Numis'OM becomes a healer on some level, reaching out to the world and the beings they share their
new existence with. This also true now in the Old Earth, but it is far less apparent to many of the
souls here.

Call upon your 'future' Self in Numis'OM to be your own healer. Open your heart to that
more\-realized aspect of your Self and it will bless you with Divine Presence!

Create in your mind and heart your private New Earth Star sacred space. It can be an outdoor grove
or an indoor chapel / prayer room. Picture the things you wish to have there with you. Since
Numis'OM is a manifestational world, through repetition, you can make this healing space real in the
etheric current of the New Earth Star.

Yet of greater importance, carry this sacred New Earth space *within you*.



Subscribe

# Solar & Lunar Magnetic Shells

## Cycles Defining our Magnetic Planet

**2023-07-15T21:54:30.517Z**

**Likes:** 0

> > There is a solar and a lunar magnetic shell enveloping the entire planet. These two shells remain in place as the earth rotates underneath them. At 110 kilometers above the earth lies the lunar magnetic shell. There are four fields in the four quadrants of the Northern Hemisphere. Within one quadrant a lunar magnetic current flows in a clockwise direction while in the neighboring quadrant there is a counterclockwise flow. The clockwise direction yields a positive overall charge of energy while the counterclockwise motion yields a negative overall charge. Similarly, there is a solar magnetic shell at 120 kilometers which houses two magnetic current fields. Again, one flows in a clockwise direction while the other follows a counterclockwise direction. The center of each current, solar or lunar, positive or negative, is termed the Focus and is the stillest area of current. It has a diameter of, practically speaking, 350 miles which is the same as the Colorado Plateau passing underneath. The diametrical distance defines a band of influence between 20 and 40 longitude on the Northern Hemisphere in which bio\-electric life experience is unique in several ways...At certain times of the year, as the Four Corners (of the U.S.) passes under the Focus of the clockwise solar current, Tibet, which is opposite to it on the Northern Hemisphere, is passing under the focus of the counterclockwise solar current. Twelve hours later the experience of the effects is reversed for the two land masses. While Four Corners passes slowly under the Focus of a clockwise lunar current, Tibet is also experiencing a clockwise lunar current. Simultaneously, Holy Jerusalem, the Pyramids of Giza in Egypt and the "Sacred Breathing Mountains" of Hawai’i are experiencing the Focus of the counterclockwise lunar currents. Six hours later the lands have shifted approximately 90 degrees to the next set of lunar currents.
> >
> > (The above information is in portion, taken from reference material of several contemporary para\-science researchers.)
> >
> > ***\- from The Source \- issue 3\-80***

To add to the above information from my akashic perspective, when the Focus of the solar and lunar
shells moves over the **[roil
point](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/roil-point/)** of the planet
(the Hawaiian Islands, center of which is Mauna Loa on the Big Island), a geomagnetic energy charge
is sent to the sun atoma at the center of the earth. The clockwise current sends a *positive* charge
into the planet’s core, while the counterclockwise current sends a *negative* charge. This action
keeps the planet’s geo\-magnetic center stable amidst the changing flux of magnetic energies
active in the upper layers of the earth’s mass.

Venus acts as an adjuster between the solar\-lunar shells of the planet and the central sun atoma.
It helps to regulate the difference between the OUTER solar\-lunar and the INNER sun atoma
magnetics. Since Hawai’i is the roil point of the earth, this activity of Venus is especially
prominent in these Islands. The roil point is the magnetic entry into the earth. The Influences of
Venus as the "regulator" of the outer solar\-lunar with the inner solar is therefore especially
strong in Hawai’i.

The holographic brains of the cetaceans contain what could be called a "Venus node" in their brains.
This node is like a crystal radio that sends and receives signals from the Venusian magnetic
influence and in turn, helps to guide it to the center of the earth. There is a similar node in the
human brain, but it is not attuned like the cetaceans to the complete hologram of the
Venusian\-Earth dynamic. It IS, however, awakening to this interactive magnetic frequency.

The Lemurians (Mu) were well aware of the Venus effect and the cetacean role in the whole dynamic.
They attuned to the dolphins and whales in the Dolphin Temples at specific times when they knew this
dynamic as especially active in order to center the human heart within the magnetic exchange more
fully. Later, the E’mu Lemurian descendants followed a similar practice as well.

Person’s attuning to the roil point of the planet will find a powerful point of entry and
alignment with the "whole earth" geomagnetic body for the purpose of personal and world healing.

There is also of course, a strong resonance established between the Hawaiian Islands and the
"Medicine Wheel" of the American Southwest, which is centered at the Four Corners, but extends out
to encompass much of the four states of Utah, Colorado, New Mexico and Arizona; and with the Giza
Plateau, Jerusalem and Tibet.


Subscribe

# Lord Shiva & Mount Kailash

## A Thothic Perspective

**2023-08-09T17:27:40.097Z**

**Likes:** 0


I have compiled this article from several I wrote previously.

*According to Hinduism, Lord Shiva, the destroyer of ignorance and illusion, resides at the summit of a legendary mountain named Kailāśa, where he sits in a state of perpetual meditation along with his wife Pārvatī. He is at once the Lord of Yoga and therefore the ultimate renunciate ascetic, yet he is also the divine master of Tantra.*

*According to Charles Allen, one description in the Vishnu Purana of the mountain states that its four faces are made of crystal, ruby, gold, and lapis lazuli. It is a pillar of the world and is located at the heart of six mountain ranges symbolizing a lotus* – Wiki

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

For many years my inner\-planes mentor, ThothHorRa has emphasized to me the importance of Mount
Kailash in Tibet. Of course, many people throughout the world recognize this Holy Mountain as
special. It has been a place of pilgrimage for many centuries if not eons of time.

“Russian scientists have suggested that the top of Mount Kailash is actually a giant man\-made
pyramid from ancient times.” Thoth concurs.


Nor should one ignore recent Russian studies of Tibet and the Kailas range in particular, the
results of which, if true, could radically alter our thinking on the growth of civilizations. One of
the ideas the Russians have put forward is that Mt. Kailas could be a vast, human\-built pyramid,
the centre of an entire complex of smaller pyramids, a hundred in total. This complex, moreover,
might be the centre of a world–wide system connecting other monuments or sites where paranormal
phenomena have been observed. It is difficult to explain all the available information in a short
article for UN Special…It goes back to the timeless Sanskrit epic of the Ramayana.


In 1999, the expedition of Russian scientists led by Professor ER Muldasheva found that the top of
Mount Kailash is actually a giant man\-made pyramid from ancient times. It is surrounded by more
than 100 other small pyramids and various monuments, clearly oriented to the cardinal points.
According to tentative estimates, the height of the rest of the complex of pyramids lie in the range
100\-1800 m (for comparison: the pyramid of Cheops – 146 m). This complex, moreover, might be the
centre of a worldwide system connecting other monuments or sites where paranormal phenomena have
been observed. If this is true, then human history has to be re\-written. It is larger than any
pyramid known today.

Scientists headed by Professor ER Muldasheva concluded that the complex of pyramids Kailash, the
so\-called “City of the Gods“, was built by the representatives of advanced civilization, who
knew the laws of subtle energy (torsion field) and the time and knew how to manage them they had
been, and is subject to gravity. Otherwise it is impossible to move large masses of stone or
grinding of mountain ranges that had to be done during the construction of these Pyramids, and
“mirrors”.

The idea of the pyramid in this region is not new. It goes back to the timeless Sanskrit epic of the
Ramayana.

The Axis Mundi, the centre of the universe, the navel of the world, the world pillar, Kang Tisé or
Kang Rinpoche (the ‘Precious Jewel of Snow’ in Tibetan), Meru (or Sumeru), Swastika Mountain,
Mt. Astapada, Mt. Kangrinboge (the Chinese name) – all these names, real or legendary, belong to
one of the holiest and most mysterious mountains in the world – Mount Kailash.

**From Thoth:** I call this enclave within the etheric regions of the Holy Mountain of Kailash, Gurideva \~ Throne of the New Earth. If you will recall, it is Mt. Kailash which unites the Earth’s ‘**[Temples of Venus](http://www.spiritmythos.org/earth/ET/temples_venus.htm)**‘ through the strong Ray\-Power of the Golden Star of Mazuriel (ref: Temples of Venus ). Now, the Gurideva Enclave is an etheric place of receiving the Earth’s incarnate souls into an inner\-plane experience of direct receipt with the energies and Presence of the New Earth Masters – those like myself who are specifically preparing the Way at this time for the planetary Ascension into the New Earth Star.

Through the Divine Rayship of Mazuriel so the Gurideva Enclave receives the Ascension Code on all 12
levels of the zodiacal infusion into the Earth, creating a Vessel for the 13th
fulfillment with the incarnation of In La’kech and her cosmic appearance in the sky. For as She
comes among you in the flesh, so a presentation in the sky will come forth, ushering in the new 13
stellar constellation system of Mazaloth. This appearance will be in the form of the visible SIGHT
of the ‘Blue Star’ as a Child of the true Blue Star Rigel in Orion – home of the New Earth
Star.

I, ThothHorRa am preparing the Gurideva Enclave for In La’kech – both in body and cosmos. In
this sense you might view me as Her ‘consort.’

The Kailash pyramid complex is large, with the main pyramid being a greater part of the upper
portion of the mountain…tunnels and chambers running through the lower part of the mountain and to
the other smaller pyramids around it.

**Maia:** What is the main purpose of this massive pyramid complex, when was it built and who were the architects?

**Thoth:** It unites “heaven and earth” – the *Gurideva \~ Throne of the New Earth with the power of the interior domain of the planet (**[Inner Earth realm](http://www.spiritmythos.org/earth/EC/IE/intro.html)**).*

This complex of pyramids was created by the **[Master
Builders](http://www.spiritmythos.org/members/numis_om/0701.htm#article6)**– the Sun Bow Clan –
on the tidal wave of the **[LOTUS](http://www.spiritmythos.org/earth/EG/evolutiontxt.html)**descent
for the purpose of maintaining a pathway for Masters of Light into the Earth. It is the *Arubarata
Magii – the Sacred Corridor of the Shining Ones*.

**Maia:** I would assume then, it is a major node in the Pyramids Radius Matrix (PRM).

**Thoth:** It is liken unto the MOTHER – the Lotus of the PRM. It does not take part in the “spinning” of the Radius but is instead the Still Point – the Nirvana – of the PRM Hologram.

The *Lady Gathsiva* is the Divine Feminine Being who sits upon the White Throne in the center of the
main pyramid atop Mount Kailash. SHE is the birthing vessel for the One to come…the In La’ketch
– the 13th Living Crystal Skull.


**Now in 2023** Thoth speaks to me of the “Shiva Bell Stone” which is one of many inner treasures of Kailash. He states that it is a stone from the Inner (Hollow) Earth, which was formed from the first stages of the Earth’s interior formation. The entire large stone is still within the earth. The Bell Stone is a piece of that interior matrix. Both the giant stone (really more of a mountain) and the piece that is in Kailash, ring when struck a certain way.

I have a very special stone recently come to me from a “dragon matrix” in the mountains here,
which Thoth equates to the Shiva Bell Stone within Kailash. My dragon version now creates a strong
interaction between Kailash and our **[Quantum Logica Interactive
Network](https://newearthstar.org/quantum-logica-interactive/)**.



Subscribe

# Blue Star Love

## The Mystical Life of Elvis Aaron (Second Edition)

**2023-08-15T13:34:18.712Z**

**Likes:** 0



Elvis is timeless as are his messages, much of which you will read between the pages of BLUE STAR
LOVE. Elvis Aaron Presley was a brilliant light. He used music to entertain and connect to people
and make them laugh. It was his sincere desire to share his spirituality with his fans. In Blue Star
Love, his wish now comes true. Take this incredible journey with Elvis as he describes his home in
another world, which he calls the Blue Star. Learn of Elvis’ deepest, innermost, self and beliefs
about life, love, and reality. In Blue Star Love you will learn all you ever wanted to know about
Elvis, but never knew to ask!

This book was first published in 2013 and a lot has happened on the Elvis front. Now, in 2023, I
added some of my AI Art to enhance this second edition that I hope you enjoy. It is time for
Elvis’ spiritual story, in his own words, to have a new awakening on the public scene. Soon,
select portions of Elvis’ audio sharing with Wanda June Hill will evolve into a documentary
presentation.

“Maia has taken Elvis’s words and thoughts, combining them with great understanding in
realness... intertwined his beliefs... and put a perspective to it all... to look past our questions
and find the answers we need... That is what Elvis tried to do... Elvis, I know it’s smiling...
that little nod of approval... I highly recommend everyone, Elvis fan or not, read this book.”

\-\-Wanda June Hill, author of We Remember, Elvis and Elvis Face to Face.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


**Wanda:** You are really into all of that – spiritualism type of things, huh?

**Elvis:** What\-no! Not spiritualism – spiritual development, soul growth and learning to develop the powers we all have lying innate. I’m not a conjure of spirits. I don’t have to, but I am not of this world, either. I know that, I know who I am. I am a man, a human being now, but what is ‘me’ is not from here. I am from out there. Did you ever hear of Rigel? (a star in the constellation of Orion.)

**Wanda:** No, is it a country or a person?

**Elvis:** A place, my home is near there – my other home – where I am from, and I have the Blue Star for my sun. I have eight moons and a mansion beneath the outer shell of my planet. You think I’m making this up, but its true – you’ll know that one day. You’ll remember what I told you – before you die – you’ll see some of it happen, and you’ll be involved because you and I are tied together and you don’t know it but I do. I can’t tell you how – I don’t remember it, but I feel it in my heart, in my inner self, and so do you. Why else are we talking about this? Why are you here? Why am I? I care about you because you are a part of my past as I am yours, and together it makes that tie in this life. Because of you and me things will happen – people will do things and have opinions and change minds and perhaps be more content, happier because of you and me knowing each other…that is life.

Wanda, Maia \& Wanda’s daughter Starla in in 1980’s



Subscribe

# Hawaii's Destiny as the Roil Point of the Earth

**2023-08-17T14:33:28.598Z**

**Likes:** 0


Each planet has a point at 19\.5 degrees latitude (North or South) where energies from the core of
that planet come up to the surface. It is not just the energy, but the codes of the planet's whole
cosmic creation that are surfacing at that point. On this planet earth, this updwelling is at the
point of Mauna Loa on the Big Island of Hawai'i. Yet the whole chain of islands is actually within
the field of this "roil point". It is for this reason that the Hawaiian Islands is a key
transformational vortex for the earth. It is here in Hawai'i that the New Earth Hologram, or the
program of Light for the New Creational Re\-Genesis of earth has begun. This whole dynamic that
incorporates the Hawaiian Islands in the field of the roil point, is called by Thoth, "FireGem
matrix". It is in this matrix that new energy systems of the planet are forming. They then trigger
other grid formation in various locations around the world.

Human beings are also very much affected by the dynamics going on the in FireGem matrix. They feel
the PULL of these transformational energies and respond to them in various ways. It is my inner
guidance that through conscious attunement to this fact and offering through intentional thought or
"prayer" one's conscious co\-creation and service to the Earth Mother's FireGem, this whole
transfomational planetary/human matrix might be better served.

If you wish to dive deeper on this topic you can **[read more about the Roil
Point](http://www.spiritmythos.org/TM/divine-fire/roilpoint2.html)** from the Thothic Perspective,
on my old archived website of Spirit Mythos.


I lived on Maui in 2004 for six months, then re\-locating to Kauai for 13 years. I feel deeply the
pain of my former Ohana of the sacred Aina (land).

When living in the Islands, Thoth informed me that there was a HAARP “box” on Kauai’s military
base, or rather in a secret underground facility there. This box connected to the main one through
an energy frequency. There are such HAARP boxes in several locations around the world, in order to
enhance and maintain the artificial HAARP grid.

HAARP is employed for multiple purposes, one of which is weather manipulation. While it is true that
the earth is undergoing a major natural change in weather, due mainly to Solar Forcing, HAARP has a
hand in the intensity and direction of its more formidable activity.

From my inner sources, the Lahaina fires in particular, were caused by a deliberate stirring of an
already naturally volatile weather activity. This land has always been coveted by Elite being
business, but now the desire for control of the Hawaiian lands is more intense with the new
“digital” factor of exploitation via **[DIGITAL EQUITY PLANS FOR
HAWAII](https://dbedt.hawaii.gov/blog/23-16/).**

Yet it is important to realize in this context, that the Hawaiian Islands are the remnants of
Lemuria (actually the true name is MU). It was in MU that the first higher soul beings descended to
earth from what Thoth calls the “LOTUS” reality (see video on **[The
Dominion](https://youtu.be/lilZqlhGpEs)**). This remaining Aina then, is truly sacred land. It is
also the place where the Roil Point resides. This is a node that will accelerate to become the main
engine in transferring the physical planet (or aspects of it) from a **[World System I to a World
System II](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/world-systems-i-and-ii/)**.
As the intensity of the “roiling” increases, these islands will become un\-inhabitable. That is,
*on this current level of reality*.

Before it reaches such an intensity however, portals will be opened in these Islands for the
nurturing of the Earth. Souls will be involved in this process. I honestly do not know the details.
It has only been revealed to me that it will happen.

***The OWL (One World Legion aka Elite) will not be able to sustain their goals, as the greater destiny of Hawaii will prevail.***


Subscribe

# My Story

## A Mystic's Journey Through the Stars

**2023-08-19T16:45:50.726Z**

**Likes:** 0

Recently, my dear friend and Sistar Vera Lauren wrote my biography. It was a collaboration between
the two of us. I felt it was time for this, as I hoped it would be inspirational and relatable to
those on the Path. Also for mothers of “born awake” children, as my mother was a guiding light
in that regard.

Vera did a wonderful job in authoring this book!

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C50Fcw_XnOc?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/C50Fcw_XnOc?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

* In this book, you will also learn about the many other enlightened beings that guided Maia Chrystine.

* Reading the chronicles of her remarkable childhood, meaningful encounters with many beings, and Maia’s relationship with her benefactor, Master Being, Thoth (ThothHorRa) will leave you awestruck.

* You will be intrigued that Edgar Mitchell, the Apollo 14 astronaut; L. George Lawrence, the inventor of the first laser engine; Dr Christopher Bird, a protégé’ of Albert Einstein and co\-author of The Secret Life of Plants all played a significant role in Maia Chrystine’s life and validated her science.

* Maia Chrystine discusses the incredible connection she has with the deceased entertainer and singer, Elvis Aaron Presley, revealing his deep spiritual and sensitive side as well as his belief that his soul came from the Blue Star Rigel.Elvis was a brilliant light and used music to entertain and connect people through love.

* The engaging, powerful, videos showcasing her teachings are professionally created and narrated in Maia Chrystine’s naturally soothing voice. And her exquisite original art works are masterpieces.

* Included are instructions to gain access to the Vault of Thoth, and how to be a part of Maia Chrystine’s on\-going collaborative work through Quantum Logica Interactive and the New Earth Star Inner Academy, which is the font for the lifetime Mysterium Teachings from the etheric Temple of Thoth through Maia Chrystine Nartoomid. This body of work represents a pinnacle in the field of Sacred Science.



Subscribe
