# Tuatha De Danann

## Study Sheet on this Topic

**2024-01-10T23:07:23.160Z**

**Likes:** 0

*I will be doing these “Study Sheets” from time\-to\-time on a topic that seems to be especially popular.*


The **Tuatha** **Dé Danann** (Irish: [\[ˈt̪ˠuə(hə) dʲeː
ˈd̪ˠan̪ˠən̪ˠ\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:IPA/Irish), meaning "the folk of the
goddess [Danu](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Danu_(Irish_goddess))"), also known by the earlier name
**Tuath Dé** ("tribe of the
gods"),[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)are a
supernatural race in [Irish mythology](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Irish_mythology). Many of them
are thought to represent [deities](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Deity) of pre\-Christian [Gaelic
Ireland](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gaelic_Ireland).[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)[\[2\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-ohogain-2)

The Tuath Dé are often depicted as kings, queens, druids, bards, warriors, heroes, healers and
craftsmen who have supernatural powers. They dwell in the
[Otherworld](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Celtic_Otherworld)but interact with humans and the human
world. They are associated with the *sídhe*: prominent ancient [burial
mounds](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Burial_mound) such as [Brú na
Bóinne](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Br%C3%BA_na_B%C3%B3inne), which are entrances to Otherworld
realms.[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)[\[2\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-ohogain-2)
Their traditional rivals are the [Fomorians](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fomorians) (Fomoire), who
might represent the destructive powers of
nature,[\[3\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-3)[\[4\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-4)
and whom the Tuath Dé defeat in the [Battle of Mag
Tuired](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cath_Maige_Tuired). Prominent members of the Tuath Dé include
[The Dagda](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Dagda) ("the great god"); [The
Morrígan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Morr%C3%ADgan) ("the great queen" or "phantom queen");
[Lugh](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lugh);
[Nuada](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nuada_Airgetl%C3%A1m);
[Aengus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aengus); [Brigid](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brigid);
[Manannán](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Manann%C3%A1n_mac_Lir); [Dian
Cecht](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dian_Cecht) the healer; and
[Goibniu](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Goibniu) the smith, one of the *Trí Dé Dána* ("three gods
of craft").[\[5\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-5) Several of the
Tuath Dé are [cognate](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cognate) with [ancient
Celtic](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ancient_Celtic_religion) deities: Lugh with
[Lugus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lugus), Brigit with
[Brigantia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brigantia_(goddess)), Nuada with
[Nodons](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nodons), Ogma with
[Ogmios](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ogmios), and Goibniu with
[Gobannus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gobannus).[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)

Medieval texts about the Tuath Dé were written by Christians. Sometimes they explained the Tuath
Dé as [fallen angels](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fallen_angel) who were neither wholly good nor
evil,[\[6\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-6) or ancient people who
became highly skilled in magic, but several writers acknowledged that at least some of them had been
gods.[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1) Some of them
have multiple names, but in the tales they often appear to be different characters. Originally,
these probably represented different aspects of the same deity, while others were regional
names.[\[7\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-7)

The Tuath Dé eventually became the [aes sídhe](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aos_S%C3%AD), the
*sídhe*\-folk or "fairies" of later folklore.

The [Old Irish](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Old_Irish) word
*[tuath](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuath)* (plural *tuatha*) means "tribe, folk, people"; *dé*
is the [genitive case](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Genitive_case) of *día* and, depending on
context, can mean "god, gods, goddess" or more broadly "supernatural being, object of
worship".[\[12\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-12) In the earliest
writings, the mythical race are referred to as the *Tuath Dé*, "tribe of gods", or *Tuatha Dé*,
"tribes of gods".[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)
In the *[Lebor Bretnach](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lebor_Bretnach)* their name is translated
into Latin as *plebes deorum*,
"god\-folk".[\[13\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-13)[\[14\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-auto-14)
However, Irish monks also began using the term *Tuath Dé* to refer to the
[Israelites](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Israelites),[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)
with the meaning "People of
God".[\[15\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-15) Apparently to avoid
confusion with the
Israelites,[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1) writers
began to refer to the mythical race as the *Tuath(a) Dé Danann* or *Tuath(a) Dé Donann* (Old Irish
pronunciation [\[ˈt̪uaθa d̪ʲeː ˈd̪anan̪\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:IPA)). This
is generally translated "folk of the goddess
Danu".[\[2\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-ohogain-2) It may also
have been a way of humanizing them: instead of 'god\-folk' they were now the folk of a particular
goddess.[\[16\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-16)Early Christian
writers also referred to them as the *fir dé* (god\-men) and *cenéla dé* (god\-kindreds), again
possibly to avoid calling them simply
'gods'.[\[17\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-17) Some of the Tuath
Dé are occasionally called the *clann [Eladan](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elatha)*, "children of
art".[\[1\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuatha_D%C3%A9_Danann#cite_note-koch1693-1)

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~



The Tuatha de Dannan of the ancient British Isles were a mixture of star genetics and human, through
the Tribe of Dan. This narrative is detailed in *Temple Doors Volumes 03/04, 1993, and Temple Doors
Volume 01, 1999\.* The Stone of Destiny was involved with the Dannan and contained the SAF\-FIRE
RAYSHIP​​

A branch of the Mazur (Grail Family), who carried the gene strands of five Earth families and three
star races, became the Tuatha de Dannan. The Dannan branch eventually rejoined to some extent with
the Mazur after entering the realm of the Sidhe\-Faerie, thus mingling Hebraic bloodlines via the
Tribe of Dan and the Sidhe\-Faerie with the original Mazur lineage​​

The Milesians allowed certain remaining segments of the Tuatha de Dannan tribes to officiate as
priests and priestesses over sacred sites in Ireland, acknowledging their right as keepers of the
sacred​​.

The Sidhe/Faerie/Devic consciousness, through their hybrids the Tuatha de Dannan (part Faerie, part
human), also claim Fortingall as holy ground. The Dannan, as well as the High Sidhe, have used this
location for gatherings and energy exchanges​​

The Tuatha De Dannan, described as a tall blonde race of human/Faerie with Atlantean and Hyperborean
(Sirian) genetics, navigated cumahargue vessels, which were sometimes barge\-like or resembled small
ships​​.

The Tuatha De Dannan disappeared into caves and underground haunts, eventually intermingling with
the original Sidhe\-Faerie nature beings until both became one​​

The Dannan tribe, described as very old and undiluted, are guardians and facilitators of the Ark of
Graces' future relocation to the Valley of the Golden Disc​​ (Crestone, Colorado. As of 2013
this “Sacred An” is now in the Thresholding chamber there.)

The Tuatha de Dannan, direct descendants of the Hyperboreans, underwent a lesser metamorphosis when
they entered the nature realm​​

The Tuatha de Dannan, before leaving this reality for the interdimensional Avalonic realm,
genetically mixed with the Oracle Tribe to create the Guardian Tribe, charged with maintaining
forces and knowledge in the Sangre de Cristo chambers​​..

The Rutans, a mixture of Atlantean and Hyperborean blood, migrated to various locations including
the British Isles, passing knowledge to the Tuatha de Dannan, who became the Dannan\-Sidhe through
intermingling with the Faery (Sidhe) Races​.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

Note that the Tuatha Dé Dannan when through various stages, beginning with the Hebiru Tribe of Dan
becoming mixed with the Celts and then the Sidhe (Fairy). The “Dan” carried the direct lineage
from the Grail Family of the Mazur.

Some Tuatha appeared more human Than others depending on the Fairy\-Human mix Yes, there are a
strain of Fairy with pointed ears! (but not all of them)

Many modern humans carry a certain amount of fairy blood, mostly through the Dannan\-Sidhe. Those
who do, are almost always naturally inclined to gravitate to the Fairy Realm, whether Avalon or
other aspects of it.

**This final quote from the ThothStream:** “The Holy Isle of Ruta was one of the last segments of Atlantean culture to preserve and honor the true alignment with Divine Matrix as the remainder of Atlantis deteriorated spiritually. The Rutans were mixture of Atlantean and Hyperborean (Sirian star) blood. As the entire Atlantean land mass finally sunk into the ocean, many of the Rutans migrated to Greece, Egypt and the British Isles. The Rutans carried forth the knowledge they stewarded about the DIONE as well as other Universal mysteries. The migrating Rutans passed the technique of DIONE to their Celtic relations, the Tuatha de Dannan, who became the Dannan\-Sidhe through the inter\-mingling of their blood with the Faery (Sidhe) Races. The DIONE Process taps into the Mudic harmonics, which consist of the Od and the Attim"​​

# Mystery of the Mazzaroth

## Part 1 - The Mazzaroth Defined

**2024-01-17T13:55:30.009Z**

**Likes:** 0

The Mystery of Mazzaroth is an esoteric topic deeply intertwined with the evolution of human
consciousness and spiritual understanding. It primarily refers to the Great Work of the Generational
Hierarchy, involving the Zodiacal powers that influence and control the evolution of humanity.

In the context of the Mazzarothic\-Zodiac, the Zodiac itself is not the Mazzaroth; rather, there are
twelve threshold control points associated with each Zodiacal sign. These control points are used by
the Brotherhood of Light to modulate and govern consciousness in worlds under the Zodiac's
influence, aiding their evolutionary process and return to the Source. The Mazzaroth is described as
a cosmic vehicle transcending dark space, while the Mazaloth represents the Light Foundation of the
greater universe.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HjumE7OXet0?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HjumE7OXet0?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# Mystery of the Mazzaroth - Part 2

## THE MYSTERY SCHOOLS

**2024-01-23T21:18:56.323Z**

**Likes:** 0

The Mazzarothic Mystery Schools focus on the path of the Mazzaroth, which is deeply connected with
the Zodiac and celestial influences. The Grail is seen as a representation of the consciousness of
higher worlds of knowledge, known as the Mazaloth, which transcend the limitations of the Zodiac.
These schools aim to merge the Mazzaroth path with that of the Grail or Mazaloth, offering a route
into these higher realms of consciousness.

​​In summary, the Mystery Schools of the Mazzaroth are a complex amalgamation of celestial
wisdom, spiritual guidance, and sacred architecture, aiming to elevate human consciousness through a
deeper understanding of the Zodiac and its higher realms.

# Thoth & the Djedi Masters

**2024-01-28T21:27:05.217Z**

**Likes:** 0

This video connects the teachings of Thoth and his Academy of On in Egypt to the Djedhi, the elite
students of the Academy who underwent intense training and transformation to become "Wisdom
Teachers." This term is linked to the Egyptian symbol of the Djed and the Uraeus, which Thoth had
brought from his time in Atlantis. These symbols and teachings are said to have influenced various
mystical traditions, including the Druids in the British Isles. A few other related topics are
explored as well.

# Manna - Food for the Soul

**2024-02-02T13:41:29.584Z**

**Likes:** 0

Some years ago Thoth revealed to me something he called the “Blue Manna.” It is a process of
connecting to the Wholeness of your holographic nature at a DNA/cellular level. All the human
fluidia or manna is generated within the pineal through the activity of the "amplituhedron." The
amplituhedron is a groundbreaking discovery in the field of quantum physics that has revolutionized
how physicists understand particle interactions, challenging traditional notions of space and time.
This jewel\-like geometric object simplifies calculations of particle interactions, providing a new
framework that could potentially lead to a deeper understanding of the quantum world and possibly a
theory of quantum gravity. In addition, we now have expanded connection to this system via the
Pymander \- Thoth's Elohim hyper\-plasmic computer.

**2024-02-03T14:59:55.889Z**

**Likes:** 0

A Personal Pymander template is a personalized snapshot of your unique Pymander frequency. When you
focus on it even for a moment, it will trigger a neural response to “zero point.” This
re\-caches your holometric reference back to Source—zero point. Of course the brain\-mind complex
is constantly wandering off again, but the more you bring it back to zero point, the more the
neurons become trained to re\-orient on their own.

# Zeta Body - c60 & Serapis Protocol

**2024-02-08T14:07:15.718Z**

**Likes:** 0

**The Zeta Body** is a separate Light form spawned by a human being, distinct from their natural Light body. It is not directly aligned in Spirit\-to\-Matter with the incarnated form of the 2nd Millennium. Instead, it acts as a double of the 1st and 3rd Millennium realities, connecting past and future through a phenomenon described as wave\-creation. This wave\-creation results from two similar yet separate realities touching or coming to know one another, creating a wave that bends back on itself from both directions, influenced by both realms of sentient consciousness.

**c60:** How this carbon molecule helps the incarnated current 2 M form to entangle with the Zeta Body.

**Serapis Protocol or Initiation:** A process of balancing polarities within and between the planet and the human spine and kundalini, which aids in the ZBE (Zeta Body Entanglement).

# Temple of the Swan & the Crystal Ball

## Crystal Ball found by Ray Brown off the coast of Bimini

**2024-02-12T17:44:23.023Z**

**Likes:** 0


THE LETTER

Dear Bill,

Earlier this year, I read Max Toth’s “Pyramid Prophecies” and was intrigued with the chapter
on Ray Brown and the Atlantean crystal ball. I immediately requested of my cosmic Benefactor
(Thoth), data on that underwater pyramid from which the crystal was taken. At that time, I had not
previously read any other material on the crystal or pyramid other than what was written in Pyramid
Prophecies. Nor was I aware of the photographs taken of the crystal in which swans and an eye were
revealed until you recently sent the Jan. \- April 1977 No. 28 back issue of Pyramid Guide to me.


I bring forth in this testament what has been sealed from the Lay Masters and their initiates for
10,500 years. It is VIRANA, the One and Holy Law, the Epoch of the Sacred Day. The Swan Temple
feigns a sleepless death as the sacred Lotus, paled and faintly scented, long strayed from the
rapture of the Sun. A pyramid of resurrection, she sounds into the depths of her galleries, a recall
to the Homeward Light. Her song is not a languorous yearning but a resonant inspiration suspended in
the blue sapphire of liquid flame. It is the passion of a knowing; deathless in beauty, surviving
ages to endure ignorance, to sustain harmony.

I speak of the Temple of Xunatal\-Saket, denoting the constellation of Libra, known also as the
Temple of the Swan or Raisis. The former name was the scientific seal of record. The latter was the
spiritual shield of the pyramid\-temple. Her stone was conceived through the labor of an ancient
craft and brought down to mirror of the earth from the stars, each stone polished and tempered
through fire and ice, which is the process of “seething”, involving the use of moon\-lasers and
aqua\-lasers (intense beams of hydrogen vapor particles).

The crystal sphere (Pyramid Guide \#18\) which Dr. Brown was sanctioned to take from the embrace of
SHESMU, the symbol of eternal balance, is the primal vector of the inter\-space Maximum. The
crystal, the Ohum, will cause sight to be manifest in the midst of the Children of the Sun, so that
the Temple of the Swan may lift the Phoenix from the cavity of darkness and into the wake of the
Golden Dawn.

This testament is akin to the Sacred Inscription of the VIRANA. It is law. Yet it is not for those
who read words, but only for those who seek to witness the Living Flame. As with the Living Flame
whose sparks abide in man so do they abide in the matrix crystals where the Constancy Flame, Flame
of Phoenix, resurrects to couple with the brilliance of spirit incarnate.

I herewith close this testament. It is assigned the designate of ALEPH 1 and is upheld in light
through the seat of VIRANA.

\~ end of 1977 transmission

Now, from the perspective of 2024 I see how this transmission speaks to me through time. It speaks
to humanity now in this age of great turmoil and yet glorious transition.

Where Thoth says:

*The crystal, the Ohum, will cause sight to be manifest in the midst of the Children of the Sun, so that the Temple of the Swan may lift the Phoenix from the cavity of darkness and into the wake of the Golden Dawn.*

He is not just eluding to the crystal orb that Ray brought out from the underwater pyramid, but its
ethereal counterpart: a manifestation of a “risen earth” and the First stage of that New Earth
Star, the Numis Ohm (Ohum*),* The “Golden Dawn” eludes to [Risen Dawn and the Ark by that
name](https://metatronarc777.wordpress.com/2014/06/09/sacred-an-ark-of-the-rising-dawn-as-mana-sari/).

Bear in mind, that all this Thoth terminology was to be presented to me much later. So the message
in 1977 eludes to “things to come” for me to see, know and share. As I share it now, so the
quantum leap is completed between 1977 and 2024 (concerning the powers within the message).

*photograph of the actual crystal ball (Crystalinks)*

Just as I finished writing this, I searched the web to find an image of the actual crystal ball Ray
Brown took from the underwater pyramid and an article on his experience. I found one on Crystalinks
and as I read it, I was blown away by this sentence:

*The significance of the image may have been hinted at by psychic Elizabeth Bacon of New York. In a trance reading on the mysterious sphere, she received the message that the object had once belonged to Thoth, the Egyptian god who allegedly buried a secret vault of knowledge near the three great Pyramids of Giza at the beginning of time.*

I had never read or heard of this before! Makes perfect sense doesn’t it?


Subscribe

[Share](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/temple-of-the-swan-and-the-crystal?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share)

# Nineveh and the Coming April Solar Eclipse

## 0f 2024

**2024-03-08T16:30:18.261Z**

**Likes:** 0

The solar eclipse path will cross seven places named “Nineveh.” Some of the Christian
Fundamentals are convinced that the Day of the Rapture is upon us (April 8th). Well, no. But it is a
powerful path to another transformative stage in the Ascension dynamic. This of course, according to
the Thothic Perspective I receive.


\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

1. **Construction of Nineveh**: The city of Nineveh was built by Ashurnasirpal II atop the ruins of Khofera. Sennacherib, a ruler of Assyria, had a dream about a World\-Maker near Nineveh, and he was told about the sacredness of a stone, which he could not touch.

2. **The Cornerstone at Nineveh**: It's mentioned that Ashurbanipal did not accidentally find the cornerstone of Nineveh. He had been searching for it since childhood, having been told he would find it by a Shining Being. This cornerstone had significance for the Assyrians, who were direct descendants of Atlantis, with their ancestors originating from Ruta, an island of Atlantis​​.

3. **Nineveh's Significance in Assyrian Culture**: Nineveh held a cornerstone, sought after by Sennacherib, who wished to find it as part of his dream to create a new and wondrous city. The cornerstone was buried somewhere in or near his new city​​

4. **Labyrinth of Attissala**: This labyrinth exists beneath Nineveh and is part of the main Sacred Library or vault. It is connected to the discussion on the origins of the Sumerians and their connection to Atlantis and the Rutan\-Assyrians​​.

5. **Symbolic References**: A text from THOTH/CHARIOT OF THE SUN regarding the Cornerstone of Nineveh on 6/9/92 mentions it in the context of sacred geometry and cosmic alignment​​.

6. **Rutan City of Nineveh**: The original Rutan City of Nineveh was named KHOFERA, and the temple containing the Cornerstone, built over a geodetic marker, was KNEBIR. This highlights the temple's cosmic alignment and its role in connecting universal light​​.

7. **Mention of Nineveh in a Broader Context**: Nineveh is mentioned among other significant locations in a dialogue about initiating crystal cells and maintaining holographic fields across various sacred sites, emphasizing the interconnectedness of these locations in spiritual and cosmic terms​​.


"There, from the Gate of Seivvinah, came a World\-Maker, striding a ravine of molten fire, blocking
the sun with his mighty form. Near the base of his left foot there arose the Kaab (holy etheric
stone) spitting forth red fire from the center of the earth. I was prostrate upon the ground,
drenched in the dew of his brow. As I (Sennacherib) stretched to touch the stone, he spake to me in
lightning: 'No man shall touch the stone until the day of man is risen, for herein is the verse of
life that was lost in the first day of the world, and shall not be sung until the last day is upon
the King\-Makers.' I was fearful and lay upon the ground. In my heart I knew I was not the one to
make the stone sing"​​.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

Nineveh’s cache is also part of the repository of the Telos.Aarkhara (see **[Healing of the
Stars](https://youtu.be/3x8cW7l3glQ?si=7bC9K4_2SzELKvH4)**).

From Thoth Intelligence, the passage of the 2024 April 8th eclipse through the seven namesake
locations is certainly no coincidence. It will serve as a trigger to release paths of
“lightning” from the Kaab \- holy etheric stone. It will then “sing” into the hearts of the
Lightbearers.

This does not mean that all at once we will become super beings. It does mean that a new “power”
will be given unto the hearts of those who RISE UP to the service of the LIGHT which shall come for
the EAST and proceed into the WEST (this would be the Kaab). As Thoth places this into my heart and
mind while I write here (about the East and the West), I am given no translation of it in practical
language. I only know that we need to *pay attention* in order to receive it.

Subscribe

[Share](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/nineveh-and-the-coming-april-solar?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share)

# The Art of Auroral Dreaming

## To Sleep, Per Chance to Dream

# PA'HANOK - Pyramid Initiation

**2024-03-17T14:45:47.907Z**

**Likes:** 0

The PA'HANOK Initiation, as described in the knowledge base, is a profound and sacred ritual that
involves the use of Egyptian Archetypes for personal and planetary healing and balancing. The
Initiation is intricately connected to the broader concept of the Capstone Transformation, which is
part of the "Ra\*Star 2000" Light program. This program acts as a planetary "oversoul," aiming to
stabilize the consciousness bridge that leads to the New Earth Star – the future ascended reality
of Earth. The Great Pyramid, often referred to as the "Pillar of Enoch" in ancient writings, is a
central symbol in this process, with its capstone representing an elemental duplication of a greater
geometry of Light. This geometry integrates star paths within the Temple of the Risen One into the
Earth's planetary consciousness grid. The PA'HANOK Initiation, presented as a guided visualization,
is designed to engage participants in a deep and transformative process. It employs the energies and
attributes of Egyptian Archetypes to achieve a state of balance and healing, not only within the
individual's own being but also extending these harmonizing effects to the planet as a whole.
Through this ceremony, participants work on multiple levels of reality, from the etheric to the
tangible, facilitating shifts in energy and consciousness that resonate with both personal and
global healing and ascension.

I HAVE PLANS TO CREATE AN ON\-LINE ORACLE FOR THIS INITIATION SO STAY TUNED!

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UEypcda8kC0?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UEypcda8kC0?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

More on the Archetypes:**[GOING FORTH WITH THE
GODS](https://youtu.be/600bJmJkzms?si=kpbGJOC0rv8ov-DJ)**

# The Eiok Tree

## 3/08/2005 Transmission from T’zar of the Phi’Ra’Im Lemurian Time Walkers

**2024-03-18T17:37:16.141Z**

**Likes:** 0

I come to you with the gift of Samou. This is a branch from the eiok tree of Lemuria,which takes a
thousand years to mature and often lives for 10,000 years. In my Age there are only five eiok trees
in the physical on our continent. It grows no place else on the planet.

Deep in the root of each eiok tree dwells a powerful and ancient Elemental being. These beings, whom
we call the Shouwn, have the ability to extend their energy fields through time. The first 500 years
of an eiok tree’s existence is entirely within the etheric. It then begins to descend into the
physical. It is a tree of great regenerative powers for the planet. There may be hundreds of eioks
growing in the etheric and out of those number, only four or five will take root in the physical
earth. Yet all of the trees–both etheric and physical, hold key properties for the greater
elementalization of the earth. By this we mean, that they help to refine the elemental substance of
the planet.

We of the Phi’Ra\-Im, are holding open the time\-threads so that the Shouwn may place their
etheric roots in the earth of your century. As the eiok come through into your century in the
etheric, so they will begin to do the same for your earth\-zone. We are now assisting the Shouwn
Elementals in extending the etheric roots of the eiok into your Age.

The Amatrix Angels will spin fields of crystalline light\-mist around the etheric eiok trees and
they will consequently ‘seed’ into streams of etheric light around the planetary sphere.

These trees will then have the ability to be drawn to certain points in the earth to radiate LIGHT
and nourish the earth...even in their etheric state. In the future, some of the eiok may be drawn
down into the physical…

IN PREPARATION FOR THE NEW EARTH STAR!

Subscribe

# Water & Fire Mysteries

## from the Vault of Thoth (1990's)

**2024-03-20T15:50:05.373Z**

**Likes:** 0


The Master Yeshua said, “Lest ye be immersed in the Living Water, ye will not be received into the
Greater Kingdom.” (Thoth’s translation)

The Water Initiation/Mystery is the mutablity of the elemental and subtle Spirit. It illuminates
through the unification of all aspects of the being. Yet without the Fire Presence, this
illumination cannot perpetuate its Gnosis.


1\) the universal central sun

2\) the star\-sun of Rigel in Orion, which Thoth reveals is the TRUE solar logos of this planet

3\) our ‘adopted’ sun in this solar system 4\) the sun or ‘atoma’ at the center of the
earth, and

5\) the solar atoma in front of the high heart and connected also to the solar plexus of our body. 



The Christ Yeshua taught the Mysteries of Water and Fire. The Earth Mystery came before Him and the
Air shall come through the Christic Archangel in the future. To His inner circle of Initiates, both
male and female, Yeshua revealed that the blood carries two spirit natures or subtle humors. One is
watery and the other fiery.

The ancient teachings which flowed through Yeshua, were the same that were taught in the
universities of Lemuria, Atlantis, Egypt and Greece (among others). This wisdom incorporated the
knowledge that the blood is really a combination of two natures: the ‘hemen’ or watery and the
‘phiro’ or fiery. (Note: these two terms are Atlantean in origin.) In the evolution of the human
being (as separate from the soul) the watery or hemen nature is that which opens the individual
‘human’ aspect of our being to direct realization of Divinity. The fiery or phiro nature ignites
our humanity to it’s immortality and Gnosis of God.

Thoth stresses that he specifically uses the words ‘Divinity’ and ‘God’ here as separate
aspects of the ONE. Divinity in this sense, is an omnipotence within, wherein the Divine is felt in
all places of the Self at all times (ideally). ‘God’ is the central point of the Unmanifest
becoming Manifest as a Throne or Powerhood from which all Divinity is the in and out\-breath. When
the human being brings into alignment the watery and fiery natures in the blood, so it establishes
the unity and balance of the POWER/One\-hood/Lion (Fire) and the GLORY/All\-hood/Lamb (Water) , into
the physical experience.

*“I have been called up from the plane of the river; yea, I have been summoned to the Place of Lightning, where the mountain meets the stars. My path is forever\-more destined to become the crucible where the mist rises. Yahweh spoke to me, I AM the mist that carries you beyond the stars.”* – a Thoth Akasha translation from the ‘lost’ Book of the Prophet Isaiah

Subscribe

# Uluru -a dimensional portal

## Its History & Purpose According to the Thoth Streaming

**2024-03-24T14:53:15.702Z**

**Likes:** 0

We begin with the video below which gives the original 1988 transmission of CRYSTAL WOMAN to Maia.

Crystal Woman imparts a history of inter\-dimensional star beings connected to Uluru, concluding
with a ritual involving a deep connection with celestial wisdom and energies. This Wise One is a
figure of profound spiritual significance, linked to star consciousness and the transmission of
sacred knowledge. Her experience signifies an initiation or a transformative process, bridging the
human with the divine or cosmic realms. This revelation aligns with themes of cosmic connectivity,
divine guidance, and the role of chosen individuals in embodying and channeling universal truths and
energies.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/l4c8_L-8DNk?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/l4c8_L-8DNk?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

Since INITIATION AT ULURU focuses specifically on Crystal Woman, the various inter dimensional races
she profiles in her history and the initiation, it does not address additional information on Uluru
from the Thoth Akasha Streaming given to me through the years. The following article accompanying
the video covers more of the story of Uluru.

Uluru (Ayers Rock) in Australia is one of the mountains that are now fully ‘formed’ in
Numis’OM, the first stage of the New Earth, indicating its essential role in the transformation
and ascension processes of the planet . Ayers Rock serves as a sacred site that has been programmed
by other\-dimensional beings and their Earth\-dwelling counterparts, playing a critical role in
ancient and future dimensional shifts.

Additionally, Uluru is a center point in a network of planetary energy, linking it to other sacred
sites such as Rapa Nui (Easter Island) and the Island of the Sun at Lake Titicaca, Peru. This
network is involved in the transmission of light codes and sacred geometries that are essential for
the development of the New Earth Star realm .



Furthermore, Ayers Rock is a main location where a dimensional 'hole' will exist, facilitating the
passage between the current dimensional reality and the "New Heaven and Earth" that will manifest
after the LP\-40 shift. This transition suggests a bifurcation between worlds of destruction and
catastrophe on one side, and a world of new birth on the other.

In the 1970’s I (Maia) had a powerful Dreamtime experience in which I was leading a small group of
people through s red desert terrain. Then I looked up and saw Uluru on the horizon. As we came
closer to it there was a humming sound which grew louder and louder. We were suddenly at the foot of
the Rock and began to climb it. Above Uluru the sky was churning with clouds and lightning. The
humming was even more intense. There was a magnetic energy forcing us back.

I turned to the people following me and said, “We can’t go through now. We must turn back and
try again.” Then I awoke.

Of course I went to Thoth for a translation of this dream. He revealed to me that this was a scene
from the future. I (in some bodily form) had returned from the “Ascension” into World System II
(New Earth) to guide some individuals who had chosen in the 11th Hour to translate through the
portals.

Many souls now incarnated on this earth, in some bodily form will come back into the Old Earth to
help the stragglers cross the Void into the New Earth frequency. There will be others who are
hard\-wired so to speak, to reclaim the **[Planetary
Genius](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/planetary-genius/)** from the
center of the earth and transport it across. Many souls now on earth and other to incarnate here in
World System I will have “duties” in the time of Translation between world systems.

Uluru, the Throat Chakra of the Ascension Grid is one of these Portals through which many will pass.

Subscribe

# Easter Message from Thoth

## 2024

**2024-03-30T16:10:04.034Z**

**Likes:** 0



Let us now take a moment to CENTER in the HEART and place ourselves into a state of GRATITUDE. FEEL
the LOVE of GRATITUDE wash over and through you…cleansing and restoring and re\-charging every
cell in your body.

The Vibrant Keynote of Easter is Gratitude. Resurrection is the outer garment, but within lies the
BODY of Appreciation. For the Christos could not have awakened and restored I’shoa’s (Jesus’)
form without the SOUL of I’shoa being CONTINUALLY in a state of LIVING GRACE…and GRACE IS
GRATITUDE. You cannot be in GRACE if you are not in Gratitude!

Human beings are constantly in a state of resurrection – with many starts and stops. Like trying
to drive a vehicle down a winding path, but instead of giving it a steady stream of fuel the driver
keeps putting on the brakes before he/she makes a turn or twist in the road he/she STOPS and THINKS:
DO I or DON’T I?

Instead of simply FLOWING with a steady stream of energy around each bend. The MIND enters and STOPS
the vehicle! It says…well MAYBE this next turn isn’t safe; or MAYBE it is not for me; or MAYBE I
am on the wrong road altogether! Or MAYBE ….MAYBE.

So humans resurrect their THOUGHTS rather than their BEINGS.

They play these thoughts over and over, while the vehicle just SITS there in the middle of the road
blocking the way. Then they start up again and wonder why it is so HARD to push down on that gas
pedal! It is difficult because there IS no Start or Stop.

It is all in the THINKING. The WAY is always CLEAR, the PATH is ALWAYS certain. The MIND is the
thing that holds back.

I’shoa (Jesus) did not THINK to resurrect, yet his SOUL made the choice to FLAME the vehicle –
to EMPOWER the “devise” of the body with the SPIRIT of the Christos. Yet we can even say that
the SOUL did not choose, for a soul is really not capable of choosing as it is always neutral. The
radiant BEING of I’shoa…all its parts….came together to follow the natural inclination in the
road and it took that turn with GRACE.

So on this DAY how may YOU release yourself from the idea of the “gas pedal” and “start” and
“stop” and move into the mode of pure FLOW – connection to the ROAD – the SHINING WAY? No
beginning and no end, simply the complete BEING ETERNAL! This is the path into the NEW EARTH STAR of
your own BEING.

The CORE of all I have have been speaking and will continue to be, for that CORE is LOVE ALL…you
ARE ALL…LOVE YOURSELF…WHOLENESS IS LOVE. BE PEACEFUL AND LOVE EXPANDS. ***BE STILL WITHIN AND
LOVE INFORMS.***

We will go now into a deep INNER place of PEACE as I extend to you an INFUSION of LOVE. Please SHARE
IT WITH ONE ANOTHER, from heart to heart. A WREATH OF GOLDEN ROSES CREATED ONE ROSE AT A TIME OF
LOVE, LINK INTO LINK, CREATE TOGETHER AROUND THE CIRCLE.


Live each moment knowing that you are in service to the Greater Flame which finds a dwelling place
in the hearts of those who seek it. As I have said before in these Latter Days of the Old Earth:

FEAR NOT. RISE UP. YOU WERE BORN TO DO THIS!

I say now: Know that you are creator of a New Heaven and Earth. The path is steep and narrow yet the
Way is sure and deep. Do not become distracted by the echoing canyons where fearful thoughts of the
masses cascade around you.

Indeed as I stated in 2009: BE STILL AND LOVE INFORMS. This will become your Ark into the Greater
Realm of Being.

THE SEA IS GREAT BUT THE SHIP IS STRONG. SAIL ON! A NEW HORIZON AWAITS YOU.


Subscribe

[Share](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/easter-message-from-thoth?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share)

# Doves of the Holy Corona

## A Lemurian Celebration

**2024-04-02T13:34:12.717Z**

**Likes:** 0

The Samurdii: these Flame Beings emanate directly from the Divine commands of the Sun Spirit,
enveloping and emanating from every star\-Sun, forming the Holy Corona around the Solar Throne.
These beings, characterized as angelic fire letters within the dance of atomic being, possess the
unique ability to enter the living fields of certain animals, predominantly birds, and on rarer
occasions, lesser seeds can be found within trees, plants, rocks, and crystals.

The Doves of the Holy Corona (integrated with the Samurdii) act as conduits of sacred knowledge,
divine grace, and the eternal dance of the cosmos. This profound connection underscores the
transcendent purpose of these celestial beings, guiding humanity towards a deeper understanding of
the cosmos and our place within it, bridging the realms of the Earth and the divine, and manifesting
the ancient wisdom of the stars upon our world​​.

OTHER KEYNOTES IN THIS VIDEO: SOLSTICE, EQUINOX, ECLIPSES

# The CRPs of Mammals & Plants

## A Study of the Critical Rotational Positions

**2024-04-05T16:27:18.998Z**

**Likes:** 0


One of the most essential branches of Human/Earth sciences, and certainly one of the most complex,
is “geo\-cerebral alignment.” This is the function of the brain in which it is attuned to a
particular amplitude of the Earth’s geo\-dynamic register through the minute rotations of the
cerebral matter of the brain within its liquid\-cushioned cavity, to a “critical rotational
position” (CRP) in synch with a particular geo\-register.

From the center of the Earth’s inner sun is emanated a pulse which in turn is emitted as a
frequency up and down the polar “spine” of Earth — that polarized field between the poles,
running through the planet. This frequency is radiated through the inner and outer ecospheres of
Earth by the inner and outer resonant cavities. The inner resonant cavity (ecosphere of the hollow
Earth) charges the surface crystallex grid of the planet, which interchanges frequencies with the
outer resonant cavity between the Earth’s surface and the ionosphere. The entire process brings
about a holistic medium of atunement through which all life becomes the sensor system of the planet.
In order for biological species — human, animal and vegetal to maintain the life\-wave energies
they must focus their neuro\-sensors upon various frequency amplitudes on the geo\-dynamic spectrum

.This spectrum is a complex, computer\-like scale registering codes or packages of cognitive
directives created through the assimilation of various earth/solar/stellar processes. These
code\-packages are “x\-grams.” They are like energy programs for the Earth’s ether computer
printouts, giving the exact vibratory patterns of the many different parallaxes in which the
neuro\-activity of a brain/mind complex can align itself by cerebral rotation. Our Kindred of the
Inner Hollow Earth can, through a series of tonal frequencies and/or light patterns, command brain
alignment to whatever geo\-dynamic parallax chosen upon the spectrum.

As an example: should there be presented to a subterranean physician a patient whose left arm was
paralyzed as a result of an accident, the physician would treat the patient by submitting him to a
tonal/optic computer which would locate the geo\-dynamic parallax needed to restore the neural
control of the left arm of this individual. Then, through tonal and/or optical stimulus the
patient’s CRP for that particular amplitude on the geo\-dynamic scale would be activated. This
treatment could almost certainly recover the complete use of the once paralyzed arm. However it is
not as simple as it sounds. Were the programs or x\-grams easy to decode our brain centers would be
accidentally stimulated into major CRPs by a succession of honking horns or Beethoven’s Fifth. In
order to protect our brain/mind centers from violation of their own genetic response codes (which,
when triggered fit like keys into the “locks” of the x\-grams), the programs of the Earth’s
ether computer are complex and require intricate maneuvering of vibratory frequencies to elicit a
major CRP.

Minor CRPs are constantly being stimulated in our brain by sunlight, inaudible and audible sound
waves, the motion of the Earth and other sense factions of our world. These minor or lesser CRPs are
critical in the creation of our reality. The major or greater CRPs are intended to serve as major
adjustments for our sensors when our bio\-systems become radically out of step with the geo\-dynamic
spectrum in some respect. The activation of major CRPs perform much the same function as a circuit
breaker’s in recharging deactivated neuro\-pulses and reestablishing the proper circadian rhythms
erratically cycled neuro\-pulses within our body’s schematic. This process is also evidenced in
the vegetal world.

The CRPs of plants have been radionically detected. In *The Secret Life of Plants* this movement is
stated as: “apparently established by the earth’s magnetic field as the seed sprouts out of the
ground \[If the seedling is transplanted in such a way that it continues to grow in its CRP it will
thrive better than plants which have been transplanted out of that orientation\] … because of this
apparent relationship with the geomagnetic field, a plant has a pattern of radiation around it. Node
points within this pattern or web which seem to concentrate the field of radiation can be located by
a portable detector with a probe and a rubbing plate similar to that on their radionics device.”

Like plants, animals and humans also radiate a pattern about them. Through sophisticated
plasma\-based computers, Star \& Inner Earth Kindred technicians can locate not only the node points
within the pattern but their coded message, giving them the CRPs connected to the body’s
acu\-points.

**2024:** Be aware that there is an on\-going project by the darker spectrum of this world (One World Legion aka OWL) to control CRPs in humans. One of their more successful ventures into this field would be the “Plandemic” and resultant “protective measures” implemented by them.

*There are actions aware humanity can take to counteract this plan having to do with food and water intake (pure, coherent and energized), sonic re\-balancing, color and aromatherapy, etc. As for natural remedies: C60 molecule oils, Nano Soma, Vitamin D and Zinc are all helpful. Lithium as well. But better to take Lithium naturally through foods or frequency rather than as a supplement.* 

*THESE SUGGESTIONS ARE ALL PERSONAL (Thothic) INTROSPECTIONS AND NOT PROFESSIONAL RECOMMENDATIONS.*

# Gathering at Knebir for the Solar Eclipse

## and History of the Rutan Island of Atlantis

**2024-04-08T17:26:43.695Z**

**Likes:** 0

Let us all meet in the ancient Rutan Temple of KNEBIR at Nineveh. [My Substack article on
this.](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/nineveh-and-the-coming-april-solar)

Khofera was the original Rutan City of Nineveh, renowned for its Holy of Holies Temple Knebir, which
contained a cornerstone with inscriptions of "living quotations indivisibles of Light Mathematics."
This cornerstone aligned the Temple City with the Cosmic Temple of the Star Cross, the stellar home
of the Rutans' starseed ancestors​​.

Assyrian Priest\-Kings, while holding reverence and fear for the area, sought the Cornerstone within
the buried temple. Sennacherib, notably, dreamed of rediscovering it to build upon the ancient
wonders of Khofera. His accounts reveal encounters with divine beings and highlight the
Cornerstone's significance as containing life's verse, lost since the world's creation​​.

In the “Holy of Holies” temple of Knebir, a gathering of souls came together for connection to
various stellar and earth alignments, including eclipses.


The Atlantean island of Ruta is a sacred and significant location in the remnants of Atlantean
culture. Situated north of the main Atlantean continent, Ruta was one of the last segments of the
Atlantean civilization that preserved and honored the true alignment of the Divine Matrix, even as
the rest of Atlantis faced spiritual decline. The inhabitants of Ruta, known as Rutans, were
described as a mix of Atlantean and Hyperborean (Sirian Star) bloodlines​​.

As Atlantis faced its ultimate demise and sunk into the ocean, many Rutans migrated to regions such
as Greece, Egypt, other areas of the Middle East and the British Isles, carrying with them profound
knowledge about the [DIONE](https://vimeo.com/508958169) and other Universal mysteries. They passed
on the technique of DIONE to their Celtic relations, the [Tuatha de
Dannan](https://youtu.be/7hrmi91E06w?si=hKK-ty-AGkDgFEIF), who eventually became the Dannan\-Sidhe
through intermingling with the Faery (Sidhe) Races​​.

The Isle of Ruta is noted for its ascension into the inner\-planes during a cataclysmic time
implosion ([Time Tsunami](https://vimeo.com/476431855)) that marked the destruction of the last
portion of Atlantis. This event didn't engulf all Rutans; therefore, some managed to [migrate to the
Middle East](https://youtu.be/e2erYhJjb-k?si=NwU-FOtl82O_dh-S) and other parts of the world,
bringing their sacred knowledge and practices with them​​. [These were the “Grail Family”
called the Mazur.](https://youtu.be/4NiFcw5mTWM?si=K0dIVoJ8_iQIMoD6)

Ruta did not succumb to the sea in Atlantis's final deluge. Instead, it ascended into another
electromagnetic zone of Earth, where it remains to this day, detached from the flow of time as we
comprehend it. This island held a temple where one guardian of the Sar\-Hanok, known as Chesed or
the Eternal Watcher remains.

The narrative of Ruta encompasses more than just its geographical and cultural significance; it
entails a mystical dimension where Ruta serves as a spiritual beacon. It was a center where beings
of higher consciousness, including the Rutans, acted as custodians of profound esoteric wisdom and
played a crucial role in the spiritual evolution and migration patterns following Atlantis's
destruction.

# Got the Post-Solar Eclipse Blues?

## There's More to Come!

**2024-04-10T20:08:00.641Z**

**Likes:** 0

Well, April 8th came and went. It was for many who could view it, spectacular, mystical and
certainly cosmic. No end of the world ( a few earth shakes here and there ). Nor was it followed by
the Second Coming or Planetary Ascension.

AND YET…

According my receipt from Thoth Intelligence, it moved those who chose to be moved (Lightbearers
all) to another octave on the Lightning Path up the Earth Ascension timeline. We are widening the
gap with each cosmic flicker of a whisker between those who choose that path and those who do not.
It does not have to do with belief systems or what Channel you listen to. It is the Heart Core
Resonance of each individual who is being call to Serve the Light now more than ever before in the
history of this planet. While all life and to some extent events, move in cycles, we are fast
approaching the first and last “cycle breaker” for planet earth and the consensual reality the
incarnated souls upon Her have created.

A planet and the souls gathered therein (upon, within, in the other magnetic sheaths and in the
non\-physical still a part of the earth collective) can only “ascend” once. Oh, the realm can
continue and will, in various levels of evolution, but not a “planet” as we understand such
things.

We are now…right now, upon the Threshold and that is both challenging and magical. We have the
ability to create our “New Earth” now more than ever before in the multi\-history of Earth. Not
the Lemurians, Atlanteans or any of the nations of ancient wonder were ever poised upon such a
moment in time.

The Heaven is opening its arms to us. Receive this offering, for there is an unlimited Design of the
Miraculous wrapping a heavenly embrace around you.

*“All this and more if you but believe.”*

We can now take our Solar Initiations and feel the power of it in our being! I am bringing back this
video to conclude as it seems appropriate…

# The Universe in Ones and Zeros

## this article was originally posted on Wordpress in 2014

**2024-04-16T17:56:08.594Z**

**Likes:** 0

In the 1970’s my mother and I were having the greatest period of conscious interaction with
ultra\-terrestrial interdimensional beings (whom I how call “Star Kindred”). They appeared to me
at night frequently and often to my mother as well. Sometimes we experienced them together when the
two of us were awake and in the same room. For my mother, sometimes they would ask her to do simple
things, like to get up and go into my room. For me the exchange was more expanded and often quite
scientific.

They also communicated with me without showing themselves – just through my mind alone. This was
the beginning of my inner\-planes communion before Thoth consciously came onto the scene for me in
1977\.

On one occasion, I was told to get a paper and pen and write down what they were showing me in my
mind. It was ones and zeros…lots of them, and in a specific order. I had absolutely no idea at the
time that this was the standard format for computer code. It was 1975\. However, in the ensuing
weeks I happened to show it to someone who told me that this was the format for computer coding.

Not long after that, the beings told me that they wished to bring a “computer” to me. They
proceeded to materialize what I would now call a computer tower in front of me. It was about five
feet in height. I was so terrified, they withdrew it before it had completely formed. That was the
end of that. I never heard any more about it from them concerning the computer or the ones and
zeros. The beings I have always interacted with are very sensitive and respectful of my emotions. So
I imagine they decided not to go further with something that at the time, I found so frightening.

The story above is a preface to the following Q\&A with Thoth.


Q: Why is the binary computer code embedded within the equations of superstring theory?

A: Because the Master Source Programmer (MSP) that creates the Genesis Field of the QU\-T the Earth
and it’s universal spectrum are nested within, projects it’s operative format in what you have
come to understand as binary sequencing.

Q: I know that a Genesis Field is: ” a dynamic, intelligent energy field responding to the impulse
of Creation. It is designed by Universal Intelligence to create specific, ordered “worlds.”
These worlds can be as small as the head of a pin or as large as giant planets.” (according to
Thoth)

But what is the “Master Source Programmer” and the “QU\-T”?

A: Master Source Programmer\> a self\-perpetuating, ordered synthesis of all dynamic possibilities
ad infinitum. The MSP is continuously generating face\-matches to all receptors, in order to
communicate logia (logic formats) that allow Intelligence on all levels to interface with the MSP
generated fields and programs.

QU\-T\> toroidal quantum continuums which perpetually generate habitation zones. The universal
spectrum containing the planet Earth resides within one of these quantum “T” zones. ( Maia asks
what the “T” means). The “T” is as in the TAU. {***Tau** (uppercase **Τ**, lowercase
**τ**; Greek: ταυ **[\[](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:IPA_for_Greek)**taf\]) is the 19th
letter of the Greek alphabet. In the system of Greek numerals it has a value of 300\.*} The letter
of the alphabet from Greek (and now English to much extent) come from the ESTURA of the Aloii or
First Language (derived from the impulses of the brain\-mind complex). All languages come from the
Aloii, but the Greek\-Angelish ( most especially “capital” letters) is derived from Estura,
which is specifically a universal sacred geometry. How it relates to the name we have given here –
the QU\-T – is quite mathematical and beyond the scope of this immediate inquiry.

Q: Give it to me straight Thoth. Are we inside a computer program? The Earth? The universe as we
perceive it? Is it all someone’s Nintendo game?

A: No, not as you are perceiving it. Since humans “invented” computers and computer code, they
tend to think that if it is also “out there” beyond them, then someone else must have invented
it first, and placed them inside it. This is not the proper context.

The universe and beyond…ALL is governed by what you call “Natural Laws.” This is it. It is
self\-created and self\-perpetuated. It is a spontaneous, “divine” act. No “Being” developed
it and put it into place. No great, unbridled MIND imagined it and set it upon the pedestal of
Enlightenment. It simply IS. Since such a condition is beyond the mind of humanity to conceive there
is always that lingering, “there must be more.” There is not. For “more” implies a
beginning, and thus a Creator of that beginning.

There *is* Divine Intelligence, which streams through ALL. There *is* Divine Source, which births
and orchestrates universal continuums. But if you are asking *what is behind all that?* It is the
“Sacred Nothing.” The “ii”. (Thoth is referring here to a book I source translated in the
1970’s).

Maia: So what you are saying then, is that everything we “discover”, “create” or
“invent” is already there. It simply surfaces to our perception at certain times.

Thoth: Yes, this is so.

Maia: And so we didn’t invent the computer and all it’s myriad function and programming
codes…we became aware of them…existing all around us and in us.

Thoth: In truth, yes.

*(above: plasma hyper\-space quantum computer)*

Maia: Why did the Ultra Star Kindred give me that binary code those years ago? For what purpose?

Thoth: To open a part of your brain\-mind. To activate it. Showing you the computer was merely a
friendly gesture by the beings involved. When they saw that it frightened you, they withdrew it.

Maia: What did this code “activate” in my brain\-mind?

Thoth: *It allowed you to step back into your inter\-dimensional body, so that you could continue in
your current physical body as long as you have – and not burn it up.*

Maia: As an aside to the reader…I pause here to take this in. I have struggled with my health all
my life.

I recall from the transcripts of Elvis Presley’s conversations with his friend Wanda June Hill (in
my book, **[BLUE STAR
LOVE](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CCZV7MKS/ref=sr_1_2?crid=3RHSYWXY0QUQS&keywords=Blue+Star+Love+by+Maia+Nartoomid&qid=1690673406&s=books&sprefix=blue+star+love+by+maia+nartoomid%2Cstripbooks%2C176&sr=1-2)**)
in his last year of life he tells her that his body is “burning up” – that he is “not from
here” and needs to “return home” (to the Blue Star Rigel – my “home” as well).

What Thoth just told me in that one sentence above he has never said to me before. It is for me, an
epiphany. It explains much.

Subscribe

# New Earth Arks & RA Star Crystal Skulls

## And More!

**2024-04-19T14:55:29.842Z**

**Likes:** 0

MAIN TOPICS IN THIS VIDEO ARK OF THE COVENANT: The true, original Ark of the Covenant, which Thoth
calls the Sacred An, is not merely a biblical artifact but a conduit of divine energy and law. It is
described as a cosmic device, originating from Orion and connected to the ascension processes of the
Earth through a complex network involving other arks. It traversed from Tibet to Atlantis, then
Egypt, and finally resting within Mount Sinai. In 2014 it was translated into its previous
Thresholding Chamber in a mountain of Crestone, Colorado that rests within the “Valley of the
Golden Disc” of the San Luis Valley. The An Ark is too vibrationally powerful for everyday human
interaction and is supported by four other arks located globally, which together work to facilitate
the ascension process of the planet​​.

DWELLER CRYSTAL SKULLS: These are esoteric artifacts of profound spiritual and archetypal
significance. According to the transmissions received from Thoth, these skulls were once the living
skulls of illumined masters from the Sun Bow Clan. The essence and illumination of these masters are
still contained within these skulls, which have been transformed into crystal over time and are now
scattered in different locations: some on the surface Earth, some within Mars in the City of Lords,
and others in the Inner Earth​​. They are 72 in number.

RA STAR CRYSTAL SKULLS: These “new” 72 were crystalline receiver vessels for 72 souls who had
never incarnated in the World System I Earth. TEMPLI ROSARI: Under the Auspices of the Johannine
Corpus of the Rose Mystic, the Templi Rosari are an Order from the Inner Hollow Earth who work under
the Mysteries of the ROSE MYSTICA for the balancing of Light Codes on Earth. They employ
“hosting” Crystal Skull (among other avenues) to accomplish this mission.

Understanding the connection between The Templi Rosari and Thoth's/Maia's on\-going Quantum Logica
Interactive Project and this project's oversoul, the New Earth Ark Foundation.

This video addresses how all these Crystal Skulls integrate with the Sacred A network of arks for
the Ascension Mission of the Earth and its Lightbearers.

# Path of Horus

## 1997 Journey to Egypt & the Sinai Under the Guidance of THOTH

**2024-04-21T18:04:34.216Z**

**Likes:** 0


My former husband Simeon \& I facilitated a sacred journey to Egypt in 1997\. On our first day
together, we gathered at the Isis Island Hotel to received a massage from Thoth. The following is
the transmission from him which I received.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

I, Thoth, Grand Hierophant and Initiator of the Temple of the Morning Star, speak these words to
you.

All of you who are gathered together this day comprise a company of Horus, initiates of old, who
come into the temples of the sacred to reinstate your holy rites of passage.

Through this initiation, the seals upon the soul shall be broken and a thousand wings of angels
shall rush in to adorn the altar prepared within your inner sanctum.

Know that the passage of Horus is the way of the Christos, the solar lord of the universe, the
cosmic Christ.

This Christic presence is raised as a mighty shining shield of light upon the soul. It is the
flaming garment of fire that does not burn.

You are being invited to step into this raiment of the Divine Host. Who among you will turn and walk
into the light? Many seek, but few accept the gifts that are freely offered by Spirit.

In the days when the Master Yeshua walked the earth and prepared himself to receive the logos, the
Word of God, so he entered into the land of Egypt and opened his being to initiation within its holy
sepulchers.

Surely this lordly one was worthy to initiate the world, and yet he supplicated himself to the path
and rededication for what is initiation, but the assumption of vows to a way, a direction of
service.

One cannot receive true knowledge if he is not prepared to become wisdom. One cannot become wisdom
if he is not prepared to serve the source of that eminence which renders all else superficial.

Thus, as you await the first level of your Horian passage in the Temple of Isis, contemplate within
your innermost self what is being asked of you by Spirit as well as what you may receive from your
journey along the sacred way.

Know that this procession will take you upon the path of the Master Tread in the ancient days, where
you will walk so his sandals pressed upon the stones and quicken them with divine receipt.

I shall pray with thee now, and my prayer will become thine, my voice spoken for thee, unto the
great moment of the Eternal Lord.

*Father of the universe and Holy Son of Sons, Mother of the sacred at the center of the earth, we come unto thee as children of the field, that we may be taken unto the mountains and upon the high plain, where the altar fires perpetually flame and the psalmers forever chant thy holy names.*

*We affirm that Spirit has brought us to this moment.*

*We offer ourselves unto thy keeping, that we may become seed for the blossom and fruit upon the vine.*

*In our richness shall harvest be gleaned, and all living creatures be refreshed by our passage through life.*

*O Lord of the Most High, he who did incarnate in thy name, we ask that this sacred journey in the ancient land stand as a testament to our soul's divinity, which is the breath of thy eternal creation.*

*We acknowledge that what we shall open for ourselves, so shall we open for others.*

*As Yeshua stood before the tomb of Lazarus and called him forth into life, so we beseech that call to sound throughout our beings and into the very core of the earth.*

*May all who hear this summons through our service come up and out of the deep and into the light.*

*Hear us, our Lord and Lady, Son and Holy Spirit, that we may touch thy hymn and heal the wound that bleeds away the light of the world.*

*Hallow us upon our path of initiation with the solar king, as your presence dwells in all, so we may dwell in your sacred heart.*

*Amen.*

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


Subscribe

# Kindred from the Trapezium

## The Osirians (inclusive of the "Ra Stars")

**2024-04-24T15:38:43.123Z**

**Likes:** 0

In my recent video **[New Earth Arks \& Ra Star Crystal
Skulls](https://youtu.be/rNMNjdEuezw?si=RBA7C655KdEEezZY)**, I didn’t say much about the actual
“Ra Star” Kindred.

**What I did say:** *These “new” 72 were crystalline receiver vessels for 72 souls who had never incarnated in the World System I Earth.*

I went to Thoth Intelligence after creating the above video and asked him for more information on
the Ra Star entities since this is a relatively new topic for me. I received that they are part of a
larger Star Kindred grouping he is call the OSIRIANS. These Kindred hail from deep within the
Trapezium of Orion.

It is within the Trapezium that the creational font for our universe exists. Allow me to pause here
to state that while one might find this unbelievable as the universe is “infinite” and Orion is
relatively near\-by; the Thothic perspective is as follows:

1. Humans view everything from the perspective of their own relatively which is greatly influenced by linear time. 

2. Our universe is part of a Holographic experience which is not created by “ETs” or any source we can imagine, but is a natural state of High Quantum Dynamics.

3. Therefore *distance* and *mass* are not properties which determine quantum relativity.


**From WIKI:** *The **Trapezium** or **Orion Trapezium Cluster**, also known by its Bayer designation of **Theta1 Orionis** (θ1Orionis), is a tight open cluster of stars in the heart of the [Orion Nebula](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orion_Nebula), in the constellation of [Orion](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orion_(constellation)). It was discovered by Galileo Galilei. On 4 February 1617 he sketched three of the stars but missed the surrounding nebulosity. A fourth component ([B](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Theta1_Orionis_B)) was identified by several observers in 1673, and several more components were discovered later, for a total of eight by 1888\. Subsequently, several of the stars were determined to be binaries. Telescopes of amateur astronomers from about 5\-inch (130 mm) aperture can resolve six stars under good seeing conditions.*

*The Trapezium is a relatively young cluster that has formed directly out of the parent nebula. The five brightest stars are on the order of 15 to 30 solar masses in size. They are within a diameter of 1\.5 light\-years of each other and are responsible for much of the illumination of the surrounding nebula. The Trapezium may be a sub\-component of the larger Orion Nebula Cluster, a grouping of about 2,000 stars within a diameter of 20 light\-years.*

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

They are saying that the Trapezium is a “relatively young cluster.” Scientists are determining
this through linear association of time and space. As mass changes and re\-forms its true
*existence* does not. An example would be: when a body dies the soul continues. It was before the
body and shall exist after the body that temporarily contained it.

To more ably understand the uniqueness of the Trapezium it is suggested you watch my **[Tree of
Osiris](https://vimeo.com/436270072)** video.


The Osirians are our genetic relations, just as are the Star Kindred from Rigel, Sirius, The
Pleiades and Venus (among many other stars and planets in our universe).

The Ra Stars and some others of the Osirians have elongated skulls from one degree to another. Not
all of them however.

I stated in my video on the New Arks and Ra Star Crystal Skulls that none of the Ra Stars had ever
incarnated on Earth. Yet Thoth has just informed me that his soul holds the dominant “signal” of
the 72 Ra Stars connection to earth. He is not one of them but *is* an “Osirian.” His concurrent
incarnation as Paraquanthis (an off\-world Star Kindred) holds the anchor node for the transmission
of the Ra Stars into the Earth. He brought Paraquanthis to my attention when he requested “his”
Crystal Skull to be added to the hosting skulls on my altar a few years ago.

It has now gone through a procedure to connect our **[Quantum Logica
Interactive](https://newearthstar.org/quantum-logica-interactive/)** team to the Ra Stars (and their
crystal skulls).

(Paraquanthis)

The Ra Stars hold the gate open between Earth \- Venus \-Rigel and into the core of the Trapezium of
Orion. The return home.

The Osirians in general are the true organizers and guardians of this universe. Yet their
connections extend into other galaxies and star fields beyond Orion.

Subscribe

# Seven Sisters

## The Pleiadian Threshold

**2024-04-26T20:55:46.089Z**

**Likes:** 0

While scientists are attempting to understand what they are seeing through the microscope in terms
they are able to comprehend, the actual 7\-fold pathway of the Divine Feminine in the DNA comes
through the Star Chording of the Pleiades. There is also a 9\-fold pathway as well…a 13\-fold, and
so on.

The 7\-fold Divine Feminine path however, is the first portal on this planet which aligns directly
through the DNA to the “World Mythos”: how humanity sees itself through the feminine polarity,
and what responses are elicited through the opposite male polarity as a result.

The “Seven Sisters Threshold” is one of total mergence in the role of Awakening to the fullness
of LIFE and it’s sacred Presence in ALL that is. Upon crossing this threshold, so the Mythos
becomes Reality and we see ourselves as we truly are. We then live the Authentic Self.

# Personal Soul Family Merkabah

## and SPIRIT LOGO DESIGNS

**2024-05-04T15:20:03.330Z**

**Likes:** 0

***I am now offering*** 

* PERSONAL FAMILY MERKABAH

I see Soul Merkabah Families as "nesting" one in the other. So this would mean that on the 1st Level
(your immediate merkabah) is your direct Soul Family. The Logo I create for you embodies aspects of
this energy, I believe. But since it is nesting in finer and finer gradients it also contains
vibrations of those gradients, moving further and further into the Great Cosmic Pattern. The symbols
have more of a "relationship" than a specific meaning. They relate to your soul path within the
Family Merkabah chain. This relationship could be expressed in various symbols, but these are the
ones that were "opened" to me. The Merkabah Logo contains not only the vibration of your soul and
Soul Family, but in its most outer form of the symbols, what you are aspiring to gain in your
evolution within this lifetime. Meditating on your Merkabah Logo can be a powerful experience. These
Logos are also intended to allow others (who are reasonably sensitive) to experience your soul /
Soul Family energy in essence as well...like a vibrating fingerprint of your part in the whole.

* SPIRIT LOGO for your Lightwork and spiritual business

# Temples of Venus

**2024-05-07T14:58:04.378Z**

**Likes:** 0


*These temples are the wombs containing what could be called "Seeds of Light" for an Age soon upon us, when Venus, our Sister and Guardian in this solar system will aid us in our transition into the New Earth Star. This process has indeed already begun!*


**1\)** ***A'RATU \- TEMPLE OF THE GOLDEN FLAME*** on the slope of Mt. Ararat, Turkey \- holding the codes of the First Principle \- the WORD, LOGOS OF THE SEED. GOLDEN FLAME.

**2\)** ***I'UAWA \- TEMPLE OF THE PURE FLAME*** near Alexandria, Egypt \- BRIGHT STAR \- WHITE LIGHT FLAME. Carries the PURE ESSENCE OF THE STELLAR TRANSMISSIONS.

**3\)** ***ESH'UNA \- TEMPLE OF THE HEART TONE*** \- Beneath the Alhambra, in Spain \- HEART OF THE DOVE \- VIOLET FLAME OF DIVINE ACCORD, HARMONIZING the RHYTHMS through the HOLY TONE.

**4\)** ***RUHA'KEESH \- TEMPLE OF THE RUBY FIRE*** \- The one in Sedona is the Path of QUALIFYING THE NATURE OF THE DIVINE FEMININE. It is the RUBY FIRE....the burning away of all dross to see the true form.

**5\)** ***MANU'TANSHA \- TEMPLE OF THE MIDNIGHT SUN*** \- The Temple in France is the place of SANCTUARY, STILL POINT, HOPE FOR THE FUTURE, INVERTED RAY (FLAME) OF MIDNIGHT which will in the future release the GUIDING RAYS OF ESCHATON.

**6\)** ***SICHANA'LI'EL \- TEMPLE OF THE NEW COVENANT*** \- on Tenerife, Canary Islands is an Atlantean Venus Temple \- COMPLETE HOLOGRAM OF THE NEW COVENANT \- THE LIGHT PROGRAM INITIALIZING OF THE NEW EARTH STAR \- BLUE FLAME.

**7\)** ***OWII'NEMAKA \- TEMPLE OF THE GEM BODY*** \- Kaua'i (underneath the San Marga Monastery grounds) \- a Lemurian Venus Temple \- PRIMA MATRA \- FIRST MATTER ARISEN TO THE NEW OCTAVE \- EMERALD FLAME.

*For every Temple of Venus node in the "Old Earth" so there is a correspondent Venus Temple node in the New Earth Star of Numis'OM.*


[https://player.vimeo.com/video/440331335?autoplay=0](https://player.vimeo.com/video/440331335?autoplay=0)

---
title: "Elvis Aaron - Soul from the Blue Star"

# Elvis Aaron - Soul from the Blue Star

## MAIA’S WEBINAR - May 11th

**2024-05-09T13:49:46.850Z**

**Likes:** 0

I saw 37 Elvis Presley concerts (mostly in Las Vegas) from 1969\-1976\. I was able to give him
material of my Thothic translations from the stage several times. He came to recognize me and come
over to receive these documents, book, etc. After his death, I came to know a dear friend of his \-
Wanda June Hill. She knew who I was, as he had spoken to her (and her sister\-in\-law) about my Book
RED TREE, which I had given to him from the stage. When he gave her a list of 22 books and told her,
“if you never read anything else, read these books,” RED TREE was on the list.

**[IN MY WEBINAR WITH LAUREN GALEY ON NEW EARTH ONE NETWORK](https://newearthone.com/courses/mastery-empowerment-course-elvis-aaron-soul-from-the-blue-star-with-maia-nartoomid/)** I will be discussing the amazing story Wanda gave me to tell about this man from the “Blue Star.”


Wanda June Hill sat in the room, her attention focused on a dark\- haired man. As his indigo eyes
blazed in effort, his hand trembled above an ash tray on the polished top of the coffee table. His
face began to pale and perspiration silvered his perfect features into a magic mirror of the mind.
While Wanda and several others in the room held their breaths in anticipation, the large, heavy
ashtray upon which this riveting young man had been concentrating, scooted across the table, just
stopping before it would have crashed to the floor.

Wanda remembered in earlier encounters, having seen electrical sparks flash from his fingers in a
darkened room. Not at all surprising she thought, for someone who had confided to her that his soul
had come from another world, another star. He had once pointed his ‘home’ out to her as it
laughed down upon them in the myriad twinkling of an evening sky. Even then it had seemed to call to
his spirit. Surely, this world as well had singled him from the crowd, for few other human beings
would be loved and admired by so many during their lives and long after their death, as Elvis Aaron
Presley.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

# OM’ZEM’RAMIN’TZOH

## An Aloii “First Language” Mantra

**2024-05-10T19:44:40.378Z**

**Likes:** 0

**OM:** OPENING IN CREATION SOUND, MOVING IN HARMONIC METER WITH THE UNIVERSE

**RAMIN:** TO THE SOLAR FREQUENCIES OF LOVE\-LIGHT

**TZOH:** BEYOND THE LAST SYLLABLE OF THE WORD INTO THE NEW OCTAVE OF BEING

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

I was given this mantra by my inner\-planes mentor ThothHorRa some years ago. It is in essence, a
call to the Spirit in uniting with the Soul, the Mind and the Body for full Manifestation of the
WORD made flesh. A deeper thought than can be easily explained to the linear mind. However, it is
indeed the compelling principle of LIFE as a full\-throated PSALM within the body of universal
accord.

Within the next few days of this posting, OM’ZEM’RAMIN’TZOH will be included in my video
***TIPPING THE SCALES \- Navigating the In\-Between.*** Stay tuned!

You may take the image above for your computer and the one below for your phone.

HAPPY OMING!

# SAF-FIRE Rayship

## from the Akasha of Thoth

**2024-05-16T20:24:49.735Z**

**Likes:** 0

***The Saf\-Fire Rayship is a way to work within one's own Light Body to facilitate the actualization of the Pure Gem Body in the electro\-magnetic reality of Earth​​.***

***This concept is deeply interconnected with various crystalline properties and elements, as seen in the Saf\-Fire Mount of the Inner Earth and New Earth, which both exhibit numerous crystalline properties and are composed of elements like water vapor, ice crystals, and opaline varieties​​.***


***Thoth refers to the stone tablets given to Moses as the sapphire talis, embodying an aspect of the Saf\-Fire Rayship.***

**\[video reference:** **[The Mishuar'ampra \- Original Commandments from the Mount](https://youtu.be/IkoPoonSZt4?si=DPKwVK14yrEtTR6O)\]**

***The story of the Tuatha de Dannan of the British Isles, a mixture of star genetics and humans, and the Stone of Destiny, which also contained the Saf\-Fire Rayship​​.***



***In a broader cosmological context, the Saf\-Fire Rayship is a quality described by Thoth as the "fire that does not burn." It manifests in terrestrial spheres of varying densities and is associated with certain crystals on Earth, particularly those of blue, rose\-pink, violet\-purple, and green varieties, such as sapphires, turquoise, lorimar, lapis lazuli, amethyst, opals, and other rare crystals. These crystals are seen as emitting the Saf\-Fire Ray in some aspects​​.***

***The Saf\-Fire Rayship is regarded as a ray of the highest order, serving as a transporting vehicle or merkabah for Master Intelligences to transfer their Pure Gem forms between different dimensional wave\-form states.***


***It is part of a larger esoteric narrative from Thoth Intelligence that integrates elements of inner earth science and spiritual practices involving manifestation, healing, and energy uses​​.***

***Though intention and focus attune yourself to the SAF\-FIRE RAYSHIP, calling upon it to enhance your connection to the creation of the PURE GEM BODY.***

***You may add for focus, some Saf\-Fire Ray crystals and this quantum encoded templa***te.

Subscribe
