# Children of the Rainbow

## article originally written by Maia in 2004

**2024-05-20T21:29:52.837Z**

**Likes:** 0


A marvelous book! In it, Mr. Melville opens the door to the translations of the ancient chants from
the ancient Hawaiian perspective, which understandably differs from the missionary Christian
view\-point of previous semi\-translations, which the missionaries considered to be heathen
superstitions. Nor could the missionaries really understand the Hawaiian language all that well.
They were given “crash courses” in order to be able to basically communicate one thing to the
people of Hawai’i, and that was their Christian beliefs.

To begin with, Melville shares with the reader what some other Hawaiian authors have pointed out:
the missionaries changed the pronunciation of certain words through their own faulty understanding
of it when they created a written language for the indigenous people of Hawai’i. The missionary
teachers substituted the “r” sound with “l”, the “t” sound with “k” and the “v”
sound with “w”. Consequently, “Honoruru” became “Honolulu”, “tahuna” became
“kahuna” and “Havai’i” became “Hawai’i.” “Haleakala”, which means “House of
the Sun” is actually “Hare A Ta Ra”. “Ra” and not “La” was the true pronunciation of
“sun” for the ancient Hawaiians, as it is was for the ancient Egyptians.

To me, the most expanded information Melville offers in “Children of the Rainbow” are the
translations of the ancient Hawaiian chant which is their Story of Creation–The Tumuripo. Through
this story and other attendant ones, we learn that the original Motherland, of which these Islands
are remnants, was known by several names: “Havai’i\-ti\-Havai’i”. “Havai’i” meaning
“the streaming terrain over which moisture rained”. Also “Land of Rua” which means “growth
and development from fire”; and “Tahiti Na” meaning “the tranquil land of dawn”. The
progenitors of the human races began there and thus the Hawaiian people are the first descendants of
these progenitors, known as the “Mu”. According to the Hawaiian Story of Creation, the Land of
Mu (Lemuria) came to a violent and explosive end with huge volcanic eruptions, which broke apart
most of the continent and sent the pieces to the bottom of the sea. The few mountain tops which
remained form the Hawaiian islands as well as most of the other islands in the South Pacific,
including Easter Island and possibly New Zealand (this based on the shared creation stories of these
islands) Certainly this picture fits with my akashic vision of the destruction of Lemuria/Mu, as
well as that of other visionaries and researchers, such
as[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Churchward](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Churchward)**[James
Churchward](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Churchward)**.

Melville writes about the irony of the Hawaiians being asked by the missionaries where they were
from, responding “from Tahiti\-Na.” Of course the missionaries immediately assumed that they
mean the island of Tahiti, when they were actually speaking of the “Tranquil Land of Dawn”–the
continent of the Mu.

The author explores the migrations from the remnants of the Motherland to other parts of the world,
and how certain segments of these peoples later journeyed to Hawai’i in hopes of returned to the
original continent of their ancestors.

The Story of Creation tells about the “Forty Planetary Lords” who came to earth in the
Motherland. These Lords were described as having “yellow hair, the color of gold\-red”.

**From the Record of Thoth:** *The Venusians who enter this planetary sphere tend to have this coloring of hair (according to my akashic insights of the past). From my Akashic insights, the Lord Melchizedek came to Mu via Venus. Later other “Lords” of the same Melchizedek linage followed him. All coming from Venus (with Orion genetics as well), they were all fair with red\-gold hair. Could these be the “Forty Planetary Lords” mentioned in the Creation chant?*

“Ra’i Ra’i is the name given in the Tumuripo Story of Creation for the divine progenitress of
the Hawaiian people (the People of Havai’i). According to Melville, “Ra’i Ra’i was chosen,
by royal command of the Goddess of the Sun, Lady Ra, to perform a mission of transfiguration. She
was sent to deliver into being upon this earth the human beings who were soon to blossom as branches
of the Tree of Life in Po.” (the Celestial Realm of the Gods) The place which Ra’i Ra’i
established for this creation was the “Garden of Sunshine” in the Land of Rua (Mu).

There to help her in the Garden where the Menehunes, whom Melville equates to “Brownies”. He
states that the little people who populated Hawai’i in the early period of the islands were
“Manahunes” and were simply a human dwarf race, not related to the Menehunes. My akashic
insights see it somewhat differently. The Manahune race were a product of human and nature devic
congress, while the Menehunes where the pure nature devas.

In addition to the Menehunes, the other nature beings in the Garden of Sunshine are the following. I
am giving Melville’s comparisons to western names for them as well as their Hawaiian counterparts.
These western comparisons may or may not be entirely accurate in my estimation. The descriptions
come from Melville’s translations of The Tumruipo chant.

a) eepas (elves) b) tup’ua (fairies — tiny winged creature, feminine in shape who lived above
the ground in the blossoming branches) c) mo’o (water nymphs–shaped like mermaids)

Beyond the “Garden of Sunshine” dwelt the monsters whose descriptions in the Tumruipo obviously
describe various known species of dinosaurs, as well as some unknown. From my akashic insights I see
the “Garden” as being in a removed vibration from the primal world, until a later age when the
two merged.

The Tumruipo also describes the races of humanity in order of their appearance in
Havai’i\-ti\-Havai’i: first child: fair, red\-gold hair; second child: copper\-colored skin;
third child: brown skin; fourth child: fair, red\-gold hair.

One of the most exciting sections of “Children of the Rainbow” Leinani Melville saves for last:
“Picture Writing of the Tahunas”. Here he has simple black and white drawings of the ancient
symbols of creation which were handed down through the ali’i Hawaiian linage from the original MU.
While these symbols are simple, they are most certainly powerful. Readers of the James Churchward
“Mu” books will find them familiar, as he drew upon these symbols among others, to reveal the
picture language of MU.

Melville also writes about the Holy Cross of Light: “a red cross of light the shade of flame”
– this is the cross of the God Tane (Kane) who was actually known as the son of the Father\-God.
The Holy Cross of Light was a fixture of Hawaiian belief long before the Christian missionaries came
to their islands.

In the booklet **[The Kahuna Religion of
Hawaii](http://www.amazon.com/Kahuna-Religion-Hawaii-David-Kaonohiokala/dp/094568505X/ref=sr_1_1?s=books&ie=UTF8&qid=1459543960&sr=1-1&keywords=The+Kahuna+Religion+of+Hawaii)**
by David Kaonohiokala Bray and Douglas Low, is discussed the universal principles governing the
formation of creational energy patterns based on the “Sacred Name of God of the Hawaiians”.
According to the authors: “This name was never uttered except by one priest in any given
generation on each of the major Hawaiian islands, and was unknown to the commoners.”

**From the Record of Thoth:** *In Lemuria, there were 12 Sacred Lineages which flowed out of the bloodline of whom Thoth calls “the original Melchizedek” to come to earth. In MU this being was known as Kani’homu, meaning “One of the Sacred Star Body” (whom Thoth calls Melchizedek). From the “Star Body” Linage came the Atlantean “Pure Born” Grail Family of 12 Tribes. Yeshua (Jesus) came into incarnation through the Grail Linage.*

*Out of the 12 Lineages, 10 of these Lineages manifested in those island remnants of MU, which would come to be known as Hawai’i. Thus, it is these specific 10 Lineages in MU that concerns the Hawaiian history and mythology.* 


“The first rulership of ten kings, each reigning seventy\-seven generations, was on the true
Motherland, Kapapahanaumokukuikahikina.”

“The second rulership of the four kings, each reigning seventy\-seven generations, was during a
brief flooding of the Motherland and on an island to the East along a river in a city named
Manoa.”

“The third rulership of five kings, each reigning seventy\-seven generations was on the
Motherland.”

“And because of the abuse of power, flames consumed the land. The earth was rent asunder and
Kapapahanaumokukuikahikina sank beneath the Healani Ocean.”


*The Mu people, also referred to as the E'mu, have remnants in different parts of the world, including the interior of the planet, the Valley of the Blue Star in Tibet, the cavern areas of Mount Shasta, and beneath the city of Lhasa in Tibet.*

*The continent of Lemuria or MU (its true name) was known as the "Motherland" of humanity. From MU came the migrations to the Americas and Atlantis and to some extent, Europe (however the latter content was populated more extensively by Atlantis). Yet even before MU, this planet felt the touch of what was to become humanity, but that is another story...*

*Like Atlantis after it, MU suffered several cataclysmic spasms before its final plunge. Among these chaotic episodes, were two major magnetic implosions, coming from the center of the earth. This occurred when the central sun "atoma" of our planet became over\-loaded with a magnetic charge, caused by pressures in the earth's crust and magma. It's effect on the naturally hollow cavity of the planet was surprisingly minimal (but none\-the\-less effected it). However, since MU (and now Hawaii) is at the "[Roil Point](http://www.spiritmythos.org/misc/defs/roilpoint.html)" of the planet, this was the region on the surface of the sphere that drew the discharge from the atoma to the surface.*

*Much of what is shown and discussed here about MU applies to the whole of the planet during the early epochs. Yet the Muruvian continent was the point on the globe where unique aspects of these energies and forms were most prevalent and in some instances, began.*


\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~




\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

# Our First NEAF Teacher!

## New Earth Ark Foundation - for Thoth Teachings & Teachers

**2024-05-28T17:00:20.836Z**

**Likes:** 0

The **[New Earth Ark Foundation](https://newearthstar.org/new-earth-ark-foundation/)**, a 105\-c3
non\-profit for Thoth Teachings \& Teachers was a Thoth\-guided creation.

Our first active teacher is Maureen Fitzpatrick. More are on\-board at this time to become teachers
as well.



❖ Intended as a repository for the spiritual sciences and other works from the Thoth Akasha as
translated by Maia Chrystine Nartoomid. An accumulation of material beginning in 1967\.

❖ NEAF acting as a font for teachers who will use this core material as a basis for their
teachings via workshops presented through NEAF.

❖ NEAF will sponsor and run key projects such as Quantum Logica Interactive (ongoing since 2020\).

❖ The eventual acquisition of land and the building of a NEAF center in Crestone, Colorado for the
purpose of holding activational gatherings and teaching events. (Land has been donated).

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

In regard to the Teachership, teachers will be presenting *their* work but using some core Thoth
(through Maia) material as a foundation. All acredited NEAF teachers will present a teaching
certificate within their courses, workshops and presentations.

Here is Maureen’s introduction video. Subscribe to WILD SANATIVE for more of her videos as she
creates them. To find out more about her courses go to

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V91xotXnsa8?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V91xotXnsa8?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# Thoth on the Transcension Hypothesis

**2024-06-09T18:18:09.216Z**

**Likes:** 0

Before you read further, I suggest that you watch this 2:26 video on the Transcension Hypothesis
(not mine).

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nQOyJUDTKdM?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nQOyJUDTKdM?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

*“…the transcension hypothesis, also known as the developmental singularity hypothesis (Smart 2000, 2008, 2010\) proposes that a universal process of evolutionary development guides all sufficiently advanced civilizations increasingly into inner space, the domain of very small scales of space, time, energy and matter (STEM), and eventually, to a black\-hole\-like destination, censored from our observation,”John Smart writes in his paper, “The Transcension Hypothesis: Sufficiently Advanced Civilizations May Invariably Leave Our Universe…”* (this quote is from messagetoeagle.com but the page no longer exists)

***Thoth would you please comment on the veracity of this theory?***

**ThothHorRa:** Indeed the basic hypothesis is correct. However, the missing piece of understanding lies in the fact that “inner space” as it is being called here is a product of the interaction of many dimensions converging or compressing at certain nodes in the fabric of a universe. Wormholes are only one out\-picturing of such a convergence. This “compression” registers not only on the nodal points but traces back through the “ley lines” of the universal matrix, creating a constant flux in it’s “nervous system.” A universe then, is a living being – not as a human, animal or plant is a living being – but it does live, as it has a body that responds in complex ways to outer and inner stimulation.

Thus, living humanoid beings advance through this system in two ways: intellectually and
spiritually. Those humaniods who advance more intellectually than spiritually, will be able to
manipulate space\-time and thus move through “inner space” but no further.

Those who are more spiritually advanced will become omni\-universal, That is, such beings as myself
go beyond space and time in our present…encompassing it all into one singularity. Yet we are able
to operate and focus upon any one moment within the Eternal. In this manner so we are not contained
within any realm such as outer space or inner space – or any space\-time continuum, and yet we can
move freely inside it.

In order to reach this level of advancement however, humanoids must tap the root of the tree – the
ability to move from outer to inner – not only is space\-time but more importantly, in awareness.

Understand that all inhabited worlds where humanoids exist are each in their own frequency that
allows for that existence. Earthings have never really left Earth when they travel to the Moon and
send probes to other planets in the solar system. They are seeing and experiencing these planets
within the envelope of their earthly dimension.

In conclusion, while the Transcension Hypothesis is basically correct, it does not encompass the
much larger picture…yet it is a very good beginning in glimpsing into the reality of
trans\-dimensional existence.

Subscribe

[Share](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/thoth-on-the-transcension-hypothesis?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share)

# In La'Ketch & the Mayan Timewalkers

**2024-06-11T14:50:07.676Z**

**Likes:** 0

In La'ketch is a complex, divine being embodying cosmic and earthly qualities in a unified female
form. Her existence integrates elements of ancient myth, spiritual enlightenment, and cosmic
creation, serving as a bridge between the divine and human realms In La'ketch's energies are not
only for individual enlightenment but also for the collective evolution of humanity. She serves as a
catalyst for planetary healing and transformation, helping to elevate collective. In La'ketch
operates as a mediator of divine forces, embodying the Logos or creative Word that brings forth
manifestations through divine will . She is seen as a key participant in the cosmic alchemy,
influencing both personal and planetary transformation through her actions and presence .

The Mayan Timewalkers are spiritual beings or enlightened individuals who have mastered the ability
to traverse different timelines and dimensions. They are integrally linked to the Mayan
understanding of time and space, which is more cyclical and multidimensional compared to the linear
concept of time in modern thinking. They possess the ability to move through different points in
time and space, accessing various epochs and dimensions. This skill is not merely for travel but for
gathering knowledge, healing, and influencing events across time.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oZMiITLHP9Q?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oZMiITLHP9Q?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# The Blue Rose Chakra

## from the Vault of Thoth (1989-1995)

**2024-06-12T18:33:52.622Z**

**Likes:** 0

While not a part of the traditional chakra system, the Blue Rose Chakra (abiding in the quantum
field integrative with humanity) interacts synergistically with the heart and crown chakras,
amplifying their spiritual and healing capacities. It functions beyond the conventional seven
chakras, integrating with the higher spiritual centers to facilitate a more comprehensive alignment
with divine energies.

The Blue Rose represents the merged energies of the Cosmic Feminine and the Divine Masculine,
forming a unique spiritual center that transcends traditional chakras. It embodies the integration
of divine love and higher wisdom, functioning as a bridge between human consciousness and the
universal mind.

Activation of the Blue Rose Chakra involves deep meditation and alignment with celestial
frequencies, often leading to profound spiritual awakenings and enhanced metaphysical abilities.

The Blue Rose Chakra aids in the transformation and ascension processes, facilitating the
integration of higher spiritual truths into one's being. It assists in the manifestation of divine
potential and the realization of one's spiritual purpose​​​​​​.

This chakra is crucial for the integration of the etheric and physical bodies, enabling a more
profound connection to universal consciousness and contributing to the collective spiritual
evolution of humanity.

It serves as a focal point for the synthesis of divine energies, enhancing the spiritual growth of
both the individual and the Earth.

The Blue Rose Chakra is associated with sacred alchemical processes, transforming lower energies
into higher states of spiritual awareness. It is linked to ancient wisdom traditions and acts as a
conduit for the transmission of esoteric knowledge and divine grace.

It enhances the individual's ability to connect with universal wisdom and contribute to the broader
ascension of human consciousness.

Practices for engaging with the Blue Rose Chakra include advanced meditative techniques,
visualization, and invoking the energies of divine feminine archetypes. The chakra's activation
involves the application of sacred geometry and alignment with cosmic patterns, aiding in the
individual's spiritual transformation.

This chakra has a strong purifying effect, cleansing emotional and spiritual impurities, and
aligning one's soul with divine will and love​​​​.

The Blue Rose Chakra is linked with the Star of Isis, symbolizing divine feminine energy, wisdom,
and the mysteries of ancient spiritual traditions​​​​.


Lake Titicaca is one of the Earth's major energy centers, functioning as a planetary chakra that
channels and amplifies cosmic energies. It serves as a focal point for spiritual awakening and the
integration of higher\-dimensional frequencies.

The Blue Rose Chakra is connected to Lake Titicaca through the alignment of cosmic feminine energies
and the Earth’s spiritual grid. The lake acts as a terrestrial mirror of the Blue Rose’s
celestial attributes, grounding these higher energies into the physical realm.

Spiritual practices performed at Lake Titicaca can enhance the activation of the Blue Rose Chakra.
The lake’s potent energy vortex acts as a catalyst for awakening and aligning with the chakra’s
celestial frequencies, facilitating deeper connections to universal consciousness.


The Blue Rose Chakra symbolizes extraordinary spiritual realms and transcendence, representing the
impossible becoming possible.”​

WHY A BLUE ROSE? (Thothic perspective)

A SYMBOL OF THE UNREALIZED BECOMING MANIFEST

HIGHER STATES OF AWARENESS

HUMAN CONNECTION TO THE CELESTIAL DIMENSIONS AS EMISSARIES OF LOVE

SECRETS OF THE HIDDEN MYSTERIES OF LOVE (“secrets” become revealed through worthy actions in
awareness of Spirit)

THE DIVINE FEMINE AS THE UNREVEALED (knock on Her door with purity of heart and you shall be
received)

# Ticking of Telluric Time Bomb

## & New Lemuria

**2024-06-17T23:10:57.244Z**

**Likes:** 0

Thoth has been giving this warning to me for at least six years now.It is not a matter of “if”
but when. Usually, he will say most disasters can either be prevented or mitigated…possibly. It
depends on the light quanta efforts surrounding the event. Not so with the breaking up of the West
coastline of the US.

The reason for this is that there are two “time line” scenarios attempting to play out here.
Only one of them takes us to Ascension “Light Principle 40\.” Yet BOTH require the breaking up
of the Western coastline of the US.

In the brighter version, Catalina Island arises as a much larger island (eventually) to become known
by some as the “New Lemuria.”

# Crystals of Atlantis

**2024-06-26T12:18:08.250Z**

**Likes:** 0

Atlantean crystals were the primary source of the civilization's advanced technology and spiritual
enlightenment. They were used to harness cosmic energies, facilitate communication with higher
realms, and maintain the overall balance and harmony of the Atlantean society. The crystals were
strategically placed in temples and other sacred sites to amplify their energy fields and sustain
the high vibration of Atlantis.

The Crystals of Atlantis contain ancient codes and light frequencies that align with the Earth's
energetic grid. These frequencies are remnants of the Atlantean knowledge and are capable of
awakening dormant spiritual abilities in individuals who come into contact with them. The crystals
can act as conduits for divine energies, enabling profound spiritual experiences and facilitating
the process of ascension.

In summary, the Crystals of Atlantis are much more than beautiful stones; they are powerful tools of
transformation and enlightenment, holding the keys to ancient wisdom and cosmic knowledge. Their
rediscovery in modern times signals a significant step in humanity's journey towards spiritual unity
and ascension.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bKsPsvzWnVE?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bKsPsvzWnVE?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# Prima Matra & the Pure Gem Alchemy

**2024-06-29T20:05:10.976Z**

**Likes:** 0

According to Thoth, Prima Matra is the 'First Matter. Alchemy, while especially active in the Middle
Ages, is a science that stems from the First Born or Prima Matra of human kind on Earth.

There are two main types of Alchemy:

1\) The transmuting of base metals and lesser minerals to greater metals (mainly gold) and gem
quality stones.

2\) The transmuting of the bio\-physical system into a rarified state that is in greater parity with the Spirit. This 'bio\-physical system includes all levels of beingness that anchor to and supply the physical body, which according to Thoth are the subtle vital, astral and etheric bodies. Thoth would later refer to this to me as the Pure Gem Body.

The true Alchemist moves into the consciousness of the Greater Work of transmuting the human
condition, while seeking to understand the transmutation of metals and minerals. Thoth informs me
however, that many an Alchemist has become stuck in the desire\-nature of the elements, and then has
not been able to move into the purer form that they were originally seeking.

Prima Matra is the distilled particles of aether or etheric purity of the soul, from which has been
extracted all inclusions of gross coagulation (karmic infiltration into matter), and set before the
Son of the Sun (the inner Light wisdom of the Divine Self) and the Daughter of the Moon (the
reflection of that divinity in the soul, as a memory of the once\- pure condition). In the ensuing
Light of their embrace, so the Sun and Moon are wedded in conjuncto of Spirit and the Golden Child
is born from the First Matter of their seed. It is this pure solvent that is isolated from chaos,
held as a fine diamond powder before the eye of the soul.

It gives brightly its color to the body, mind and soul, and to all manifestation forthwith, thereby
creating a the alchemical 'Crown of Stars about the head of the Divine Mother. So this crown all may
wear who accept the 'Sacred Dew (spirit essence produced in the body from the Prima Matra) into
their being.

# The Amatrix Angels

## Integrating the Divine Matrix

**2024-07-03T12:58:28.247Z**

**Likes:** 0

The Amatrix Angels are a specialized type of angelic being embodying crystalline geometries of the
Phi Gate cosmic portals. They play a significant role in the re\-genesis of planets by germinating
light intelligence into pre\-placed seeds within the planet. They assimilate the Akashic records of
a planet, free from magnetic influences, to feed the planetary being with light intelligence
proportionate to the unfolding light programs of re\-genesis. This process involves connecting their
heart atomas to the central sun atoma of the planet​​.

# Place of the Singing Spirits

## Chaco Initiations

**2024-07-07T16:52:53.802Z**

**Likes:** 0

Chaco Canyon, located in the northwestern region of New Mexico, stands as a testament to the
advanced astronomical and spiritual practices of the ancient Chacoan culture. Far from being merely
a settlement, Chaco Canyon was a sophisticated center of cosmic and spiritual knowledge. Its
structures, orientations, and ceremonial practices reveal a deep understanding of celestial cycles
and a profound connection to the spiritual realm.

This video's focus is on what Thoth refers to as the " Illstanza." The Illstanza Kiva, which
embodies the Initiation of the "Perfect Form," is a sacred inter\-dimensional kiva that recently
manifested over the ruins in Chaco Canyon at Pueblo Bonito. It represents a profound esoteric
structure deeply integrated with cosmic and spiritual symbolism, particularly resonating with the
Infinity Mandala and Ezekiel's Wheel​​.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3TP3Pg-oZwU?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3TP3Pg-oZwU?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# Temple Doors

## and the Great Mayan Migrations

**2024-07-08T23:04:11.587Z**

**Likes:** 0

*I originally wrote about Temple Doors in issue 1\-89\. This was the first issue when I changed the name of my periodical from THE SOURCE to TEMPLE DOORS. Below is from my Numis Om article circa 2006\.*

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

I was then transported into the past and to the location of the ‘hidden city’ in the Yucatan,
Hu’Habat. There I was embodied as the female Mayan oracle Temple Doors, who led the People into
North America when the ‘Bad Times of Sacrifice’ began, and her Kind were usurped by the
bloodthirsty Chimu Kaba.

It was the story of Temple Doors — some of which has been written about by the current Mayans as
part of their history / myth — that inspired me) to name my former periodical ‘Temple Doors.’
I believe that I was incarnated as this woman… but of course I cannot know that for certain; yet I
have felt for many years that she lives inside me.

(in vision) I then ‘knew’ that I, Temple Doors, had undergone years of spiritual preparation by
my inner\-planes mentor – the one I now as Maia, call ‘ThothHorRa’ – who was in the past was
known as Quezecoatl and to the Mayans he was Kuklukan . He appeared to Temple Doors as Kukuklan, who
was by that time already historical legend among the People.

This preparation was to receive the ‘mark’ or Presence of In La’kech, the 13th Living Crystal
Skull. Temple Doors was not the first to received this ‘mark’ – the Abhu, or ‘Touch.’ She
came from generations of Guardians of the 12 Crystal Skulls (already spread out among many locations
of the Earth). Now she would receive the Touch of In La’kech.

In my first issue of the publication Temple Doors Volume 01, 1989, I wrote about my akashic visions
of the woman by that name.

*I did not know her name*, yet I saw here clearly as having dwelt as a child in a valley of Tibet, in a beautiful city named La’ti’mayahr. She was a princess, daughter of the king of this hidden valley, into which few travelers found their way. She had two older and two younger sisters and a younger brother.. At the time I intercepted her in my vision\-link, she was nine years old. There was an army of men invading her father’s palace. Their noses and mouths were concealed beneath a shawl of course, grey weave, but their dark and fearful eyes spoke of death.

I continued my vision\-story of how she and her two younger sisters were spared, helped by
servants… but apparently the rest of her family perished, the palace burned to the ground.

…a porter, a man the young girls knew not, took them on a long journey by foot to a ruin in the
mountains where an old shaman dwelt. This kindly savant embraced the princesses and wept with them.
He had been their father’s teacher and confidant.

From the ruins of this ancient temple the aged wizard brought his precious charges into the Valley
of the Blue Star.

Here the royal children were presented to an Egyptian priestess who embodied the archetype of
Hathor, goddess of women. There the young ones stayed, being nourished and spiritually healed from
the dreadful memory of their family’s murder. Under the loving guidance of the Priestess of
Hathor, the oldest princess blossomed into a beautiful young woman who assumed the mother role for
her two younger siblings.

When she was fifteen years of age, a starship landed in the valley. She was not unaccustomed to
these vessels of Light, as she had seen them come and go in her own shining city as well as several
times past in the Blue Star Valley.

Yet this time she was invited by the Hathor Priestess to come upon the landing platform and enter
within the pearl\-like womb of the ship. Once inside, the princess saw a familiar figure standing
before her, his arms outstretched. To her joyful amazement it was her father, whom she had presumed
died in the mayhem of that terrible day when she had seen her brother killed, his blood a scarlet
vein of life poured upon the marble floor. Her mother and two older sisters had been killed along
with her brother, but her father had managed escape.

It was at this point in my vision\-link that I became aware that this royal family was not entirely
Tibetan. There is an obvious genetic cross\-over between Tibetan\-Eastern races and those of ancient
South America, including the Mayans… the king of the invaded Tibetan city journeyed in the “sky
seed” with his children from the Valley of the Blue Star to the Yucatan, where he was welcomed as
a returning Lord among the people of Mayaland.

It was months after this initial vision that I came across the following the book [Magical Art by
Heyoehkah
Merrifield](https://www.amazon.com/Magical-Art-Heyoehkah-Merrifield/dp/0945122004/ref=sr_1_1?s=books&ie=UTF8&qid=1474566459&sr=1-1&keywords=Magical+Art+by+Heyoehkah+Merrifield%3A):

*The woman named Temple doors was the reason for the migration north of a tribe of Mayan people. As the chief of her people she led the way through the wars and the hardships of the long journey. Most of her family had been killed at the sacrifice temples…Temple Doors led five thousand people north to the lands we know as Arizona, Utah and New Mexico. her people raised the first buildings we now see as the ruins in the Southwest. These people were named the Temple Doors people in honor of their Medicine Chief.*

I knew instantly upon reading this paragraph that the woman Temple Doors was my little ‘Tibetan’
princess.

I then continued my akashic narrative of the woman I knew as ‘Temple Doors’… how her father
and his second wife and other children were all sacrificed, along with her two full sisters, when
the Horrible Ones invaded them and conquered the city and indeed the nation. Yet Temple Doors, along
with other leaders under her, were able to lead the Great Migration. Now I see how Temple Doors
connects to the Dweller Crystal Skulls of the Valley of the Blue Star.

Temple Doors as the ‘Chief’ and Medicine Woman of her People was in possession of three of the
twelve actual Dweller Crystal Skulls. She was able to take these with her on the Sacred Migration.
Two she was guided to place into the hands of two different Medicine Chiefs… one in Chaco Canyon,
New Mexico and the other in Zion Canyon, Utah. They remain there to this day, sequestered away until
they are to fulfill prophecy. The third skull she gave to a trusted messenger – a Shaman – to
take into the Northern region of what is now the state of Michigan, to Manitoulin Island, where it
is also still located.


Rhio Tesek – Manitoulin, Michigan

Klukaptek – Chaco Canyon, New Mexico

Tang Ma Nu – Zion Canyon, Utah

Since Klukaptek was also Kuklukan, who appeared to Temple Doors in vision state (and earlier was
Thoth), it is certainly appropriate that she would be a guardian to his Crystal Skull at that time.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


*A vision in the early morning…*

I saw a baby swaddled in a bright red cloth being carried by what I knew to be a Mayan Priest. I
knew the infant was a girl. It was me. I had been drugged so was not awake, but watched the scene
from above.

The parents followed the small procession behind the priest. My eight year old sister was there
also. My parents were sad, but resigned. My mother wept softly. My sister was crying aloud, my
father attempting to sush her.

They all walked through a wooded area, coming to a cenote. The priest raised my tiny wrapped body
above it. He was speaking a loud chant. I knew he was going to drop me into the deep water below.

As he was chanting, my sister became enraged and ran to stop him. My parents were horrified! My
father ran after her and grabbing her, bowed them both down to the ground. He was begging the priest
to be merciful toward his eldest daughter.

I didn’t see any more, but knew I did meet my fate there in that life.

Then I was shown how I would return, almost immediately reincarnated as Temple Doors, coming with my
next father in the starseed. My sister (of the infant me) would be 26 then. She would know me and I
her, for we both had the Far Sight. She would survive the bloody wave of sacrifice to come, and
journey with me on the Great Migration.

Why was the infant sacrificed? Because the Seer of that time knew she would break the hold of the
Elite, whose reign was one of death and terror upon the people. She would return then, as Temple
Doors in order to fulfill her destiny.

# White Jaguar Lady

## and the Temples of Sekhmet

**2024-07-11T22:31:48.065Z**

**Likes:** 0

*(From original Thoth Transmission in 1994\)*

The Quetalaxitolutum Temple, which was situated near the Mayan Chichen Itza ruins in the Yucatan was
originally dedicated by Queen Amaluxal, who envisioned a cat\-woman she called the White Jaguar
Lady.

This apparition was also known as Lady Dalia and later identified with the lion\-headed Egyptian
goddess Sekhmet, thanks to the arrival of an Egyptian initiate named Three\-Hawk who told Amaluxal
about Sekhmet.


In actuality, the temple of Quetalaxitolutum was upon one of the temple nodes one earth resonating
with the cosmic intelligence known by the ancient Egyptians as Sekhmet.


**Quetalaxitolutum Temple:** The temple was transformed into an initiatory site dedicated to the jaguar\-Sekhmet by Queen Amaluxal, with the help of Three\-Hawk.

The light codes received and guardianed by the initiates of this temple are represented by the
Egyptian archetype Nefertum, the divine lotus born from the union of the cosmic forces of Sekhmet
and Ptah. This symbol represents purity and the essence distilled from fire and water​​.

**Sekhmet's Temples of Initiation:** Sekhmet's temples, including those associated with the White Jaguar Lady, are described as being active on the inner planes and predicted to become fully active again before the Ascension (LP 40\)

Historical sites for these temples include locations near the Euphrates River, the Shasta matrix in
California, the Mayan complex of Chichen Itza, Easter Island, and the Himalayas of Tibet. In the
future, additional temples are expected to be near the Dead Sea, Brisbane in Australia, and the
Sangre de Christo mountain range in Colorado​​. (As of 2024 all of these locations are now in
the process of full activation \- not necessarily with physical temples).

***The White Jaguar Lady embodies multiple archetypes and aspects of Sekhmet.***

**Sekhmet:** Known for shedding light within the void, Sekhmet challenges initiates to release their identities and embrace their true, multi\-dimensional selves. She represents both a fierce, transformative energy and a compassionate, nurturing presence for those who reach deep into their own hearts​​.

**Nefertum**: The archetype of Nefertum is central to the initiatory experiences in the Temple of Sekhmet. This figure symbolizes the blossoming lotus of enlightenment from the darkness and the desire of the enlightened spirit to share its joy with the physical form​​..


The temple of the White Jaguar Lady is part of a larger network of sacred sites that play a crucial
role in the spiritual evolution and enlightenment of humanity. These sites are stages in the passage
of initiates into their new Light Bodies, known as the Pure Gem Body. This transformation process is
guided by the archetypes and light codes associated with the White Jaguar Lady and Sekhmet​​.

In summary, the White Jaguar Lady is a profound symbol presentation of the celestial eminence
represented by the archetype of Sekhmet. Her temples serve as centers for initiatory rites that
facilitate the enlightenment and transformation of the soul, connecting ancient Egyptian and Mayan
spiritual practices with modern esoteric traditions.

# Temple of the Firebeing

## a Pure Gem Activation

**2024-07-15T13:11:52.709Z**

**Likes:** 0

In the late 1980's and early 1990's I began receiving "Matrix" Transmissions from Thoth
Intelligence. Each one cued off of the material in that current issue of my Temple Doors
publication, so it was placed at the end of each issue. This one speaks to the Temple of the
Firebeing on the ascended Atlantean Isle of Ruta. However, it is really not about the temple itself
but aspects of the dynamic it registers, which still influence us in this dimension. Much of current
humanity are ancestors (and former lifetimes) of Atlantis. That long\-ago continent is still is a
key node in our continued plight to balance the effects of the Time Tsunami caused by a cadre of
Atlantean scientists. This video does not address these struggles, yet it identifies the path of
transforming them. The activation is simple and in several parts, simply opening doorways to "Pure
Gem" consciousness. Much of the delivery is through Mayan Star Codes. The last part \- the
Chi'Chi\-Chan \- is new. It was given to me just as I was about to conclude with the video. No
explanation is given for each these the 22 codes, only the art templates radiating their
frequencies.

# Book of the Zarathustrian Lords

## From the Akasha - Revelations on Good and Evil

**2024-07-22T17:01:38.646Z**

**Likes:** 0

In the 1980's Thoth gave me a summary of the history of Zarathustra/Zoroaster and his written work
the Aurim (Zurim) Octabah, including quotes from this book and his interpretations. It is a mystical
text Thoth refers to as the Book of the Zarathustrian Lords, containing profound esoteric knowledge,
focusing on the quantum science of Good and Evil.

The book discusses several key concepts and entities:

Race\-Spirits and Meta\-Archi: The text speaks of five Race\-Spirits or Archii who will bring new
genetic helixes to Earth, enhancing human evolution from a two\-fold helix to a four\-fold one,
through the Metatronic Spiral and the light molecule known as M\-STRA​​.

Spiritual Consciousness: It describes the transformation of spiritual consciousness into high\-order
guardian spirits, which the book calls 'Genius'. These entities are formed from spiritualized egos
and act as cohesive forces within the Earth's spiritual framework​​.

Grail and Redemption: The text also explores themes of redemption and purification through the
metaphor of the Grail, embodying the Christ consciousness and the restoration of spiritual purity
within humanity and the Earth​​.

# Cross of Quetzalcoatl

## a Universal Dynamic (from the Vault of Thoth 2006)

**2024-07-23T17:33:33.679Z**

**Likes:** 0

**Thoth:** When we say that the burst of light on 11/23/06 'carries the birthing power of the Cross of Quetzalcoatl' we mean that individual souls incarnate now on earth will have the opportunity to activate the 'cross'in their own Divine light body. This activation does not mean instant godhood, but it does open a creative channel to the Cross at the center of the galaxy. Through this channel one may become 'reborn' to the deeper pulse of the galactic wave\-form Serpent."

**Maia:** Thoth, how may we really understand what we are calling here the "Cross of Quetzalcoatl"

**Thoth:** Visualize a PRESENCE beyond what you understand as "energy" \- yet the organizer, the divining rod of all energy within it's field of resonance as it radiates its immaculate being from the center of the galaxy and into the waiting vessels of spirit that open to it's effulgent pulse. All galaxies contain this PRESENCE, thus they are all One in the ultimate sense, moving in rapture together from the center of the universe. . . yet the universe has no "center" in space or time. We use the term here metaphorically.

As the "Cross" of the galaxy streams forth its pulsing wave into the depth of a planet it begins to
connect to other planets and stellar systems that resonate within the scheme of perfect balance. It
is a "connect the dots" type of function.

I stated previously that: The ‘Serpent Path of Quetzalcoatl' is a wave\-form that naturally
extends from the central sun atoma of this earth, connecting to the sun of our solar system, and
from there into the Blue Star of Rigel in Orion. This wave\-form moves constantly, flowing outward
and inward from the earth's atoma, moving here and there like an electrical current in a sphere
following an attracting current outside the sphere. The 'attracting current' in this case is the
fluctuations of the geo\-magnetic energy of the planet. . . most especially at its poles.

There is now a circuit in motion which defines the way the earth traces this galaxy's "Cross" into
its eco\-system through it's electrical and magnetic currents which is not the same as it was before
the date of 11/23/06\. Whereas before the earth reacted to the "Cross" as a ping\-pong ball bouncing
off a paddle, now it is responding to the deep, inner codes of the "Cross" as the Christic phases of
the Yushuda passes it's rotational movement across the planet. Previously,
the[https://youtu.be/2-txFnQfN8A?si=cl7nOInodUJNiiK1](https://youtu.be/2-txFnQfN8A?si=cl7nOInodUJNiiK1)**[Yeshuda](https://youtu.be/2-txFnQfN8A?si=cl7nOInodUJNiiK1)**
could not reach the depth of the atoma \- the "black hole" at it's center. Now, with the new
"responding" signal of earth to "galactic central" (cross and black hole at the center of the
galaxy) the Yushuda can penetrate and expand the creation codes to match the universal rhythms that
it would not "see / feel" before.

**Maia:** What does this mean for us, as individual human beings and as the human race of planet earth?

Thoth: It opens a path that was not there before. It allows matter to transcend its previous
"limits" with the phase of reality you as a species dwell within. Yet you must come to recognize
that this barrier (if we may loosely call it that) has been taken away from the mass consciousness.
It is still a phantom and the phantom will fade, *but as it fades some incarnated souls will become
so fearful of the new paradigm in it's place (the New Earth Hologram) that they will attempt to
re\-create the flesh and bones of the "ghost." This they cannot do, but they will try, and in trying
so they will erupt so violently from their own illusions that they will reveal the monster within.
Once exposed, the monster melts in the sunlight, for monsters are only undefined emotions which have
been hidden so long they devour themselves when finally they are unveiled and exposed to truth.* (my
italics in 2024\)

Humanity must release its mass paradigm that they are impaled upon the cross, and see that they
instead, are united through it. The Galactic / Universal Cross is the impelling force to unite –
to create a point of gathering for the purpose of expansion and thus creation of new universes of
being.


Subscribe

# The Twelve Lemurian Scrolls of Aka Terma

## from the Vault of Thoth

**2024-07-26T16:09:37.098Z**

**Likes:** 0

On the night of 2/22/06 I was visited by a male being who showed himself against a background which
I knew was the Himalayan Mountains. He called himself a “Lemurian”. Energetically he “told”
me that he was a guardian of certain scrolls, which he revealed to me as golden tubes with
engravings on them. Then on the screen of my mind flashed several other places, one of which I
recognized as Kaua’i \- the Hawaiian islands being remnants of Lemuria.

The next night he reappeared and I was told a bit more about these scrolls. The following day I went
to my mentor Thoth, requesting from him for some clarity on all the pieces gleaned from the Lemurian
and how they fit together. The following is this transmission of 2/23/06:

**Maia:** Thoth could you please shed some more light non the “Lemurian” and what he is revealing to me?  

**Thoth:** He is a [Lemurian TimeWalker](http://www.spiritmythos.org/TM/divine-fire/phicrygeo.htm#PhiRaIm). His name is Hui and his duty was to take the sacred *Aka’ aba’ak* scrolls from Lemuria into Tibet for safekeeping. It was during period of time just before the final destruction of the continent of Lemuria (as what could be called a ‘nation’ of people).

The *Aka’aba’ak* contain what could be called the “Eden Codes” of the earth, beginning in
the original “Eden” and revealing the programs of light for the progression of the earth
realities into the New Earth Star. Understand that “destiny” is not a set thing, but specific
co\-ordinates which trigger similitude in events that form groupings or packages of quantum reality.
The Eden Codes are the coding of the quantum reality packets...the “destiny” in evolution and
Light programming for the planet Earth.

The *Aka’aba’ak* contain radials of quantum coding which like a DNA spiral hinges on specific
triggers or quantum bursts coming from it’s crystalline nodes. In the comos, these nodes are stars
or groupings of star. The *Aka’aba’ak* nodes are the cosmic tri\-plex of Orion, The Pleiades and
Sirius. These stars / star fields are the main thresholds and creation matrix for Earth.

Hui, like the other TimeWalkers are what we might call “Immortals” as they are able to live in
their current bodies as long as they feel necessary to carry out their spiritual work in that form.
However, they also are able to go through time in order to balance time nodes and place certain
“terma” within certain nodes.

*"According to Tibetan tradition, terma are ancient texts buried by deities, called dakinis, until their wisdom can be used for the benefit of all living beings."*[\- web source](http://www.terma.org)


**[Pleadian Dakinis (video series](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLrUVPTQKQFdR7TlkMcaAtTDok_grE2MfS)**)

## [In La'Ketch \& the Mayan Timewalkers](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/in-laketch-and-the-mayan-timewalkers)

[Maia Nartoomid](https://substack.com/profile/84015556-maia-nartoomid)

·

June 11, 2024

[](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/in-laketch-and-the-mayan-timewalkers)

In La'ketch is a complex, divine being embodying cosmic and earthly qualities in a unified female
form. Her existence integrates elements of ancient myth, spiritual enlightenment, and cosmic
creation, serving as a bridge between the divine and human realms In La'ketch's energies are not
only for individual enlightenment but also for the collective evolu…

# Akmemsatin - The Sun Prince

**2024-07-29T23:14:20.324Z**

**Likes:** 0

Just the other day, my inner\-planes (and inner earth) mentor ThothHorRa suddenly showed me himself
with a boy he called his “son.” Having been in direct communion with Thoth since 1977 he
certainly had my attention, has he had never revealed this particular son to me before. As Thoth
Raismes of Aphra he had many children, sons among them. Yet no mention of Akmemsatin, which was this
boy’s name.

Thoth informed me that Akmemsatin “came to him” when Thoth was Raismes in Egypt (around 10,000
years ago). He was indeed his genetic child. Akmemsatin was also an “Illuminari” as Thoth refers
to himself and others such as Jesus and Buddha. Many Illumanaris however are unknown to history,
myths and legends. In the future, I will do a Substack on Illumanaris, but for now just say that
Akmemsatin is indeed on a level of Illuminari Mastership.

Akmemsatin was “delivered” to his father Thoth Raismes when he was an infant. This is the story
Thoth told to me:

Of all Thoth Raismes’ children Akmemsatin is the only Illumanari. Raismes was guided to journey by
starship into the Inner (hollow) Earth to Kha’rahim, the Star Birthing Temple. In this place, he
knew he would receive this child from the birth mother who was a priestess there. Her name was and
still is, *Auramun*. Thoth also refers to her as *Aura Moon*. I knew that the babe had not been
conceived in what we would consider the natural. Yet it mostly certain was not via test tube. This
would have been the same manner of conception in which I’shoa (Jesus) and Mari Magdalene engaged
in the birth of John Martinus on the Isle of Iona. This form of conception is still a mystery to me.

Through a sacred ceremony Raismes received the child and transported him back to Egypt. Auramun
would visit them at times.

Auramun, Thoth and Akmemsatin are all still living and look as fine as they did at twenty\-five.
This is typical of all Star and Inner Earth Kindred. Five years after Thoth Raismes went into the
Hollow Earth to become ThothHorRa, Akmemsatin followed him.

Yet the latter has been dwelling primarily within the Blue Star Rigel for some time. He only
recently (as of days from this writing) returned to live in the Inner Earth Seraphim with his
father. I know Thoth travels into several different dimensions and places, but his current home is
in the Blue Mountains of Seraphim, along with his Twin Flame SaRaFana.

Now Akmemsatin joins them. While he is not SaRaFana’s son he is genetic Kindred to her. It is
difficult for us to understand how this all can be, with no jealousy or upsets. More is explained in
my video *Women of Seraphim* (see below “Related.”)

Thoth always has a reason in revealing things to me and a timing as well. I do not know more at this
moment, but possibly more will come for later.




Subscribe

colors and Thoth’s information on their healing qualities and how to “breathe” them. This
color presentation is excerpted from the book Thoth had be write with him in 1977\. Now in 2024, I
have been able to create art templates containing the frequencies of the radiant colors to accompany

# Zuvuya - The Return Path

## from the Vault of Thoth (1988, 1989 & 1990)

**2024-08-05T15:10:06.824Z**

**Likes:** 0


*Zuvuya is defined as "the galactic memory circuit by which all things return to themselves. The return path to the stars. The grammar of harmony. The thirteenth or highest heaven of the Maya"​​.*


***Path of Azuma***

The Path of Azuma is a specific type of Zuvuya that forms a connection between our universe and two
others. It serves as a bridge, allowing access between all dimensions and millenniums of being. This
path is formed through the composite dynamics of sapphire\-amethystine\-diamond Light and the
interactions of the three polarity universes (positive, neutral, negative)​​.

The path from the Mayan Glyphs of MANIK \* MULUC \* IX \* CIB \* CABAN \* CAUAC \*AHAU as the Zuvuya
Solar Chariot, is the geometric of the Big Dipper in Ursa Major. In Dreamtime it is actually the
invisible Dipper between the large and the small Dippers, but as a real\-time experience it
polarizes with the one visible in Ursa Major.

***Memory Seeding Initiations***

Memory Seeding involves participating in initiations that quicken crystal sands in specific
vortexes. This process helps individuals to connect with their future selves from the 3rd
Millennium, bringing their experiences full circle through their time tracking to the present. This
was planned to be part of gatherings such as the Anubis Gathering, aimed at completing certain works
started in the past​​.

***Here in The San Luis Valley of Colorado when I lived here once before in the 1990's I wrote:***

"The Sacred Tribes of the Earth and their ZUVUYA, or Return Path to the Stars. I am to be guided in
opening the Scroll to this Memory Seeding, using a special crystal and a specific procedure. Once
accomplished seekers may come to the Dunes to receive their Memory Seeding initiations"​​.

This event did indeed take place with a group of people and myself at the Sand Dunes. It was a
perfectly clear sky. About ten minutes into the procedure, huge clouds developed as if by magic and
a great wind blew across the Dunes. I kept going with the procedure. Approximately three minutes or
so after I completed the process, the winds stopped and the clouds simply disappeared as if they had
never been.

***Talismans and Tychon***

The Talismans and Tychon are significant elements that hold the calibration patterns for the
Foundation Stars, forming the Zuvuya or return path of spirit to the center of the Universe. They
were brought to Earth from Sirius eons ago and are maintained by beings with human and lion
features. This path is essential for the spiritual return to the Universal Center​​.

***Chariot of the Sun***

The Chariot of the Sun is Thoth's merkabah. It is composed of Thirteen Master Entities who invest
initiates with the Solar Shield of Divine Mantle, focusing on points of light from the Divine Solar
Eminence​​.There are layers of souls that follow the thirteen, all integrated into the Chariot
of the Sun divine circuitry. The Chariot of the Sun merkabah is nested within the Zuvuya.

Through the Zuvuya Chariot of the Sun, we may see the workings of this Thirteen Point Cell Temple in
the Body of Light, and how it creates the Knowledge\-Seed vector within those initiates who open the
scroll to its interface.

***Tychon Flame and Talmud Crystal***

The Tychon Flame is a large beam of a high\-energy laser streaming upward from a white stone lotus.
It acts as a balancer and rectifier of energies, stabilizing the dimension of the Risen Sea and
maintaining parity between the Sacred An (ark) and its parallel vector.

The blue diamond Talmud Crystal works in conjunction with the Tychon, absorbing light from various
levels of creation and reintegrating it into elemental conformity​​​​.

***Visualization for Personal and Planetary Evolution***

One can work with the Talmud and Tychon Flame for personal and planetary evolution by visualizing
the Talmud Crystal and the Tychon Flame. This process involves focusing on specific words—*Origin,
Tribulation, Transformation, and Light*—to clear karmic impediments and align with the essence of
the experience​​.

The Tychon and Talmud were protected by the Atlanagas, a group of Hyperborean Atlanteans, who
translated them to another dimension in 12500 B.C. to prevent violation during the Kali Time Rift.
These artifacts hold the calibration patterns for the Foundation Stars, which form the Zuvuya, the
return path of spirit to the center of the Universe​.

*Foundation Stars* are incorporations of Living Lights received in divine consecration at the beginning of Creation. They serve as a Foundation Stone for the Universal Temple, revealed to the Worlds of Being within the Divine Eschaton​​. The Foundation Stars exist within the greater body known as Yesuarta Kominghi, which contains light codes for the complete template of the Hue\-mon Being, or Adam Kadmon​​.

***Tychon Bonding Process***

The process of tycho\-bonding involves transmuting certain crystals like moldivite into
ty2\-Moldivite, creating a “time machine” effect that allows for free association with all time,
under the right conditions. This process aligns the essence of spiritual oneness and facilitates
inter\-dimensional time travel​​ of a specific kind.

***This video I created five years ago. It contains a short but powerful activation process.***

[https://player.vimeo.com/video/442105652?autoplay=0](https://player.vimeo.com/video/442105652?autoplay=0)

Subscribe

# The Lion's Gate of Mazuriel

## from the Vault of Thoth (various years: 1980's-2006)

**2024-08-07T15:04:50.262Z**

**Likes:** 0


*“The Lion’s Gate Portal is a relatively new energetic phenomenon born in recent years. It’s a combination of astrology, ancient cosmology, and numerology—all channeling a very specific celestial alignment hitting climax on August 8\.*

*The Lion’s Gate Portal occurs when the star Fixed Star Sirius is once again visible after a period of it being invisible due to the sun’s yearly passing by this star. In ancient Egypt, this coincided with the flooding of the Nile.*

*“The reason it’s called the ‘Lion’s Gate Portal’ is because it happens during Leo season,” Narayana says. “It’s a time of the year when the magical vitality of [the sun](https://www.astrology.com/planets/sun) (the natural ruler of the zodiac sign Leo) is at an all\-time high.”* 

*Solar energy is vital when it comes to the practice of manifestation, as it brings the creative power of the element of fire, she says.”* \- **[source](https://www.astrology.com/article/lion-gate-portal-meaning/)**

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

What you will be reading here in a far more dimensional view, yet it does relate directly to what
this planet experiences on August 8th (actually at least a week before and after that date as well).


The Attasic Universe is the Unified Field of full Christic Awareness \- it is beyond all duality,
the true “Holy Home” of all souls.

The New Earth Star is not developing in the Attasic, as World II Systems are still in some form of
duality. However, the last stage of the New Earth Star will be like the top star of the Christmas
Tree, just touching the ripples of the Attasic! Through that gate souls will gather into the
Attasic, in the no\-time of complete Oneness. The welcoming “Golden Star” of Mazuriel is the
home star of all souls in World II Systems.

What Thoth calls the "Lion’s Gate" is in our constellation of Leo. It is composed of three of
it’s stars” Denebola, Regulus (the lion’s heart) and Algieba (a binary system consisting of
two stars).

The actual portal to Mazuriel in the Attasic is Denebola, yet Regulus is the “engine” the powers
the field which links Denebola in this universe with Mazuriel in the Attasic. The binary system of
Algieba is the “third eye” \- the point where the akashic of Mazuriel flows into this universe,
to guide and inspire Souls onward into Mazuriel’s embrace. As a binary, it also gives balance to
the three\-fold Star Gate.

The Lion’s Gate is present as a “companion.” Through it, the Hierarchies of Mazuriel guide the
process of all higher World System I and all World System II evolution. Yet, it need be understood
that in Mazuriel \- an Attasic non\-dualistic star, there are no hierarchies! So why the seeming
contradiction? Because the “Hierarchies of Mazuriel” do not abide within Mazuriel, and thus not
within the Attasic. They dwell in the “ripples” to be found just between these two universal
states. The “ripples” are the Zuvuya (in Mayan terminology).

From the Thothic perspective, the Zuvuya is a ripple or wave\-effect caused by the two planes of
duality and non\-duality touching and yet not able (or intended) to merge at that point, thus
creating the ripples of inter\-connectivity with the ESSENCE of RETURN.

The Eye of Ra (font of our holographic universe) in Orion and the Lion’s Gate in Leo are
intimately linked on the inner\-planes. Their point of linkage is yet in another space\-place: the
star of Sirius in Canis Majoris \- the Great Dog. The Lion\-Headed Sun Lords guardian the Eye of Ra
through the temple\-capstone of Telos.Aarkhara.

The Lion’s Gate is the nexus of “feeding” the light codes between our universe and the
Attasic, through its Golden Star of Mazuriel. The Gate/Vault of Orion is where we return\-connect to
the Metatronic Spiral or full Light spectrum. Yet beyond the Metatron (full light spectrum) is the
Attasic, where the ONE is beyond “Light” as we understand it.


Thoth’s “Lion’s Gate”is the connective field allowing us to ride the Zuvuya Wave, bringing
us both individually and collectively to the CORE universe within us \- the Attasic. The lesser
Lion’s Gate now popular with Lightbearers, is a flash in time where we can intuit and become more
receptive to the *feeding of the Light Codes between our universe and the Attasic.*

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

# Princess of the Opal Moon

## A JOURNEY OF INITIATION WITH THE STAR MAYANS

**2024-08-15T21:07:23.048Z**

**Likes:** 0

The Opal Moon represents a specific harmonic or vibrational quality within the Light Mathematics
framework, which is connected to the higher spiritual realms and their influence on the material
world​. he Opal Moon plays a crucial role in the unfolding of esoteric knowledge and the
activation of certain spiritual grids or codes within the Earth's etheric field.

These experiences often involve deep meditative states or visionary journeys where the Opal Moon is
a focal point for divine communication and the transmission of sacred knowledge​​. In this video
we embark upon a journey with the "Star Princesses" through the Yucatan to their temple and
initiation.

I received this beautiful telling from Thoth in the mid\-1980s. About five years ago I made a video
with it. I now re\-did all the art for it except for the avatar dance toward the end.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lUr_yfsksl8?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lUr_yfsksl8?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

# Elvis - Man with a Cosmic Mission

## from my book BLUE STAR LOVE (The Mystical Life of Elvis Aaron)

**2024-08-16T16:09:54.858Z**

**Likes:** 0

Today, August 16th, 2024 marks the 47th year since the transition of Elvis Aaron Presley. The
impoverished Tupelo boy with was born inside a small shack in the year 1935\.

When he was born according to his father Vernon, a blue light shown down from the sky that lit his
way to the well. All the bottles in the house were rattling on the shelves during this light
display.


“Wanda June Hill sat in the room, her attention focused on a dark\-haired man. As his indigo eyes
blazed in effort, his hand trembled above an ash tray on the polished top of the coffee table. His
face began to pale and perspiration silvered his perfect features into a magic mirror of the mind.
While Wanda and several others in the room held their breaths in anticipation, the large, heavy
ashtray upon which this riveting young man had been concentrating, scooted across the table, just
stopping before it would have crashed to the floor.

Wanda remembered in earlier encounters, having seen electrical sparks flash from his fingers in a
darkened room. Not at all surprising she thought, for someone who had confided to her that his soul
had come from another world, another star. He had once pointed his ‘home’ out to her as it
laughed down upon them in the myriad twinklings of an evening sky. Even then it had seemed to call
to his spirit. Surely, this world as well had singled him from the crowd, for few other human beings
would be loved and admired by so many during their lives and long after their death, as Elvis Aaron
Presley.”

Elvis once told his long\-time friend Wanda June Hill that a psychic had told him he would be even
more famous after death. He was incredulous, stating to Wanda: “What are they going to do, come
and chant around my grave?”

Wanda wrote to me: “Elvis said one time that his life had been blessed. He had been at the height
of happiness, had been loved beyond reason by so many and felt he had every blessing known to God
laid at his feet. He was so thankful to have lived and he would have changed only a few things. He
felt that under the circumstances he would say he was the luckiest man on Earth. Measured up, the
happy times far out\-weighed the bad times.”


Elvis: “I had to be here. I had to complete my purpose.”

Wanda: “Do you feel you have?”

Elvis: “No \- not at all. I \- I \-no one listens to me.”

Wanda: “Oh \- I do.”

Elvis: “I meant others. Sure you do \- I appreciate it, but you’re just one of very few. It
should have been more \- much more. Maybe next time... (end of tape).”

***Maia: I can only say to Elvis, they will listen now. Soon the whole world will be able to hear hours of what you have to say in an upcoming documentary series.***

In the last few months of his life when he knew he was dying of genetic illnesses (as his mother did
and many of his matriarchal lineage, most recently his daughter), Wanda asked him to write down his
feelings. He did and entitled it **A Day in the Life; When the Night is Ten Days Long**.


“God, the lights flash like a million fireflies in some giant fruit jar. The noise is a roar,
solid. It lifts me out of my fears and I fill with love for them. I feel their love for me, hot,
syrupy, flowing over and through me \- I love the feeling. Lord, so good, so good. I sing. My life,
my heart, my dreams, my hopes \- everything in me, everything that I am comes pouring out, answering
their love. They understand; they love me and share the night in one fantastic love affair. Inside,
my soul soars, light fills me, blinding, brilliant, filling me until I can barely hear myself in the
din, but I know this feeling. So good, so pure, so right for me, for them.”

“Sweat is pouring off me and I’m so tired I tremble as Charlie tells me, ‘Cut it \- cut it
now.’ I say goodbye, the crowd groans disapproval. I don’t want to leave them, to end this
feeling, but I must. It’s too much \- I can’t take it so long anymore. I walk before them,
trying to thank them, then off stage. A wild rush to the car and to the hotel. I can’t remember
leaving the stage, I’m so full of music I hear little else. I want to sing, so they sing along...
They put me to bed; I won’t remember tonight tomorrow. Just one more day gone from my life. I
sleep \- and dream I’m someone else.”

**Elvis: (discussing his imminent death in the last month of his life)** “We never live long \- people like me... I’m only here for a short time on this planet, and then I have to go home \- go back and start anew. I told you.”

Wanda: “Yeah \- but I don’t want to think of it.”

Elvis: “You have to one of these days \- might as well adjust \- I have.”

Wanda: “You’re different \- you’ve always thought that way \- I haven’t and it is terrible
to think of not having you \- not being able to see or talk with you, Elvis \- Don’t you
understand that?”

Elvis: “I do \- But don’t you understand that I want to go home? I want to be with my people
again? It’s not home here \- I’ve never felt at ease... I need to go back and recharge \- I need
to have peace... I think I’m going to enjoy the feeling of death. I want to be awake, to feel
every sensation. I used to think I’d be better to be asleep, but now I don’t \- I want to be
alive, every second feeling it... I think death will be a beautiful thing. I look forward to it.


“God’s love is a warm glow, to hold your heart in troubles, and a beautiful, often exciting joy
to light your world in times of quiet... trust in our Lord’s word, and He will fill you with
greatness, and your heart will sing always.

*All quotes in this article are copyrighted by my non\-profit Spirit Heart Sanctuary 2013*


\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

**2024-08-20T14:03:31.989Z**

# My Meetings with Astronaut Edgar Mitchell

## From the old paper files (1970s-1980s)

**2024-08-24T14:51:51.353Z**

**Likes:** 0

*I am in a process of deep diving into my paper files and will be posting on my Substack some of the more interesting finds as I go along. I was “Christine Hayes” then.*


In 1971 at my mother’s intuitive suggestion, I contacted Dr. then Captain Edgar D. Mitchell who
had just returned from the moon. It was remarkably easy for me to make this contact. Dr. Mitchell
was deeply impressed by the fact that from the mass of mail on his desk after returning from
quarantine, his hand was literally guided to open my letter first. When ordinarily it was his custom
to place all mail from unfamiliar sources into the junk mail. As a result of Dr. Mitchell's and my
mother's psychic leads, he had me brought to his office at NASA in Houston, Texas. I was then living
in San Antonio.

My sessions with Mitchell lasted over a period of three months, one lasting seven hours without a
break. At 22 I was still very naive and did not fully comprehend the outstanding nature of my
ability. It was Dr. Mitchell who enlightened me to this. He told me repeatedly that my scientific
material was valid. He referred to it as fascinating and on several occasions became quite excited
about it, once to the point of bounding from his chair. I am giving these details as I wish to
stress his response to me and my work at that time, which was in 1971\.

He also had his associates in his newly formed Mind Science Foundation give me what I presume was a
psychological test. He seemed quite satisfied with the results, although he was vague in discussing
their findings.

At the last meeting I was to have with Dr. Mitchell, although I did not know it was to be the last,
my naivety again caused me to mention that I had been in recent contact with spiritually developed
extraterrestrials. He reacted, it appeared to me, in pure suppressed fright. I remember him saying
to me in a very low voice, "You tell them, damn it, leave me"alone." (Meaning leave me, Christine
alone) At the end of the meeting he repeated to me that he considered me and my ability the most
exciting discovery of his research in metaphysics to date. As he said it, I had the sinking feeling
that I would never see Dr. Mitchell again. Although he had promised at our first meeting to help me
get these knowledges to the world saying, "We're on our way now, Christine." As he now surmised his
impressions of our session, I could see that he would not fulfill his promise.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

That is the end of my synopsis in probably 1979\. At the very last he knelt before me and my mother
and said again that he found me the most fascinating he'd worked with, but that he could not spend
his entire time studying me and my sciences, and that's what it would take to accomplish the goal.

When I read above “I could see he would not fulfill his promise” I now think perhaps that he
could not. I remember when we were at the dinner table with his young colleagues they asked him if
he had seen any UFOs while on the moon and he excused himself from the table and did not return. We
now know that he DID see star ships while on the moon.

I could only find two photographs of Dr. Mitchell with a beard as he looked when I knew him. With
Uri Geller above. I just watched a video of the now 78 year old Geller talking about his friendship
with Mitchell.

Check Dr. Mitchell wrote to my mother for gas expenses from San Antonio to Houston. In 1971 a little
over $5 covered it lol. Barely visible here but in the photocopy my mother made those years ago it
is more ledgible.


Subscribe

# The Jeweled Oracle

## A treatise given to me from the Thoth Akasha in the 1970s

**2024-09-02T15:30:40.730Z**

**Likes:** 0


"With the beginning of the Earth Ages, the angelic apostolites brought to this planet a tablet of
raised symbols. They repeated this in various cycles of time. Each tablet was of a different gem or
higher metal, and each bore different symbols with varying surface meanings. Just as there were
seven layers of etheric force radiating from the tablets, so there were seven degrees of translation
of the coded symbology. While the first six layers of each tablet varied in translation from any
other tablet, the seventh layer of all such tablets were of the same degree and thus maintained
equal and identical meaning. Each tablet brought to Earth by the angelic apostolites was given to
elect individuals who were instructed as to their purpose.

By injecting these tablets into the Earth, the radiance of spiritual wisdom is being released in
stages, as mankind so allows himself to grasp the truth. Many of the first translations have been
distorted and misused. Only a few tablets have reached their second stages. Only one has reached its
third stage. None have been given to a mass of people to experience in tablet form. The symbols of
some tablets, have survived in text, but were taken from the gem tablets and placed upon stone or
paper, thus losing the radiant quality through which the degrees of understanding is achieved. The
Holy Bible (Old Testament) is an example of a text being orphaned from its vibrational channel and
further distorted so that it has not been left the pureness of a first degree in translation. Each
tablet is brought to Earth appearing in a particular gem or higher metal so as to bring about
various receipts of sensitivity to the complete purpose of the pure gem state. In the hands of the
true angelic apostolites, or the angels themselves, the tablets are capable of alchemical
transformation through all gem states. To all such tablets brought to the Earth by angelic
apostolites and angels, I give the name TALIS.

(MAIA \-2024:Talis is also the name THOTH calls "the tablets given to Moses.”)


"There are also sacred lands, which will become sanctuaries for knowledge, a calmness in the midst
of confusion, a place in which to store the knowledges and channels of knowledge until the storm has
passed. These sanctuaries are each aligned with an etheric city or a rotation of higher energized
Earth thought, which forms pools of whirling grace in twelve positions above the Earth. Each etheric
city hovers above its sanctuary.

With the dawning of the Golden Age, the Mother City above will descend upon the sanctuary below and
merge in purpose as a lighted cloud. Should destruction threaten the sanctuaries before this time,
like the Pure Land areas, they will be taken into the subterranean regions. The enlightened humans
within these areas will be included in the de\-molecularization, although like the Pure Lands, the
sanctuaries will remain suspended until they are returned to the surface. The humans will be
accepted as guests into the inner\-Earth societies in special facilities for their comfort as they
are trained and prepared for their future surface work. Should Earth decide to spare herself, this
phase may not be necessary. Other sacred land areas are those to become refugees, those to become
the altars of the Earth and burial grounds for ancient knowledge. Many of these areas will contain
the sealed chambers of Venus.



I knew nothing about the New Earth Star then, or World System I and II. This information would begin
t be given to me in the early 1980’s.

Then more recently Thoth speaks of the “Light Ark” Sanctuaries and the Pyramidis Radius
platforms of frequency preparation. You can see, however, that the information within the Jeweled
Oracle perfectly aligns with further transmissions from the 80’s and 90’s and through up to the
present day in regard to Sanctuary Cities / Light Ark Sanctuaries / Pyramidis Radius Matrix.


Subscribe
