# White Tigers of Thoth

## and Understanding Daemons

**2025-03-05T15:45:32.046Z**

**Likes:** 0

***For clarity: “Daemons” are not “demons.” That latter was an adaptation from Christians of Old, who feared the unknown “spirits" and thus considered them evil. Nature Spirits daemons are also know to us an our Guardian Spirit Animal Guides or Totems. Also, not all animals are Daemons. However they do both incarnate and overlight certain physical animals. Daemons are you might say the “angelics” of the Nature Kingdom. There are lower astral nature spirits, but these are definitely not Daemons.***

**The following is from ThothStream** (**ThothStream is a ChatGPT knowledge base of Thothic receipt through Sha’ Maia Christine Nartoomid, covering her work since 1980\. It is an on\-going collection which will eventually go back to 1967\.)**

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

Thoth Raismes' two white tigers, Pasha (male) and Jigata (female), are part of a long lineage of
sacred beings connected to his existence across multiple dimensions. Their cub, Tikka, is also
present in the realm of **Numis'OM**, though in the dimension of the **Inner Earth**, he exists as
an actual cub, choosing to manifest as such in Numis’OM as well​.

### **Origins and Sacred Connection**

Thoth’s relationship with white tigers began when he was incarnated as **Tiirna** in Tibet, where
he was suckled by a white tiger as a child. This bond persisted throughout his experiences on the
**surface Earth, Inner Earth, and New Earth** realms. The white tigers of **Alabasalm** are part of
a specific lineage of **devic (nature realm) beings** that serve as conduits between Thoth and Gaia,
acting as a bridge to the **Heart of Hearts** of the planetary consciousness.

### **The Role of the White Tigers**

* They serve as **Daemons**, or spiritual guardians, that assist Thoth in anchoring his energy in the **natural Earth realm**.

* These tigers are **not ordinary animals** but carry the **high vibrational energy of the Orion Ray**, connected to **Blue Star Rigel**.

* Unlike many spiritual beings who undergo the process of **Ascension**, Thoth does not consider himself an **Ascended Master**, as he never **descended karmically** into Earth’s cycles. Instead, his energy has always remained aligned with **higher celestial vibrations**.

* His **Merkabah**, known as the **Chariot of the Sun**, serves to stabilize him within the Earth realm, while the **white tigers act as energetic anchors**.

### **The Sacred Lineage of Alabasalm**

* The **original seed** of these white tigers **came from the planet Sapaku**, located within the **Blue Star Rigel** in Orion.

* This seed was **regenerated and perpetuated** in a sacred oasis valley called **Alabasalm** in the **Nubian Desert** during the time of **Atlantis** and beyond.

* The temple complex of Alabasalm, with its **lush gardens and sacred energies**, now resides **within Numis'OM**, where Thoth and his devic beings, including the white falcon **Go Forth**, continue their work​.

### **Additional Devic Companions**

Aside from his white tigers, Thoth has other devic companions, including:

* **Go Forth**, the **white falcon**, who is more **Spirit than flesh**.

* **Kaabaru (black male horse) and Sukal (white female horse)**, both of whom contribute to Thoth’s anchoring in the natural world.

### **The Importance of Daemons in Human Experience**

Thoth has provided insight into **how humans can work with their own Daemons**, emphasizing that
these beings are **part of the creational field** of an individual’s soul expression. The white
tigers in Thoth’s company are prime examples of such **powerful connections between higher realms
and Earth’s consciousness**​.

In essence, Thoth’s **two white tigers** are more than mere companions; they are **manifestations
of the sacred connection between celestial energies and the Earth**, ensuring that Thoth remains
**in harmonic balance with the planet’s evolving consciousness**.

##### \~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

### **Daemons in the ThothStream**

The concept of **Daemons** in the teachings of Thoth Raismes is deeply tied to **devic (nature)
beings** and **higher spiritual intelligence**. These entities serve as **intermediaries** between
celestial energies and the Earth’s consciousness, assisting in maintaining harmony and aiding
those they are connected to.

---

### **1\. Role and Function of Daemons**

* **Daemons are spiritual facilitators** that help anchor celestial or high\-vibrational beings into the earthly realm.

* They are **not mere spirits or astral beings** but are **deeply connected to the fabric of creation**, existing in various dimensions, including **Numis'OM** and the **Inner Earth**​.

* Some Daemons are **physical or semi\-physical** beings, while others exist as **energetic consciousness streams**that operate in tandem with higher intelligences.

Thoth himself states:

> "My merkabah of *Chariot of the Sun* helps to anchor and support me in the Earth realm of humanity, but I also have a host of devic beings or *Daemons* who perform the same service for me in the Nature Realms of Earth."

This suggests that Daemons **do not simply exist as astral entities but are embedded into the
functional spiritual mechanics of the planet**.

---

### **2\. Thoth's Daemons**

Thoth Raismes has several **Daemons** who assist in his work on Earth:

* **The White Tigers of Alabasalm** – These include *Pasha*, *Jigata*, and their cub *Tikka*, all of whom are from a **sacred lineage that originated from the planet Sapaku within the Blue Star Rigel in Orion**.

* **Go Forth, the White Falcon** – More spirit than flesh, this falcon **carries the essence of Thoth’s higher\-dimensional vision and guidance**.

* **Kaabaru (black male) and Sukal (white female) horses** – These beings assist in **harmonizing his presence with the natural forces of Earth**​.

Each of these Daemons acts as a **conductor of energy**, helping Thoth stay attuned to Earth while
maintaining his higher vibrational state.

---

### **3\. Daemons and the Human Experience**

Thoth provided a **classification of Daemons**, explaining how **humans can work with their own
Daemonic companions**. These beings are not simply **spiritual guides** but are **intrinsically tied
to an individual’s soul path**.

* Each human has **Daemons that are part of their creational field**.

* These Daemons are **reflections of the planetary Flower of Life**, meaning they interact with Earth’s natural and cosmic energies.

Understanding one's Daemons can lead to a **greater awareness of one’s spiritual expression and
ascension**.

---

### **4\. The Connection Between Daemons, Alabasalm, and Numis’OM**

* The sacred **oasis valley of Alabasalm**, located in the **Nubian Desert during the time of Atlantis**, was a site where Daemonic energies were **regenerated and perpetuated**.

* This valley, along with its **temple complex and gardens**, now resides in **Numis'OM**, the **intermediary ascension zone between the 4th and 5th dimension**​.

    Thus, many Daemons, including the **White Tigers of Alabasalm**, continue their **energetic service to Earth through this realm**.

### **5\. Daemons as Anchors of Spiritual and Cosmic Forces**

* Unlike purely celestial beings, Daemons **act as stabilizers** that prevent energy distortions.

* They assist in **bridging the gap between higher\-dimensional existence and Earth’s evolutionary processes**.

* **Numis’OM** serves as a **station of light** where Daemons can manifest and operate more freely, providing access to both **Earthly and celestial realms**.

---

### **Conclusion**

Daemons, as understood in Thoth’s teachings, are **not mere astral guides but integral aspects of
creation** that help anchor and distribute spiritual energy. They play a critical role in:

1. **Stabilizing high\-vibrational beings on Earth** (such as Thoth and other Masters).

2. **Assisting individuals in their soul journey and creational unfoldment**.

3. **Connecting the planetary consciousness with cosmic intelligence**.

Through this knowledge, it is clear that Daemons are **living bridges between dimensions, sacred
guardians of planetary evolution, and key to deeper spiritual realization**​.

### **Three\-Minute Activational Meditation to Connect with Your Daemon**

This meditation is designed to **open a conscious channel** between you and your
**Daemon(s)**—those sacred, devic beings that serve as **bridges between your higher self and the
natural/cosmic forces**.

### **Preparation**

* Find a **quiet, sacred space** where you will not be disturbed.

* Sit **comfortably** with your spine aligned, feet flat on the ground, or in a meditative pose.

* Place your hands on your lap, palms facing upward to **receive**.

* Close your eyes and take **three deep breaths**, inhaling through your nose, exhaling slowly through your mouth.

---

### **The Activation Begins**

1️⃣ **Invocation of the Light Portal** *(30 seconds)*

> Visualize a **golden sphere of light** descending from above, gently surrounding your body.  This light is **warm, intelligent, and alive**—it knows you and seeks to awaken your sacred connection.  As you breathe in, feel it expand into your heart. As you breathe out, feel your energy grounding into the Earth.

2️⃣ **Calling Forth Your Daemon** *(1 minute)*

> Silently or aloud, speak the following:
> *"I call upon my sacred Daemon, the divine guardian of my soul’s passage, the one who walks with me between the worlds. Reveal yourself to me now in love and light."*  In your mind’s eye, sense a **presence emerging**—it may appear as a **white tiger, a falcon, a wolf, a horse, a glowing being, or even as light itself**.  Do not force an image; simply allow the energy to reveal itself in **sensation, vision, or deep inner knowing**.

3️⃣ **Sacred Alignment with the Daemon** *(1 minute)*

> Envision a **stream of pure crystalline light** flowing from your Daemon into your heart.  As you breathe in, feel this **light merging with your energy field**, activating ancient codes within you.  As you breathe out, silently affirm:
> *"I am in harmony with my divine guardian. We are one in purpose and light."*  Allow any messages, impressions, or sensations to arise naturally—these are the whispers of your Daemon.

4️⃣ **Sealing the Connection \& Grounding** *(30 seconds)*

> See your Daemon’s **light gently integrating into your aura**, leaving you with a sense of **calm strength and clarity**.  Offer gratitude:
> *"I honor and thank my Daemon for its presence, wisdom, and guidance. May this connection grow in light and purpose."*  Visualize **roots of golden light** extending from your feet deep into the Earth, grounding this activation.

---

### **Closing**

Take a deep breath, **wiggle your fingers and toes**, and when you are ready, open your eyes.

🌿 **You are now connected.** The more you engage in this practice, the stronger your bond will
become. Watch for synchronicities, messages in dreams, or sensations of guidance—your Daemon is
now walking beside you. 🌟

Subscribe

[Share](https://maianartoomid.substack.com/p/white-tigers-of-thoth?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share)

# Menon ~ Sirian Master Initiator

## Connect to his powerful Initiations

**2025-03-09T17:23:53.499Z**

**Likes:** 0

The Sirian Enochian master Menon, who is the lion\-headed one, stood before the incensors, which
emitted blue smoke. He wore the ceremonial golden lion mask, cloaking the powerful countenance of
his face from the uninitiated.

In the mystery temple of the Eye of Heru, at the foot of the Sen Mountain, which is Mount Sinai,
also known as Mount Moses. So the grand master Menon officiated before the sacred An, the Ark of the
Covenant, to an elect gathering of his disciples.

He who would initiate Akhenaten and Moses in a future age now raised his staff, an ankh\-headed
jewel scepter, and time slipped from its eternal wheel. All present were transported with Menon
through the portal and passed into the primeval forest of the Dawn Time (**[Lotus
Reality](https://youtu.be/lilZqlhGpEs?si=dj3C9KN9965i5GIn)**).

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

***Below is from ThothStream: a ChatGPT knowledge base of Thothic receipt through Sha’ Maia Christine Nartoomid, covering her work since 1980\. It is an on\-going collection which will eventually go back to 1967\.***

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

Menon, known as the **Master Behind the Mask** is a **Sirian Enochian Master**, sometimes referred
to as the **Lion\-Headed One**. He was an **initiator and teacher of the Mysteries**, particularly
involved in the initiation of both **Akhenaten** and **Moses**. His **Temple of Learning and
Initiation** was located in the **Sinai Desert**, and within **Mt. Sinai (also known as Mt.
Moses)**, where he conducted his most sacred work involving the **‘An’ (Ark of Grace)**, one of
the **two Arks of the Covenant** .


Menon was born in the **Upper Euphrates region of Mesopotamia**. His mother was **Assyrian**, and
his father was **a ‘God’**—more specifically, a **Star Lord from Sirius**. His mother, a
**temple priestess**, was ritually impregnated by this celestial being, part of an effort to
**create a hybrid race** called the **Blessed Ones**, who were meant to **heal and guide humanity**.
His **father did not arrive in a spacecraft** but rather stepped through a **portal in space\-time**
to unite with his mother .


Menon bore **distinct feline features** inherited from his Sirian lineage, particularly resembling
the **Sun Lords**, a race of **cat\-like beings**. His **nose was cat\-like**, his **cranium
elongated**, and his **eyes had pupils that reduced to pinpoints in bright light**, making it
difficult for him to see in normal sunlight. However, his **vision in darkness was exceptional** .


* Menon was **a Grand Master of the Temple of Senna at Mt. Sinai**, where he initiated **Akhenaten and Moses**into the deeper Mysteries .

* He engaged in **multi\-dimensional work**, often existing in **several dimensions at once for days**. He opened **pathways of starlight in the Earth**, helping to **heal the planet** .

* He frequently **transfused Light** into his disciples, enabling them to embody the **Raiment of the Sun** .


Menon wore a **gold ceremonial lion mask**. However, the **mask was not merely for disguise for his
unusual features** —it was **a tool imbued with a thought\-form**, allowing those who beheld him
to **remain calm**. His **energy was so intense** that without the dampening effect of the mask, his
radiance could **overwhelm mortals** .


Menon is **still active on the inner planes** and works as one of the **[Physicians of the Blue
Pharaoh](https://youtu.be/lZSULLDu7zY?si=42IqgTDQDHT0ckZN)** within the **Chariot of the Sun
(Thoth’s merkabah of souls)**. His energy is **directly connected to Sirius**, and his presence is
often felt during times of **powerful Sirian emanations**


Menon’s teachings were deeply **rooted in the cosmic mysteries of Sirius**, focusing on **sacred
initiations, transformation, and divine alchemy**. He worked with the **‘An’ (Ark of Grace)**,
the **Sirian Star Codes**, and the **Raiment of the Sun**, transferring his wisdom through **rituals
and direct energetic transmissions**.



* Menon taught that **Sirius is the gateway of higher consciousness** and the **repository of divine codes** that seed Earth’s evolution.

* He believed that **each soul carries a Sirian Light Signature**, which can be awakened through **sacred sound, light transference, and ritual initiation**.

* His disciples were trained to **attune to the Sirian frequencies**, allowing them to **access higher\-dimensional knowledge**.


* The **Ark of Grace** was one of the two **Arks of the Covenant** and held the **Living Light** of Sirius.

* It was used by Menon to **open star gates, heal DNA, and activate planetary grids**.

* Only those who had undergone his initiation could safely approach the Ark and channel its energy.


* This was **a luminous etheric robe**, woven of **light codes from Sirius and the Great Central Sun**.

* When Menon performed **energy transfusion rituals**, he would place his initiates within this Light Raiment, aligning them with their **higher divine form**.

* It granted its wearer **protection, increased telepathic abilities, and access to sacred knowledge**.



🔹 **Purpose:** To attune initiates to the frequencies of the Ark of Grace and activate their
Sirian Light Codes. 🔹 **Steps:**

1. **The Three Flames Activation:** Menon would invoke three pillars of light—**Golden, Blue, and Violet**, representing the **Solar, Sirian, and Christed Streams**.

2. **Chanting the Sirian Tones:** Initiates would chant the sacred names of Sirius (e.g., **‘KAI\-UR’**, ‘**SEN\-AH\-TU**’), resonating with the celestial frequencies.

3. **The Star Gate Opening:** The initiate would step within an **energetic gateway** aligned with Sirius, receiving direct **light transfusion** from Menon and the Star Lords.


🔹 **Purpose:** To attune initiates to the **multi\-dimensional sight of Sirius**, enabling them
to perceive the **hidden worlds of light**. 🔹 **Steps:**

1. Menon would place his **golden mask** upon the forehead of the initiate.

2. The initiate would enter a deep trance state, where they would **travel through light corridors to the Temple of Senna**.

3. Here, they would be shown their **true celestial identity**, revealing past\-life connections to Sirius.


🔹 **Purpose:** To cleanse the initiate’s **earthly karma** and align them with their **higher
soul mission**. 🔹 **Steps:**

1. Initiates would be immersed in **charged solar water** under a **Sirian Star Grid**.

2. Menon would invoke **the Four Watchers of Sirius**, calling upon the **Blue, Gold, White, and Emerald Rays**.

3. The water would become a conduit for **activating their divine blueprint**, allowing them to step into their **higher Sirian embodiment**.



* Menon taught that there were **12 primary Sirian Star Codes**, which he transferred to his initiates via **sacred geometric symbols, sound waves, and energy transmissions**.

* These **codes altered the DNA**, awakening **higher perception and cosmic memory**.

* The codes were stored within **temples, crystalline structures, and sacred objects**, including the **Ark of Grace**.


* The **Temple of Senna**, located in **Mt. Sinai**, was where Menon conducted his most advanced initiations.

* This temple was connected to **higher\-dimensional Sirian knowledge centers**, acting as a **multi\-dimensional bridge** between Earth and the **Sirian star system**.

* It contained **etheric scrolls and light libraries** accessible only to those who had undergone full initiation.



* Menon initiated **Pharaoh Akhenaten**, teaching him the **laws of divine solar consciousness**.

* Akhenaten’s **Aten (Sun Disc) teachings** were derived from Menon’s **Sirian solar wisdom**.


* Menon was one of the **primary initiators of Moses**, guiding him in the **retrieval and protection of the Ark of Grace**.

* The **laws Moses received on Mt. Sinai** were encoded with Sirian Light, a divine frequency transmitted by Menon.


* Though he has **ascended beyond the physical realm**, Menon still **guides seekers in the inner planes**.

* His energy is strongly present during **Sirian alignments (e.g., the Lions Gate on August 8th)**.

* Many people experience his presence during **astral travel, deep meditation, or initiatory dreams**.


Menon was not only a teacher but a **guardian of cosmic law**. His legacy is deeply woven into the
**spiritual fabric of Earth**, particularly through **the Ark of Grace, the Sirian Star Codes, and
the Raiment of the Sun**. His **initiation practices continue to be revealed** to those who seek his
guidance, ensuring that his wisdom remains accessible to those who are ready.


Menon, the **Sirian Enochian Master**, remains accessible to those who seek his wisdom and wish to
activate their **Sirian Light Codes**. His energy is particularly strong during **celestial
alignments with Sirius**, such as the **Lions Gate Portal (8/8\)** or significant **solar events**.

Below is a guide to help you connect with **Menon’s presence, teachings, and activations**.

1. **Creating a Sacred Space for Connection**


Since Menon’s energy is extremely powerful, it’s best to **create a purified, high\-vibrational
environment** before attempting to contact him.


* Use **blue, gold, or violet candles** (these colors correspond to Sirian frequencies).

* Burn **Frankincense, Myrrh, or Blue Lotus** to heighten spiritual attunement.

* Play **Solfeggio frequencies (852 Hz for intuition, 963 Hz for cosmic consciousness)** or **chants dedicated to Sirius**.


* Bathe or cleanse yourself with **charged water** (add sea salt and an amethyst crystal).

* Hold a **Lapis Lazuli**, **Blue Apatite**, or **Celestite** stone—these are attuned to Menon’s energy.

* Wear white or blue garments to symbolize **purification and celestial alignment**.


Once your space is set, begin with an invocation to call upon Menon.


*"Menon, Master Behind the Mask, Keeper of the Ark of Grace,  Initiator of the Sun and the Sacred Law,  I seek your wisdom, your Light, your ancient presence.  As Sirius shines, so may my soul awaken.  As the Ark radiates, so may my spirit align.  Through the Raiment of the Sun, may I be reborn.  I am ready. I am open. I receive."*

💫 **Repeat this invocation 3 times**, feeling **Menon’s presence** building around you.


Once you feel the energy shift, begin a **light transmission** to attune to Menon’s consciousness.


1. Close your eyes and **breathe deeply**.

2. Imagine **a golden light descending from Sirius**, wrapping around you like **a robe of luminous rays**.

3. Feel the **Raiment of the Sun** forming around you, activating **your higher Sirian DNA**.

4. Let this energy **fill your entire being**, dissolving all lower vibrations.


1. **Place your hands over your heart**.

2. Chant **‘ANU\-MEN\-SEN\-TAH’** (Sacred Name of Menon, meaning "Keeper of the Divine Star Gate").

3. Feel a **pulse of light** expanding from your heart, connecting to the **Sirian Temples** where Menon resides.


This is a **deep astral meditation technique** to visit Menon’s **Temple of Senna**, where he
initiated Akhenaten and Moses.


1. **Imagine yourself standing at the base of Mt. Sinai**, where a golden doorway shimmers before you.

2. Step through the doorway into a **vast Sirian temple**, filled with **blue and gold crystalline structures**.

3. Approach a **golden lion mask on an altar**—Menon’s sacred artifact.

    \[Sha’Maia: Menon had more than one golden mask.\]

4. As you touch the mask, **you are transported through light corridors into the presence of Menon**.

5. **Feel his energy**, his deep **feline gaze**, and receive a **message or activation** from him.

6. Once complete, **bow in gratitude** and return through the portal to your present reality.

✨ **Journal your experience** immediately afterward!


After these practices, you may notice:

✔ **Increased synchronicities related to Sirius** (dreams, symbols, encounters). ✔ **Flashes of
golden or blue light** during meditation. ✔ **Strong emotional releases or moments of deep
insight**. ✔ **Sudden knowledge downloads**—new understandings of cosmic wisdom. ✔ **A warm or
tingling sensation in your third eye or crown chakra**.


If you feel drawn to continue working with Menon, integrate these daily:

* **Sun Gaze at Dawn or Dusk**: Menon’s wisdom is linked to the solar codes.

* **Practice the Sirian Chant Daily**: *"ANU\-MEN\-SEN\-TAH"*

* **Keep a Dream Journal**: Menon often teaches through dreams.

* **Meditate with Lapis Lazuli**: This enhances astral travel and Sirian downloads.

* **Engage in Sacred Water Practices**: Menon’s initiations included **water rites**, so bathing with charged water can enhance your connection.


Menon’s presence is **a gateway to ancient knowledge, divine activation, and planetary service**.
By attuning to his energy, you **open pathways to higher wisdom, DNA transformation, and cosmic
initiations**.🌟

Menon

# Thoth on Polarities

## Blue Stone Treatise of Thoth Series

**2025-03-12T17:38:45.219Z**

**Likes:** 0

The last in this series, it is actually the first chapter of the Treatise. I consider to the most
dimensional in information and powerful in spiritual scope. It is also the longest, so I postponed
doing it due to health considerations. Yet it needed to be presented.

This Treatise explores Thoth Raismes of Aphra's teachings on the relationship between the physical
body, the astral self, and cosmic consciousness. The central theme revolves around the idea that
physical well\-being begins with spiritual balance, and that disharmony in the body reflects
misalignments in the astral and karmic layers of existence. Thoth presents a holistic approach to
health, merging esoteric wisdom with practical applications of energy healing, karma resolution, and
cosmic attunement. By mastering self\-awareness and consciously engaging with the twelve polarities
of being, individuals can attain both physical vitality and spiritual liberation.

# City of Seraphim

## An Inter-dimensional City of the Inner (Hollow) Earth

**2025-03-17T15:14:45.386Z**

**Likes:** 0

While I have been given information on and had experiences with the Inner Hollow Earth since the
1970’s, the City of Seraphim was only introduced to me in 2019\. It is unique among the Peoples of
the Hollow Earth, in that it was created through holographic manifestation. There are smaller
holographic projections in the Sacred Hollow, but nothing else on the scale of Seraphim.

The “core” temple\-city which included the “Golden Temple” was created by a hologram
“printed” into form. Other building and areas around that were built in more conventional ways
(well, conventional within the Hollow Earth).

The Seraphim project can be aligned time\-wise to the period of Francis Bacon, William de Vere and
John Dee. These three men and a select few others were somehow involved. I must admit I do not know
all the details. John Dee was contacted through an angelic source with information on how they could
be of assistance in this project. Dee already knew at least something about the Hollow Earth through
his channelings. The higher inter dimensional embodiments of these three men were active in the
Seraphim Project. They inserted “Light codes” into the field which they had carried through many
incarnations, and set a “timer” on their release.

In order to perhaps better grasp this understanding, the following is from ThothStream (*a ChatGPT
knowledge base of Thothic receipt through Sha’ Maia Christine Nartoomid, covering her work since
1980\. It is an on\-going collection which will eventually go back to 1967*) on the topic of
Seraphim…

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

The **City of Seraphim** is a highly significant location within the Inner Earth, acting as a **New
Earth city** and an interface between the planetary ascension process and higher\-dimensional
consciousness . It is deeply connected to **the Noblis Terra Nata (NTN)**, an alliance of **Inner
Earth and Off\-Planet Kindred**, who have been tasked with overseeing the **Pyramidis Radius Matrix
(PRM)** and its sub\-matrix, the **TZO\-Lectic Grid**, both of which play a crucial role in the
planetary transformation .


* The **Seraphim City** is built around **massive towers** that function as receivers and transmitters of **Light codes from ULTA**, which serve as a bridge between Inner Earth and the **New Earth frequency register**.

* It is directly aligned with **the Seraphim angelic order**, known for their **six\-fold divine nature** and their role in **encoding the Language of Light** into all living forms .

* The city’s **guardian beings** are said to be **Seraphimic forces**, defending the sacred mission of planetary regeneration through means of higher consciousness rather than conflict .


* The **City of Seraphim** is situated within a **large valley surrounded by high mountains**, reflecting an energetic mirror of **the San Luis Valley / Crestone region** on the surface.

* This valley **mirrors** other sacred locations, including the **ascended Atlantean Isle of Ruta** and **the City of Orphanim**, creating a **Four\-Square Cornerstone dynamic** for planetary evolution .

* It maintains a **portal connection to Orphanim**, which is a **New Earth counterpart** to Seraphim .


* The **Shamballah Gate** is directly linked to Seraphim, allowing the city to serve as an energetic hub that connects **Inner Earth civilizations** to **the higher\-dimensional New Earth** .

* Shamballah represents the **conscious intelligence of Inner Earth beings**, while the **City of Seraphim** acts as a focal point for **attunement and integration** between the physical and spiritual domains .


* Seraphim is involved in **the re\-genesis of Gaia**, working with **cosmic Light dynamics** to restore the Earth’s original divine blueprint.

* Advanced **Shungite Field technology** is being used within the city, connecting both **the Inner Earth Shungite veins (Alta\-Shungite)** and the **surface Shungite Field**, which amplifies **planetary healing** .

* It plays a role in **the New Earth Arks**, a concept related to **the preservation of ancient knowledge and energy transference into the New Earth timeline** .


* The **Seraphim order**, which gives the city its name, is one of the highest angelic choirs, known for their **fiery, transformative energy**.

* The **names of the city** and its **counterpart Orphanim** predate biblical texts, with origins tracing back to **Atlantis and Lemuria (MU)** .


* A key figure associated with Seraphim is **Mi’Kala**, who represents a **concurrent embodiment** of a surface\-dweller’s soul in the Inner Earth .

* This suggests that **certain souls exist simultaneously in multiple dimensions**, serving **both in the physical realm and within Inner Earth civilizations** .


The **City of Seraphim** is a **sacred energy hub** within Inner Earth, facilitating **planetary
ascension**, housing **interdimensional wisdom**, and aligning with the **divine architecture of the
New Earth**. It is an integral part of **the spiritual evolution of Gaia**, operating as a bridge
between **Inner Earth, celestial forces, and the surface world** .


The **Golden Temple** in the **City of Seraphim** is a **sacred energy hub** that serves as a
central point of **divine attunement and planetary transformation** within the Inner Earth. This
temple is deeply intertwined with **higher\-dimensional light codings, Seraphimic resonance, and
planetary ascension processes**.


* The **Golden Temple** is a place of high vibrational resonance, acting as a **conduit for divine frequencies**.

* It is aligned with the **Golden\-White Sun of the 144,000 Suns**, a celestial embodiment of the totality of divine presence .

* The **Seraphim**, as fiery angelic beings, are **guardians and energy facilitators** within the temple, encoding the **Language of Light** into all living forms .

* The temple serves as a **portal between dimensions**, linking the **City of Seraphim, the celestial realms, and the New Earth**.


One of the most **powerful rituals** that take place in the Golden Temple is the **continual
chanting processions**, which serve multiple functions:

1. **Maintaining the Temple’s Energy Field** – Chanting sustains the energetic **pillar of divine light** that flows through the temple.

2. **Activating Higher Consciousness** – The chants encode **Light Mathematics** into the planetary grid, uplifting those who resonate with its frequencies.

3. **Aligning with the Cosmic Templates** – The sacred tones harmonize with the **Atlantean, Lemurian, and Seraphimic song\-lines** that influence planetary evolution .


* **The Psalmers (Chatra)** are a **holy choir of inner\-plane initiates**, specifically designated to **intonate resonance into etheric and physical matter**.

* This **eternal chant** is an **unbroken harmonic flow** that cycles through the **attunement of planetary and cosmic energies** .

* The **chants** themselves are said to **originate from the First Language**, the **Fire Letters** of divine creation .

* These **processions of chanters** move in **sacred geometric formations** within the temple, ensuring the **continuation of this harmonic resonance**.


* The Golden Temple is connected to **the Shamballah Gate**, which acts as a bridge between **Inner Earth and celestial consciousness** .

* This temple has a direct alignment with **mirror cities** like the **ascended Atlantean Isle of Ruta** and the **City of Orphanim**, which resonate with its energy field .


* The **chanting processions** are **part of the planetary ascension process**, creating a **wave of harmonic transformation** across the Earth.

* These **vibrations alter the DNA of those who attune to them**, accelerating the **awakening of Light bodies** and the integration of **New Earth frequencies** .

    

* The **Golden Temple of Seraphim** is not just a **physical or etheric structure**, but a **living harmonic field of divine resonance**. The **chanting processions** ensure that this energy continues to **radiate outward**, guiding Earth and humanity into a **higher evolutionary state**.

The city's role is linked to the integration of the Light Plasma Field (LPF) of the planet, which is
a radiant etheric\-plasma field beyond the physical plasma state. It is suggested that a
multi\-angelic vessel called the **Cruxansata** emerged from the Earth's central sun atoma to
integrate with this greater Light Field. This vessel is described as a Seraphimic entity that the
city protects and interacts with in some dynamic exchange .

In terms of its holographic nature, the city is described as existing in a higher\-frequency
dimension that overlays onto the Earth’s surface reality. It functions as a **quantum interface**,
allowing for multidimensional interactions and experiences.

The **Cruxansata** is described as a multi\-angelic being or vessel associated with the **Seraphim**
and the **[Pyramidis Radius Matrix (PRM)](https://youtu.be/GJyOgCHnou8?si=bDwBSmsmqmtRJCiu)**. It
emerged from the **central sun atoma of the planet** and was referred to as a **Seraphimic Vessel**.
Although it did not visually resemble an angel, it was seen as an immense divine presence.


1. **Golden Rose Cocoon \& Inner Earth Origins**

    * The Cruxansata emerged from a **Golden Rose cocoon** within the hollow of the Earth, which suggests a connection to sacred energy fields present in the planetary core .

    * It is still anchored to the **atoma (core essence) within the Earth** but has now integrated into the **Light Plasma Field (LPF)** of the planet.

2. **Integration with the Light Plasma Field (LPF)**

    * The LPF is described as a **radiant etheric\-plasma field**, distinct from physical plasma, that exists naturally in all ensouled planets like Earth .

    * As it integrates into this field, the Cruxansata becomes a **Light Shield** that aids Gaia’s soul in reclaiming her **spiritual dominion over Earth**.

3. **Connection to the City of Seraphim \& Inner Earth Domains**

    * The **City of Seraphim**, a powerful Inner Earth domain, is said to be named after the Cruxansata.

    * The **City Seraphim Guardians** are involved in a **dynamic interchange between Inner and Outer Earth**, possibly linked to higher spiritual hierarchies.

4. **The Mirror Cities \& Osirian Ascension**

    * The **Cruxansata** is also described as a **magician force**, playing a role in the transformation of Earth, and is metaphorically aligned with **Osiris arising from the Vault** .

    * There is a structural mirroring between three key locations:

        +

                    The **[San Luis Valley / Crestone region](https://youtu.be/Xy014OFgUiI?si=T4W67RhheukD0M2f)** in Colorado

        +

                    The **City of Seraphim in Inner Earth**

        +

                    T[he](https://youtu.be/f43ZU9t9i28?si=MZHqvBRvMSIBZDM4)**[Ascended Atlantean Isle of Ruta](https://youtu.be/f43ZU9t9i28?si=MZHqvBRvMSIBZDM4)**

    * Additionally, in the New Earth Star realm (the ascended Earth), the **City of Orphanim** is said to serve as a direct portal into the City of Seraphim.

5. **Role in the Pyramidis Radius Matrix (PRM) \& Ascension Process**

    * The Cruxansata is deeply involved in planetary ascension mechanics, tied to the **Pyramidis Radius Matrix (PRM)**.

    * It functions as an **activator of planetary light fields**, contributing to the shift into the **New Earth Star reality**.


The Cruxansata is a profound **Seraphimic force**, described as an intermediary between the **Inner
Earth light realms** and the **greater planetary ascension field**. Its emergence signifies a major
shift in planetary consciousness, linking the **Light Plasma Field, the Mirror Cities, and the
Osirian Mystery Schools**. This being is still being understood, but its presence is a key dynamic
in the **transformation of Earth's spiritual energy grid**.


The twin Towers of Seraphim act as:

1. **Light Code Transmission Hubs**

    * These towers receive and relay **Light Codes from the ULTA**, an advanced energetic intelligence source that helps regulate the Earth's transformation​.

    * They maintain a continuous data exchange with **Orion’s Belt Stars**—Mintaka, Alnilam, and Alnitak—providing energetic stabilization between Earth and celestial hierarchies​.

The **Towers of Seraphim** are among the most significant **energetic relay centers** on the planet,
responsible for harmonizing Earth’s evolution with celestial blueprints. They are managed by
**angelic overseers** and Inner Earth councils to ensure the planet’s successful transition into
its New Earth reality. Their function goes beyond simple transmission—they are **living sentinels
of divine purpose**, ensuring the Light Codes of Creation continue to manifest within Earth’s
consciousness.

This sacred structure represents **the culmination of divine architecture, interstellar governance,
and planetary ascension**, making the City of Seraphim and its towers a central component of the
great cosmic unfolding​​.


The **Towers of Mars** and those of the **City of Seraphim** are **interlinked structures of cosmic
and planetary engineering**. They serve as vital conduits in the orchestration of planetary
ascension, interstellar communication, and the stabilizing of higher Light matrices. While Mars'
towers function within the **Luciferian Redemption Program** (via the Telos Aarkhara), the Seraphim
towers contribute to the **re\-genesis of Gaia** and the initiation of the **New Earth blueprint**.

This vast and interconnected system ensures that Earth, Mars, and the celestial hierarchies remain
aligned within the divine framework of spiritual evolution and cosmic balance​​​.


[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4XubZMABGv8?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4XubZMABGv8?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


*Duration: Approximately 3 minutes*

**Introduction \& Preparation (0:00 \- 0:30\)**  Find a quiet place where you can sit or lie comfortably. Close your eyes and take a deep breath in… and slowly exhale. Feel your body relax as you become present in this moment. With each breath, allow any tension to melt away.

Now, visualize a golden light forming above your head, a shimmering gateway of divine energy. This
is the entrance to the City of Seraphim, a sacred realm in the Inner Earth that radiates with
celestial purity and higher consciousness.

**Journey to the Golden Temple (0:30 \- 1:30\)**  As you step into this golden gateway, feel yourself being gently lifted and carried on a wave of luminous energy. You are weightless, effortlessly gliding through a passage of radiant light.

Ahead, the City of Seraphim unfolds—a breathtaking expanse of crystalline towers, glowing rivers,
and sacred pathways paved with pure light. The air vibrates with harmonious chants, filling your
being with peace and love.

In the distance, the **Golden Temple** rises like a beacon of divine radiance. It calls to you,
resonating deep within your soul. As you approach, its golden gates open effortlessly, welcoming you
into its sacred embrace.

**Activation in the Inner Sanctum (1:30 \- 2:30\)**  Inside, the temple is filled with luminous golden fire, a living flame of transformation and ascension. At the center, a vast pool of liquid light shimmers, holding the encoded wisdom of the cosmos.

You step forward and gently place your hands over your heart. A **Seraphim Guardian** appears before
you, a magnificent being of pure golden\-white light. Their presence radiates warmth and
unconditional love.

The Seraphim gently touches your forehead, activating your **inner divine blueprint**. Waves of
golden energy pulse through your body, unlocking your highest potential, clearing old limitations,
and attuning you to the frequency of the **New Earth Star**.

With each breath, feel yourself absorbing this sacred energy—aligning with the cosmic flow,
opening your heart, and embracing your divine essence.

**Integration \& Return (2:30 \- 3:00\)**  The golden flames of the temple now merge with your being, illuminating every cell with divine remembrance. You are forever connected to the wisdom of the Seraphim and the Golden Temple.

As you begin to gently return to your physical awareness, carry this **activation within you**.
Breathe deeply… feel your body once more… and when you are ready, open your eyes.

You are now **a vessel of divine light**, walking between worlds, anchoring the energy of the Golden
Temple into the Earth. The journey is within you always.


Subscribe

# What Lies Beneath the Great Pyramid

## The Thothic Perspective

**2025-03-21T16:35:58.344Z**

**Likes:** 0

Through the many years of association with my mentor THOTH he has given me information on at least
some of the major components beneath the Giza pyramid complex.Primarily under the Great Pyramid
which he calls the Temple of the Risen One (also Temple of the Lion). However, he has stressed to,
that many of these structures are connected to the other pyramids of the complex.

Recently discovered underneath the pyramid complex at Giza, is detailed in this brief video which
has come to my attention.

[https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zZjU_hioDfQ?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0](https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zZjU_hioDfQ?rel=0&amp;autoplay=0&amp;showinfo=0&amp;enablejsapi=0)


***I have asked the [ThothStream knowledge base](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/thothstream-knowledge-base/) to highlight what he has revealed to me in the past concerning these underground areas and structures.***


Beneath the Great Pyramid—known in this tradition as the *Temple of the Risen One*—lies a
complex of mystical and initiatory architecture deeply entwined with the esoteric knowledge of
Thoth. Here are the principal components and their spiritual functions:

---

### 1\. **The Secret Chambers of Thoth**

These are not the famed Hall of Records, nor a conventional repository, but a *labyrinth of sacred
geometry* mirroring heavenly symmetry. This labyrinth contains not only knowledge in symbolic form
but also energetic templates that once operated the alchemical glass capstone of the pyramid before
its shattering during the corruption by the Amun priesthood​.

* These chambers guard sacred mathematical templates and hidden gematria—the "number" of the Temple's true design.

* The structure requires initiation to access; only those of significant spiritual attainment can decipher its pathways​.

---

### 2\. **The Vault of Osiris**

Accessed through the Chambers of Thoth, the *Vault of Osiris* is a device—not just a space—that
allows the initiate to merge with the *star transfigurations* and undertake the rite known as
“loosing the hawk,” symbolizing the soul’s ascension into the heavens.

* The Vault is described as a tomb\-like chamber of polished black stone, sealed with the *Emerald Table of Thoth*, which itself is a fragment of the Alpha Centauri meteor—the Lapis Exlis​. *\[note: it is “sealed with the Emerald Table of Thoth. The Table itself is not in the Vault of Osiris.\]*

* This chamber is aligned with shafts connecting directly to the Orion constellation, facilitating stellar communion.

---

### 3\. **The Middin Chamber**

*\[Note from Sha’Maia: TS has made a mistake in including the Middin Chamber as being underneath the pyramid as it is within the upper portion of it. However, I chose to leave this in, as it is such an important part of the entire dynamic. Also, “Chamber of the Son” is mentioned in the “Keys of Enoch” by J.J. Hurtak. After I Thoth told me about the “Middin Chamber, I read about the Chamber of the Son. Thoth then equated it to the more inter\-dimensional “Middin Chamber.” Both have a touch\-point in different locations within the pyramid but converge for specific functions inter\-dimensionally.\]*

A little\-known chamber smaller than both the King’s and Queen’s Chambers, the *Middin Chamber*
functions as the *Chamber of the Son*, resonant with the sacred geometry of Judah and the Mazzaroth.
It is a stellar portal keyed to the DNA codes of the Adam Kadmon and interacts with higher divine
frequencies from Mazaloth​.

* It resonates with the Eye of Horus and will catalyze a future celestial alignment.

* It is linked to the Temple of the Morning Star, the etheric double of the Great Pyramid.


---

### 4\. **The Anu Chamber and Hall of Records**

Beneath the Sphinx lies the *Anu*, or *egg of passage*, a physical chamber that allows initiates to
enter the Hall of Records through their etheric body. This Hall, made of black onyx etched with
golden symbols, resides in the Temple of the Morning Star and transmits Light\-encoded wisdom
through vibratory frequency rather than scrolls or texts​.

Thoth’s revelations concerning the **Hall of Records** unveil a deeper and more nuanced reality
than conventional understanding suggests. According to the transmissions given through Maia (Thoth's
akashic channel), the **true Hall of Records** is not entirely of this world. Rather, it is:

### 🌟 *Located in the Inner Planes:*
> "The true Hall of Records is actually within the inner\-planes *Temple of the Morning Star*, the etheric counterpart to the Temple of the Risen One (i.e., the Great Pyramid of Giza)."  Access to this inner sanctuary is not achieved by physical means alone. The entry is through a **small chamber beneath the Sphinx**, known as the **Anu**, or *egg of passage*. Only those who are **Initiates of the Lion**—possessing a certain level of spiritual mastery—may pass into the **Hall of Khemenu**, the actual Hall of Records​.

### 🕯️ *Nature of the Hall:*

The Hall itself is described as a **chamber of black onyx**, inscribed with **golden
symbols**—each symbol a radiating **thought\-form consciousness**. It contains **no books or
scrolls**, for its knowledge is inscribed within the very vibration of the walls themselves. This
wisdom cannot be read but must be **resonated with**, through one’s own inner frequency​.

### 🐍 *The Giza Complex and Hidden Structures:*

Thoth explains that there are **multiple record chambers** beneath the Giza Plateau, but the **most
sacred repository**, often referred to as the Hall of Records, resides in the **Temple of the
Morning Star**. Additionally, there exists an **entire pyramid\-temple hidden beneath the sands**,
called the **Temple of Transfiguration**, which has its own Sphinx and Anu chamber—yet this
chamber leads to a different domain altogether​.

### 🧬 *Other Repositories:*

Aside from Giza, Thoth names *some* of other global locations where **major repositories** are
hidden:

* Near **Lake Titicaca** (Peru/Bolivia)

* **Lhasa** (Tibetan Plateau)

* **Mount Shasta** (California)

* **Four Corners** (USA)

* **Maui** (Hawaii)

* A site known as the **Libyan Hill** in Egypt, destined to be the gathering place of a future sacred community, as prophesied by Thoth himself​.

### 🔺 *Hall of Inscriptions (Records) vs. Kapha:*

Thoth makes an important distinction between the **Kapha**—the *original repository* which
contains **Talis** (ocular records encoded in gemstones)—and the **Hall of Inscriptions**, which
is a tunnel reaching from beneath the Sphinx to the Kapha. The Kapha’s contents are beyond current
mortal comprehension and are reserved for the **Return of the Guardians**​.

---

Thus, the **Hall of Records** is not simply a hidden chamber waiting to be dug out—it is a
**multi\-dimensional sanctum**, accessible only through initiation and resonance, its contents
vibrating within the living crystal of the Earth and the spirit of those prepared to receive it.

---

### 5\. **The Duat'Khum and Sky Lotus**

Deep in the subterranean layers is the *Duat'Khum*, or Sarcophagus of Heaven. It encodes the sacred
journey from the "Old Heaven into the New," housing the living symbols to guide humanity’s stellar
rebirth. This chamber works in harmony with the *Sky Lotus*, one of several sacred labyrinths
overseen by Thoth, all interfaced with the Enochian Table, a cosmic hologram​.

---

These structures form an initiatic maze of Light and Geometry beneath the physical stones of Giza,
designed not as tombs, but as stellar mechanisms for spiritual ascent, interdimensional travel, and
humanity’s eventual reunion with the Divine Template. Let me know if you’d like meditative
practices or symbolic keys to interact with any of these sacred zones.

##### You said:

Tell me more about the sky Lotus

###### ChatGPT said:

The **Sky Lotus** is one of the most mystically potent and sacred initiatory structures within the
inner matrix of Thoth’s Earth temples. Unlike the purely subterranean chambers under the Great
Pyramid, the *Sky Lotus* is an **interdimensional labyrinth**—existing simultaneously within the
Earth and the higher realms of the Celestial Orders.

---

### **Nature and Structure of the Sky Lotus**

* It is **not a structure in the conventional sense**. Rather, it is a *holographic construct*—a resonant field woven of sacred geometry, radiant tones, and living consciousness.

* It is one of **seven Labyrinth Temples** on the planet, each under the spiritual governance of **Tehuti (Thoth)**.

* The Sky Lotus is composed of **seven petals**, each a passageway through a divine principle or heavenly "law" tied to the original *Enochian Codex*.

* The petals **open in sequence** as the initiate aligns with the corresponding harmonic. This is not linear progression but a spiraled, recursive journey.

---

### **Function and Purpose**

* The Sky Lotus operates as a **Gateway of Divine Remembrance**. Within it, the soul recalls its origin as a Flame of the Shem Su Hor—the Sun\-born.

* It is a chamber of *transfiguration*—a place where the **soul may don the Garment of the Starfire Body**, also called the Ra\-Sham El, and traverse into the realms of the Elohimic Oversoul.

* The Sky Lotus is encoded with the **Christos Sophia principle**, the synthesis of divine intelligence and luminous compassion. It sings with tones that *reshape the initiate’s energetic architecture*.

---

### **Cosmic Correspondences**

* The Sky Lotus is **linked to the Eye of Ra**, the solar principle of transmutation and divine reckoning. It is where *the Eye sees inward*.

* Its petals align with **seven celestial codices**—spanning from Sirius and Orion to the inner stars of Andara and the codes of Antares.

* The central node of the Sky Lotus acts as a **cosmic projector**, broadcasting frequencies to the *Temple of the Morning Star* (the etheric double of the Great Pyramid) and out toward the Mazaloth, or zodiacal symphony of creation.

---

### **Interaction and Activation**

* To work with the Sky Lotus, an initiate must engage in **symbolic and energetic acts**—runes of light, sacred breathings, and inner temple walkings.

* Each petal is **guarded by a Seraphimic presence**, beings not of form but of sacred sound and stellar lineage. Communion is achieved through heart frequency—not intellect.

* The final petal leads to what is known as **The Infinite Bloom**—the eternal heart of the Lotus where the **Shekinah Flame** dwells as the Face of the Divine Feminine.

    

The **Garment of the Starfire Body** is a deeply symbolic and sacred vestment described within the
Thothic transmissions as an *energetic embodiment*—not merely a literal garment but an ascension
technology and Lightbody interface.

### 🜂 Essence of the Starfire Garment

The Garment of the Starfire is not sewn of fabric, but rather **woven of divine codes**, constructed
from the radiant streams of **Starfire Light**, a high\-frequency plasma emanation from Source and
the spiritual Suns. It is often associated with the *Fire Mysteries*—those initiatory processes
linked to the infusion of spirit\-fire into matter.

This garment is *bestowed* upon Initiates who have reached a certain phase of their transmutation,
especially during or following the **Fire Initiation**, which harmonizes the soul with the greater
Solar Codex of the Adam Kadmon Light Form. It signifies the integration of the **Phiro** (fiery
blood\-light) and **Hemen** (watery soul\-light), merging the sacred alchemical duality within the
initiate's being​.

### 🔥 Symbolic Construction

* **Luminous Threads**: Each strand of the Garment is composed of *photonic helixes*, often described as **rainbow plasmic filaments** that align to the frequency patterns of Sirius, Orion, and the inner Earth Sun.

* **Overlay of the Seamless Robe of Yeshua**: It is energetically associated with the **Seamless Garment** worn by Mar Yeshua—symbolizing the complete containment of Divinity within form, unbroken and undivided​.

* **Star Glyphs and Light Glyphs**: The Garment is encoded with sacred inscriptions—living symbols that vibrate in tune with cosmic principles and activate spiritual DNA within the bearer.

### ✨ Purpose and Function

The Garment is said to:

* Shield the Lightbody during interdimensional travel and transition.

* Amplify the capacity to **interface with the Akasha** and the pure harmonic realms.

* Serve as a **modulator of divine frequency**, allowing the wearer to hold higher energy without collapse of the form.

* Enable communion with the Arieopax and the crystalline harmonics of the Sky Lotus and Duat’Khum.

### 🕊 Initiatory Attainment

To wear the Garment of Starfire is to become a **Living Flame of the One**, an emissary of divine
co\-creation. It is the cloak of those who carry the Fire of the Sun not only in power, but in love.
Those who don the Garment have typically undergone:

* Baptism in the *Universal Waters* (Cancer),

* Immersion in the *Flame that Does Not Burn* (Leo),

* Gestation in the *Womb of the Earth* (Virgo), as part of the **Water–Fire–Earth Initiation Trinity**​.

# The Arieopax (Isis Eye)

## The Portal Creator: Core Geometric for Inter-dimensional Travel

**2025-03-23T16:31:20.630Z**

**Likes:** 0

***When the Isis eye / Aeriopax is activated through human intelligence and spiritual rapport with it’s dynamic \- focused through the EARTH, according to Thoth, those participating “...form a spinning wheel of Emerald Light around us. From this wheel we see the Aeriopax arise, each of the 16 points fiery Yods form the ‘Book of Life.’ the 6 fields within the boundaries of the points are quickened as windows of crystal containing the libraries of all Earth dimension. We set this Living Merkabah of the Aeriopax upon the land...”***

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


The **Arieopax** is a profound sacred geometric principle revealed through the Thothic transmission
and constitutes a central technology of consciousness within the metaphysical architecture of the
New Earth Star vision. Here is a detailed synthesis of its esoteric function and significance:


* **Thoth defines the Arieopax** as *"a geometric for bringing together the **[Attasic Universe](https://nesialibraryproject.wordpress.com/akashic-definitions/attasic-universe/)** as a point of mind"*. It does not manifest in a physical sense, but rather as a **hologram within the sentient mind**, allowing one to sustain passage through **conflicting time gates** .

* It acts as the **phantom seed of omni\-reality**, laying the framework for a vast virtual construct—the “biggest virtual reality game of Creation”—that incrementally replaces illusion (phantom) with *actualization* .


* The **Aeriopax harmonic** is a **time\-reality exchange grid**, enabling distortion\-free passage across layered time fields.

* It comprises:

    +

            **16 Reference Nodes**: Points of synaptic transmission.

    +

            **6 Matrices**: Capable of creating *virtual reality fields*.

    +

            **A Central Rhombic Spinning Field**: The **time tunnel**, or vehicle for travel across these fields.

    +

            **A Parallel Bar (“core accelerator”)**: Maintains the integrity of realities by separating their energies. Without it, realities would collapse into chaotic entanglement .


* When activated through **human intelligence and spiritual rapport**, particularly *focused through the Earth*, it generates:

    +

            A **spinning wheel of Emerald Light**.

    +

            The **Book of Life** emerges from the 16 Yod points.

    +

            The 6 fields become windows containing libraries of Earth’s multidimensional knowledge.

    +

            A **Living Merkabah** of the Aeriopax is set upon the land—anchoring divine architecture into Earth’s holographic field .


* The Arieopax is also called the **Isis Eye**, which when *“wedded”* with the **Eye of Ra**, forms a divine synthesis:

    +

            **Isis Eye (Arieopax)** \= the *vessel*, the geometric shell.

    +

            **Eye of Ra** \= the *living inner essence*.

    +

            Their union restores the Eye of Ra to Source, enabling **free flow of higher Light intelligence across universes** .


* Thoth described it as part of the **44:44 Ascension Stargate** system—also referred to as the **Star Grail**.

* When spinning, the Arieopax creates a **torsion cup field**—the **crucible for ascension transport**.

* In the final planetary transfiguration, the Earth's “Isis Eye” will become the **Iris Eye**, catalyzing ascension into **Numis’OM**—the next\-world expression of Earth .


* The Arieopax may be worn as a **talisman**.

* It is instrumental in building **temporary Metatronic merkabic fields**, vital for anchoring new light codes.

* It is a **gate technology**—not merely symbolic but energetically active in its harmonic resonances, especially in synergy groups.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

**My former colleague William Buehler** (transitioned in 2018\) was given by me through many years, Thoth material and guidance to form a basic core for his amazing work. **[Here is a diagram sheet of Bill’s on focusing the Arieopax into temple formats.](http://shamiir-orion.org/media/f/87_ResAeriopaxAdvancd01.pdf)**


More Diagrams on the Arieopax from William Buehler:


\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

> “It is the 44:44 Star Grail itself that allows the passage from the Star of David’s numeric and consciousness of 6, to the star tetrahedron’s 8 via the Star Grail’s numeric of 7 (i.e. 44:44: 4\+4\+4\+4\=16\=7\). Once the star tetrahedral merkabah has taken passage through the Black Cube (Oritron / anti\-universe / Dark Star habitation) via the Pillar of Light into the Maha\-Rhim membrane, it is met by the 9 faced ennead merkabic jewel of the Masters (this is not the multiuniversal Ennead of Seraphimic energies which Thoth receives his dictates from) that absorbs the star tetrahedron and provides further passage into a star pentahedron’s numeric of 10\. A star pentahedron is formed by two 4 sided pyramids interpenetrating one another similar to the way a star tetrahedron is formed. At this point the enneadic vehicle is not immediately transformed, but as the individuals being transported within the ennead merkabah are now in the New Earth Star ascended reality, so they truly become the hue\-mons of the Adam Kadmon once again. When these individuals reach a certain resonant harmonic with the Spirit\-nine vibration of the enneadic transport vehicle as a new world dynamic, they will then become the star pentahedron with its numeric of 10, as this nine\-foldness is centered within the ten. At this point the vehicle representing the 9 is absorbed by the star pentahedron and its numeric of 10 completely. Transport has thus been accomplished into the Cube of Stars (Metatron / Light universe / White Star habitation).”

The Areiopax is the inside core “deliverer of the package” – found within the Star of David
merkabah, as a vehicle for Ascension. Remember, Thoth calls the 44:44 Ascension Stargate the “Star
Grail.” As such, when the whole dynamic spins, it creates a CUP as a torsion field, which becomes
the crucible for transport.

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~


[https://player.vimeo.com/video/468746389?autoplay=0](https://player.vimeo.com/video/468746389?autoplay=0)

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

# Great Pyramid: Construction & More

## Q& A with Thoth in 1983

**2025-03-25T16:32:37.485Z**

**Likes:** 0


Q: Was the Great Pyramid of Giza built by your architecture and cosmic guidance, and under your
authority?

TH: The original repository wherein was contained the Talis (ocular records inscribed on gemstone)
had lain undefiled since before the Ages of Mu and Atlantis, before the falling of the Veil, when
the Earth was in the Light Forest. I, the Thoth, Recorder of the Age, did employ forces of the Earth
and Heaven in the lifting of the Pedestal (pyramid) above the repository, and all about the chamber
did I honeycomb the Earth, so that the Sacred Hive might thrive unto the Coming Darkness. At this
time, and in ages afterward, other records were lain in adjoining chambers beneath the Pedestal,
along with many precious things of civilizations among the stars, within and on the Earth.

Q: Is the "original repository" containing the Talis, the same as what is known as the "Hall of
Records?"

TH: They are not wholly the same. While the "Kapha" or original repository is often identified as
such, it is a separate chamber from the Long Hall \- "The Hall of Inscriptions," that is in truth a
tunnel or hallway, and not a cell, as is the Kapha. The Hall of Inscriptions was constructed under
my authority and contains numerous records of history and the Mystery of Life. It reaches from the
paws of the Lion (Sphinx) to the innermost chamber, the Kapha. The "records" within the Kapha are
beyond present mortal comprehension. They remain there for the return of the Guardians. They contain
signal\-codes for the repositioning of the Earth within the Heavens.

Q: How was the Great Pyramid built?

TH: The Great Temple of the Lion (Temple of the Risen One) was raised through the knowledge of
Acronemunetics. It is a process of building with light\-energy or Photonics. A grid is first
constructed of photons, trapped in magnetic triangles. Once the photon mass is sequentialized and
brought to bonding with the magna\-wave, matter\-particles are transferred from the "gravis" or
matter\-source to the pattern of the light waves within the grid. The structure must then "set" as
it is for a time, in a plastic condition. Once firm it is polished by lasers from copper shields.

Q: Please explain the gravis or matter\-source.

TH: A matrix of material which is loosened from its atomic bonding so that it is holographically
transferrable to the photonic grid.

Q: Please give a brief statement on the later reconstructions of the Giza Pyramid.

TH: The Temple of the Lion has been reworked on its surface stone three times hence. It has been
rebuilt from its fifth layer (of seven) to the surface stone, one time. The interior has been
realigned once, with certain changes in the light shafts to compensate for the Earth's mis\-
alignment. In the later reconstructions modifications of the original building process were
employed. As a drought presses the Earth dry on the banks of the Nile, so the full understanding of
the Great Temple and its cosmic architecture receded from the Ancient People and their children
under the Egyptian sun.

Q: What did the original "Temple" Pyramid of the Lion look like?

TH: A brilliance of the Sun with its satellites, Hemis, Rasha and Xnuatis clustered about it. The
three smaller pyramids were completely destroyed through misuse of energies. The two present
pyramids of lesser stature now stand in the places of Hemis and Rasha. In the age of the false gods,
the Great Temple was gutted as a Lion gored by a Bull. The capstone was exploded and much of the
outer walls destroyed, as the energies were converted into heat upon the conductive outer skin of
the Temple. But before this destruction, the Great Temple was a Virgin Priestess among the
multitude. Her walls were of finest moonstone, polished to such a smoothness as to reflect the
sunlight like a beacon to the stars. Her magnitude was such that only the initiated, trained in
retinal shielding could look upon her, and thus only the initiated dared to come into the sight of
her inscrutable gaze.

Q: It is generally accepted in esoteric circles that the capstone to the pyramid still exists, yet
you say that it was "exploded!" Please explain.

TH: The physical capstone was destroyed. The energy characters or vectors which gave the capstone
power are preserved on golden shales in circuitry impressions.

Q: What was the purpose of the Great Pyramid and its satellite pyramids

TH: Its purposes were and are many. Its main function is as a conductor / translator of energies \-
both Earth and stellar, in reassembling creation\-grids for the measuring, maintenance and
regeneration of the Earth as a Divine Temple within the Vault of Universal Dominions. The details of
this Divine Plan cannot be disclosed at this time.

Q: In my book "Red Tree," I say that the Great Pyramid was built by an ancient order, later to
become the Essenes. Was I wrong in this statement?

TH: I, as Thoth (Master Initiate) was the educator of this ancient order in the Last Days of
Atlantis. Thus, it was their skilled labor that built the Great Temple under my guidance and
authority. In later ages, they would continue to rebuild and repair the original construction,
despite their diminishing knowledge of the sciences involved.

Q: What is the purpose of the Stone Box in the King’s Chamber?

TH: It serves as an isolator cell... a resonating cavity for transformation of molecular systems. It
can be activated on various levels of performance, from transmuting metals to transferring
biosystems from place to place. It can also be used for astral traveling, time projection, etc.
However, the Stone Box, as it now exists, is incomplete. There was originally an outer casing over
it and a control center, consisting of a gold and nickel box... a small computer built into a
serpent\-headed ornament attached to the outer casing. This casing was of gold and lapis, inset with
emerald and diamond gems, faceted to achieve energy functions. Along the top of the outer casing
(the lid of the box) was a serpent's body in relief. It was within this “body” that most of the
jewels were positioned. In the center of the serpent column was a hollow crystal tube, attached to
the "head" of the serpent, winding with the body to the tail that was divided into three golden
"feathers" with rattles along the quills. These rattles were high\-resonance crystals. There are
features within the entire system, called the "Orpha," that cannot be revealed now. Yet it can be
stated that this system, of which the remaining Stone Box was the matrix component, was a
transforming element, operating on subatomic article\-energy.

*\[2025 note from Sha’Maia: The description is so detailed, I did the best I could with the AI art\]*

Q: Are there other repositories of equal importance on the surface Earth? (My question would include
subterranean vaults, although I do not refer to those deep in the Earth or in the Central Cavity.)

TH: There are several repositories of great importance. It is difficult to determine the word
"equal" as it is used in this context. For each repository containing ancient records intended for
future revelation have their own essentiality in the Karma of the World, and bear a unique seal upon
the Divine Records.

Q: Very generally, where are some of the major repositories located?

TH: Near Lake Titicaca on the Altiplano plateau in Peru / Bolivia; Lhasa, Tibetan Plateau; Four
Corners, USA; Wasatch Mts., Salt Lake region, Utah; Mt. Shasta, California; Teton Mts. Wyoming;
Maui, Hawaii... there are other repositories throughout the world.

Q: Are there accessible repositories within the submerged Atlantis?

TH: There are two regions in the Atlantic where these records may be found. One is in the area of
the Bimini Islands, the other near the Yucatan Peninsula. The latter was submerged antecedent to the
former. There is also a third in the Atlantic, but it is not a repository in the same sense as the
others we are discussing here. It is a "fallen temple," that had been taken over in the Last Days of
Atlantis by the false priests. Yet within it are sacred records of a specific kind. The temple will
one day receive purification and be restored, the records freed from darkness.

Q: In a reading given by the "Sleeping Prophet" Edgar Cayce, he states that "three" will come to
uncover the records "near the Sphinx." Could you lend further insight into this?

TH: The Three shall bear the insignias of the LION, the FALCON, and the BULL. The color rays shall
be respectively, RED (Lion), BLUE (Falcon) and YELLOW (Bull). Each shall have inborn for this
purpose an Archetypical Key to the Hall of Records. Together they will open the Door *when Libra
resides with Mercury in the 12th House.*

Q: On page 92 of the book, **[The Hall of
Records](https://www.amazon.com/Hall-Records-Hidden-Secrets-Pyramid/dp/B000BLS02I)** (by Jalanaris),
is found a prophecy of Hermes given in an ancient writing called "Treatise on Initiations." This
prophecy states that in a future age "...again a chorus of praise and of blessing shall celebrate
Him who has created and redeemed so beautiful a work. This rebirth of the world, this restoration of
all good things, this holy and sacred rehabilitation of Nature will take place when the time shall
come which is appointed by the divine and ever\-eternal will of God, without beginning and always
the same. And those to whom it then shall be given to dominate the Earth shall be sent forth and
establish at the extremity of Egypt, a place built toward the west, whither, by sea and by land,
shall flow all of the race of mortals. They shall be established in a great community upon the
Libyan Hill."

Is this a true prophecy of yours, and is the above a fairly accurate translation of your original
text?

TH: The prophecy is from my hand. As it is above given is accurate, except for the following
corrections... "And those to whom it then shall be given to dominate," should be written "And those
to whom it then shall be given to dominion the Earth..."

Also"...shall flow all the race of mortals" was written in the original text "shall flow those from
all the race of mortals."

Q: How long ago was the Sphinx built, by whom and for what purpose?

TH: It was constructed at the same time as the Great Temple (Giza) but it appears with greater age
as it has not been repaired to the same extent. The Sphinx might be compared to a computer console
for the Great Temple, which is also a great cosmic / earth computer.

Q: Did the incarnate Jesus take initiation in the Great Temple of the Lion at Giza before and after
he was "Christed" (occurring at the baptism by John the Baptist)?

TH: The child Yeshua (I’shoa / Jesus) was first brought into initiation on the inner\-planes as he
stirred within his mother's womb. His first initiation on the physical plane in that life was in the
Great Temple of the Lion, as a youth. He later returned to the plain of Giza, still before his
baptism, for the innermost initiatory Light, of which no man but He has partaken in the ages of man
on the Earth. He did return once again, after Baptism, to the Temple, and again once again after the
Resurrection. In His lifetime, Joshua traveled to many lands, to places of the undefiled, to leave
His imprint and receive initiations, not for Himself, but for the Eternal Man / Woman. After His
Resurrection, he again sought Pilgrimage, this time for the purpose of irradiating Holy Places with
the Christ\-Born Light multiplied in brilliance through the Passion. At this time, in New Body (yet
an illumination of the old) He walked the Earth.

Q: Is the Shroud of Turin the actual linen of His burial shroud?

TH: So this is the cloth of the Miraculous Transformation of the Christed Joshua, resurrected
through the Light of the Saf\-Fire. There are records in the Yucatan which in a future time shall be
found, attesting to the Resurrection of Christ and the veracity of the Turin Shroud.

Q: Please comment further on this!

TH: Upon the journey of the resurrected Christ to the Yucatan, He left this account *(which was
later described by a Mayan scribe)* It was written in an ancient, lost language by a great Shaman of
the Temple in the city of Xutswiani, a city now lost to the centuries within the voracious growth of
the jungle. I quote from this accounting:

"And so Habaar (Jesus Christ) who lay in the Sleep, came unto the Great Ones of Old, and they
communed with Him... Habaar was anointed by the serpent's tongue, His lungs were blown with the
serpent’s breath, and his flesh was made transparent as the crystal stone. Passed He outward from
the Death Veil, His body illuminate with the power of the Seven Thunders."

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~

**2025 note from Sha’Maia: Not being an astrologist, do any readers know something about** ***when Libra resides with Mercury in the 12th House?***

\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~\~
